remarks: At Villa Alegria, you will find the perfect blend of comfort, style, and location for your Palm Springs home. This 2-bedroom / 2-bath, 1405 square foot condo is perfect for the discerning buyer. Recently remodeled, this turnkey-furnished unit features high-end amenities and upscale furnishings. This home offers an open floor plan with vaulted ceilings, wood beams, and a large private outdoor atrium courtyard. There's also an east facing outdoor patio overlooking the pool. The kitchen is equipped with Bosch appliances, a refrigerator with ice maker, gas cooktop, oven, microwave, and dishwasher. The kitchen is fully stocked with stainless steel cookware, cutlery, Keurig coffee maker, toaster, Vitamix blender, green juicer, citrus juicer, electric mixer, barware, and more. The primary bedroom features a king-size bed and the adjoining bathroom has a luxury solid surface freestanding tub and a separate shower stall. The second bedroom features a queen-size bed and has a designated bathroom with a shower stall.  The condo has a full-size washer and dryer plus an outdoor gas grill. A new furnace and a Trane air conditioning unit with new ducting were installed in 2025. For added energy efficiency, seven dual-paned, tinted sliding glass doors were installed. Each room has motorized roller shades with direct access to the courtyard. Villa Alegria is a small (39 unit), gated, well-maintained community just minutes from downtown Palm Springs. The complex has three pools and three hot tubs. HOA also includes high-speed internet. Villa Alegria offers quick access to Palm Springs International Airport and is close to shopping, restaurants, and mountain trails. There is a one dedicated carport space. See upgrade and improvement list in the "doc(s) tab. On Fee land - you own it!

remarks: A home that can retain its original owners for nearly seven decades, affording them the opportunity to happily raise four children, must hold something very special indeed. Come harness all its’ positive energy to create a lifetime of happiness for you. Situated on a desirable quiet cul-de-sac where those same four children relished countless hours of frolic, cementing cherished childhood memories. Inside this warm wonderful abode, discover hardwood flooring throughout and a spacious living room with beautiful wood beam ceilings, classic brick fireplace and unique bar. An adjacent dining area also offers a charming brick fireplace. Large upper-level primary suite features a walk-in closet and private bathroom. Three bedrooms and two additional baths add to the appeal. Outside enjoy covered dining/entertaining and grassy area. Newer roof, newer water heater plus an extra-large driveway further enhance. Live in just the way it is or remodel to your hearts’ desire. In addition, your mere moments to Cedars/Tarzana medical center and just a short stroll to the Blvd. As an added bonus, all schools for this home are sought-after charter schools. Don’t miss!

remarks:
Refined coastal living becomes your everyday reality in this beautifully updated and meticulously curated home, nestled in the heart of one of Hermosa Beach’s most vibrant and sought-after communities. This sleek one-bedroom residence blends modern sophistication with effortless beachside comfort.

Ideally positioned just steps from the scenic Greenbelt, one block from all that Pier Avenue offers, and moments from the sand, this home offers seamless access to acclaimed restaurants, boutique shopping, cafés, and beloved annual beach events. With a high walk score, secure building access, and close proximity to the Hermosa Pier, you’re perfectly situated to enjoy the area’s most celebrated coastal amenities—from high-end grocery options and organic eateries to marquee events like the Beach Life Festival and world-famous volleyball tournaments.

Set around a lush, tree-filled courtyard featuring a variety of mature trees, a bright lemon tree, vibrant landscaping, and frequent hummingbird visits, the community provides a peaceful retreat rarely found along the coast. Amenities include a heated pool, spa, and recreation area—ideal for both relaxation and social gatherings.

Inside, the residence has been thoughtfully refreshed. Nearly every surface has been newly painted, while double-pane windows and sliding doors enhance comfort and quiet. Custom interior and closet doors, engineered wood flooring, updated fixtures, and well-designed storage add cohesion and style. 

Sun-filled, west-facing windows illuminate the open concept layout, and the home’s footprint—nearly 100 sq. ft. larger than comparable units—creates a notably more spacious living experience. Including the oversized bedroom that easily accommodates a king-sized bed with additional space for a home office, reading nook, or creative area. The generous, uniquely shaped balcony extends the living space. It provides a view of the Greenbelt and the central courtyard and has room for a seating setup and a BBQ, bringing the breeze indoors. 

Clean, bright, and move-in ready, this exceptional home offers an elevated beachside lifestyle—ideal for first-time buyers, those seeking a refined coastal retreat, or pet owners who value green spaces and walkability.

remarks: PLEASE READ CAREFULLY.  Well located, beautiful North Inglewood, single family home situated on a large corner lot. Completely gated and secured property with an immaculately maintained front and side yard. Mature plants and foliage create a uniquely serene, secure and safe setting for your morning coffee, afternoon barbeque or simply a place to sit and enjoy the garden and outdoor setting.  In the rear the 2 car garage is accessed through 2 ornamental metal sliding gates onto a circular driveway.  In the back there's enough room for any number of creative spaces; workout gym, garden, patio with bbq and lounging, storage, etc.. The property has been upgraded over the years with newer finishes without permit. The square footage is given by the seller and differs from public records.   Buyer to verify all permitting and actual livable square footage.  In addition, property functions as two separate living spaces a 2+1 in front and a 1+1+loft in the rear with direct access to the garage.

remarks: This newly fresh painted 2,188 square foot, 2-story home sits on 60x100 square foot lot located in the charming town of Lone Pine. Nestled at the base of gorgeous Sierra Nevada mountains with a view of Mt. Whitney from the yard and balcony. Home is located within walking distance to town with parks, schools, film museum, grocery store, shops and restaurants. This property is great for those who enjoy the outdoors, as Alabama Hills are minutes away as well as hiking trails, fishing, camping, streams, Owens River and Lake Diaz, all within five miles. This home is a great place to raise a family and host large holiday dinners, celebrations, reunions and much more. The backyard is designed for both relaxation and entertaining, complete with terracotta tile flooring, a sauna, and direct access to open fields with sweeping panoramic views in all directions. Ceiling to floor fireplace with Dolomite (rocks from local mine). Central heating and air conditioning (3 1/2 ton A/C) split system. Ceiling (10) fans located in all bedrooms. Full length attic upstairs for extra storage with industrial cooling attic fans. Extra-large washroom, walk-in pantry, counter-top with drawers/cabinets. Large walk-in closet and coat closet. Double wide, glass full-length French doors leading into backyard with tile floors and covered balcony to enjoy sunset views year-round. Enjoy a full-size dry sauna that holds up to 4 people anytime. An herb garden box for seasonal planting of veggies. herbs or flowers. Full length upstairs balcony with spectacular view of Mt. Whitney. Downstairs tiled patio with balcony canopy. Full size walk-in cedar wood dry sauna. Fenced yard (front and back) with access gate to field. Utility shed and enclosed full size shed with door and window. Extended car port with covered roof. Enclosed one car garage with roll up door. Access fire door from garage to inside home. Three car concrete driveway slab. Fully producing apricot and plum trees. Two bonus rooms. Two large living rooms (upstairs and downstairs). Home has double pane windows. Suitable for multi-family.

remarks:

Exceptional Value in Irvine | Top-Rated School District | Golf Course View | Low Tax | No Mello-Roos

|3 Beds | 2 Baths | Approx. 1,450 Sqft.
180° Panoramic Golf Course, Lake & Greenbelt Views.
 HOA Includes Water & Trash – Lower Monthly Carrying Cost.
 Top-Ranked School: University High School.
Directly Across from William R. Mason Regional Park.

• Open-concept floor plan with vaulted ceilings;
• Recessed lighting, large windows, and plantation shutters;
• Three private view balconies;
• Living room, dining area, and bedrooms all enjoy stunning golf course views;
• All living space on one level – rare and highly desirable layout;

• Private balcony.

• Minutes to University of California, Irvine.
• Close to beaches & Back Bay Nature Preserve.
• Shopping at Fashion Island.
• Easy access to 405 / 55 / 73 freeways.
• Near John Wayne Airport.

 Offered at $1,285,000

remarks: Comfortable Living in Claremont's Shepherd Hills Community. Set in a secluded pocket of Northwest Claremont, this attached single family home offers a comfortable setting with a picturesque front yard that creates a sense of openness. The approach is attractive and inviting, reflecting the calm feel of the neighborhood. Upon entry, natural light carries through the main living areas featuring new interior paint and carpet. The living room is well proportioned and centered around a fireplace that defines the space. A reading nook looks out toward the front yard, offering a relaxed place to sit. Adjacent to the living room is the formal dining room, with direct access to the kitchen and attractive French doors leading outdoors. The kitchen is designed with function in mind, featuring stainless steel appliances, tile countertops, a detailed backsplash, and generous cabinet storage. The kitchen is open to the adjoining family room creating a pleasant open layout, including space for a breakfast table. The home includes three bedrooms and two bathrooms. The primary suite features high ceilings and direct access to the backyard. Its en suite bathroom includes dual sinks and a shower set behind a pocket door for added privacy. The backyard is peaceful, private, and serene. Surrounded by natural greenery, it serves as a comfortable extension of the indoor living space. A pergola provides shaded seating, while the lush grassy lawn provides space for outdoor activities, and the storage shed is included. The layout allows for a variety of uses, including outdoor dining, casual seating, or a play space. Its size and configuration make it a practical outdoor area that can adapt to different needs.

remarks: Welcome to the serene and inviting Casitas De La Costa community, nestled in the heart of La Costa. This spacious two story, end-unit, loft-style home, thoughtfully designed and newly refreshed with a brand new HVAC heating and AC unit, new carpet, new paint throughout, new bathroom fixtures, new granite countertops and sinks in the baths and a walk-in closet. The kitchen opens up to the living area and boasts, recessed lighting, a new stove, freshly painted cabinets and a big stainless steel refrigerator. The oversized vaulted ceilings give the home an expansive feeling with gorgeous views looking east from the patio and picture window. This home has beautiful tile floors, a wood burning fireplace and exudes warmth and character. Enjoy the private patio or unwind in the community’s two pools, two spas, two saunas, and resort-like feel with the sounds of the water features flowing throughout the community. The home has stackable washer and dryer, 1 gated assigned covered parking, underground parking for visitors and is a short drive to the ocean, State Beaches, Batiquitos Lagoon and is very close to Omni La Costa Resort, for shopping, dining and golf. No one above or below you! Stores, cinemas, restaurants, the library and more are a short jaunt across the street, not to mention the highly saught after Carlsbad Schools! This home is a true retreat ready for its next homeowner!

remarks: Open Saturday from 11-1pm. Nestled within the highly sought-after Village Park community, this beautifully updated end-unit home offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and coastal lifestyle living. Boasting approximately 1,485 square feet with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, this thoughtfully designed residence features the highly desirable convenience of a downstairs primary bedroom, creating exceptional functionality for a variety of lifestyles. The recently remodeled kitchen showcases new appliances, modern finishes, and seamless flow into the main living spaces, while luxury vinyl flooring adds warmth and durability throughout the home. A cozy fireplace anchors the inviting living area, complemented by central air conditioning and a whole house fan for year-round comfort. Additional highlights include an inside laundry room, mature landscaping, and an expansive enclosed outdoor patio ideal for entertaining, dining al fresco, or simply enjoying the coastal climate. The large detached two-car garage provides ample storage and parking flexibility. Residents of Village Park enjoy resort-inspired amenities including an Olympic-sized pool, spa, clubhouse, tennis and pickleball courts, multiple tot lots, scenic walking paths, and expansive greenbelts that create a true neighborhood atmosphere. Ideally located within walking distance to Park Dale Lane Elementary School, the home also offers convenient access to nearby shopping, dining, parks, and the renowned beaches of Encinitas. Enjoy close proximity to popular destinations including Moonlight State Beach, Encinitas Ranch Golf Course, and the vibrant shops, cafes, and restaurants along historic Coast Highway 101. This is an exceptional opportunity to enjoy the best of North County coastal living in one of Encinitas' most beloved communities.

remarks:
Single-story home located south of Colima Blvd in Hacienda Heights, on a corner lot of approximately 0.24 acres. Backyard has a new patio cover, mountain and city views, a usable yard, and no ascending slope. Open floor plan with living and family/dining areas. Kitchen with solid wood cabinets, granite countertops, and appliances.

Property features include an upgraded electrical panel; smooth ceilings (popcorn texture removed); interior and exterior paint; engineered wood/laminate flooring with no carpet; original wood floors sanded and refinished; double-pane windows and sliding doors; copper repipe; water heater; HVAC ducting with R-6 insulation; R-30 attic insulation; recessed lighting; ceiling fans; baseboards, trim, and solid-core doors with hardware; fencing on the north side; renovated guest bath; partially renovated primary bath; blinds and drapes.

The side yard and approximately 1/4-acre corner lot may allow for an ADU or lot split; buyer to verify with the local building/planning department. Located near shopping, dining, parks, public transit, and freeway access to Los Angeles, Orange, San Bernardino, and Riverside counties.

remarks: 2 homes on an avocado farm with a high producing 200 GMP well. Rare 49.05 Acre Organic Avocado Farm – A Private, Income-Producing Retreat in the Heart of Escondido An extraordinary opportunity to own 49 acres with an avocado grove in the scenic hills of Escondido. Set across three separate parcels, this income-producing estate offers the ultimate blend of agricultural utility, residential flexibility, and serene privacy—all just minutes from downtown Escondido, major highways, and San Diego attractions. The professionally managed grove consists of mature and planted Hass avocado trees, supported by advanced irrigation infrastructure and one high-producing wells (200+). One district water meter 3'' and a robust 144 panel (34kw) paid solar power system further enhance efficiency and long-term cost savings. Reclaimed water from the City of Escondido is expected to be available soon, increasing the property's sustainability and future value. The estate includes two well-maintained detached homes, ideal for multigenerational living, rental income, or on-site management, along with a small woodshop perfect for creative projects or continuing the property’s tradition of handcrafted avocado wood furniture. Security and privacy are top priorities, with an automatic gated entry, and a comprehensive camera surveillance system. Enjoy panoramic views from every angle, with rolling terrain, scenic groves, and a hidden view deck tucked into the trees—perfect for unwinding in your own private park-like setting. Multiple flat pads offer future development potential or additional farming capacity, and well-maintained access roads ensure smooth operation year-round. This is more than a farm—it's a rare lifestyle property offering peace, productivity, and possibility in one of Southern California’s most fertile and desirable agricultural regions

remarks:
This exceptional residence showcases a thoughtfully designed floor plan with five spacious bedrooms and 5.5 elegantly appointed bathrooms, including a versatile ground-floor suite ideal for guests or home office needs.

From the moment you step inside, you’re greeted by soaring 10-foot ceilings, gallery-style art walls, a sophisticated wine cabinet, and wide-plank European wood floors that exude warmth and refinement. The chef’s kitchen is a work of art in itself, featuring sleek European cabinetry, a dramatic center island, and state-of-the-art Thermador appliances.

The expansive family room seamlessly connects to a lush, private backyard oasis—complete with a sparkling pool, spa, tranquil waterfall, and a stylish lounge area with a fire pit, perfect for indoor-outdoor entertaining or peaceful evenings under the stars. Floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors flood the home with natural light, enhancing the open and airy ambiance.

Upstairs, four luxurious bedroom suites each feature private balconies, while the primary suite serves as a true retreat, offering a serene spa-inspired bathroom with a soaking tub, an oversized walk-in closet, and an expansive private terrace. Equipped with a state-of-the-art smart home system controlled by iPad and an immersive Sonos surround sound system, every detail has been curated for modern luxury living.

Ideally situated in the prestigious Melrose Corridor, this home places you just moments from Beverly Grove, West Hollywood, Larchmont Village, and Highland Park, with premier shopping, dining, and entertainment at your fingertips.

it’s a refined lifestyle waiting to be experienced.

remarks:
The Sunset Ranch on Benton provides ample opportunities. Currently zoned for a single-family home on 4.36 Acres, this property may present an
opportunity for rezoning through the county of Riverside. Whether you are potentially subdividing into several smaller lots, hoping for a live and work
environment, looking at the Sunset Ranch for the next city or county development project, or for the possibility of commercial revenue, The Sunset Ranch on Benton is centrally located on Benton Rd, the closest thing to a “Main Street” in French Valley. Benton Rd runs through French Valley, becoming Clinton Keith at the 79S, eventually hitting both the 215 and 15 Freeways.The property is also close to housing, shopping, and commercial development, and is mostly flat and usable. It sits in the heart of French Valley, on the Main Street, in an unincorporated community of Winchester, California. This area sits in the highly desirable Temecula Valley Unified School District.Here are some possibilities to consider if rezoning is achieved through the county. Renderings have been provided in the pictures. Option 1: “Benton Park” would follow the layout of several 5-acre parks throughout the country, with an amphitheater, playground, walking trails, and a skate park. This would be a great place for French Valley residents to gather with friends and family, or for community events. I’d love to see the County of Riverside, or the City of Temecula, make this possible. Option 2: I call it “Benton Headquarters”, a shopping center like Vail Headquarters in Southern Temecula, which features several smaller local shops, bringing back opportunities for residents, local shopping, food, fun, performances, and music. Building community and memories, while generating commercial revenue for ownership. Or Option 3: “Housing” Keep this as a single-family home for one family on a large lot, or multiple families, subdividing into 6 lots, each about ¾ of an acre. These homes would feature Temecula Valley Schools, large flat usable lots, and would be walking distance from parks, restaurants, and shopping. Perfect for a family compound, or a smaller developer. For a property like this one, the possibilities are endless. Everything would have to be approved, permitted, and rezoned with the county, but an opportunity like this only comes along - once in a great while…It would be nice to see something good for French Valley, and the people who live here.

remarks: Here is your opportunity to purchase a charming 1930's Spanish home on a large lot in the beautiful East Washington Village area of Pasadena. The possibilities are endless with this special property . . . You can move right in and update after getting a "feel" for how you'd like to live in the home; you could add an ADU (or 2!) in the spacious backyard for multi-generational living /extra income; or be that savvy investor you've always wanted to become and add several units to maximize the LA County R-3 Limited Density Multiple Residence zoning.  The home features an open, flexible floor plan that is perfect for entertaining along with original detailing, arched doorways, hardwood floors and cozy fireplaces. You can look forward to hosting al fresco dinner parties on the large back patio or perhaps you can just throw some burgers on the grill while you watch the kids play tag in the grassy yard. After a hard day you can unwind with a nice glass of wine on the front porch or curl up with a good book by living room fireplace. The property is also conveniently close to some of Pasadena's best dining, shopping, and nightlife.  There is also easy access to public transportation and you are just around the corner from Pepper Drive's bike parade on the 4th of July. It is important to note that this home is located in unincorporated LA County so you will not have to deal with Pasadena's strict building codes or rent control. Hopefully, you will be the lucky buyer who gets to discover all the potential of this special property.

remarks: Come look and fall in love this price improvement! This 3 bedroom 1.5 bath A-Frame treehouse cabin has all the rustic charm with modern touches. Sitting high up in the trees arriving at a convenient mud room to take off your snow boats before entering the cozy living room with fireplace. A rustic barn door separates the family room with the laundry and half bathroom. Bedroom one is directly off the family room entry area. The large front deck is perfect to take in the mountain air. The second main floor features an open living room with wood burning stove, dining and kitchen. This main floor showcases the beautiful A-Frame design and windows bringing in mountain sunshine. Modern touches adorn the house at every corner without losing the rustic cabin feel. A smaller deck with built in bench seating is located off the main floor living area. remarks:
Step into a world of timeless elegance with this exquisite 1930s Spanish Colonial Revival, a residence that masterfully blends vintage character with sophisticated urban living. Nestled in the heart of Los Angeles at 1617 W 80th Street, this architectural gem greets you with a commandingly regal façade, featuring classic stucco, terracotta accents, and a silhouette that whispers of Old Hollywood glamour.

The Interior Experience
Inside, the home unfolds across nearly 1,600 square feet of meticulously curated space. The grand living room serves as the heart of the home, bathed in natural light that dances across authentic architectural details. High ceilings and graceful archways transition seamlessly into a formal dining area, creating an atmosphere perfectly suited for high-end entertaining or intimate soirées.

Luxurious Accommodations
The residence offers three generous bedrooms and two bathrooms, each thoughtfully positioned to offer a sanctuary of privacy. The primary suite is a masterclass in comfort, providing a serene retreat from the vibrant energy of the city. Every corner of the interior reflects a commitment to craftsmanship that is increasingly rare in today’s modern landscape.

Outdoor Grandeur
Set upon a sprawling 6,750 square foot lot, the exterior grounds offer a rare sense of scale and possibility. Whether you envision a manicured Mediterranean garden, a bespoke alfresco lounge, or an expanded footprint, the outdoor space provides a majestic canvas. A detached two-car garage completes this prestigious offering, ensuring both convenience and privacy.

Virtual Tour: https://tour.caimagemaker.com/l/?id=184298IDX

The upgraded kitchen showcases quartz countertops, self-closing cabinets, stainless steel appliances, oversized deep sink, crown molding, and seven recessed lights. remarks: Step into a reimagined iconic residence at the legendary intersection of Hollywood Boulevard and Vine Street  where timeless architecture meets elevated modern living. Introducing Residence #711, one of Hollywood's most celebrated historic addresses.  This expansive true 2-bedroom, 2-bath residence impresses with soaring ceilings and dramatic west-facing views that stretch to the Pacific on a clear day. A striking wall of floor-to-ceiling glass, complete with automated sunshades,  fills the home with natural light and showcases unforgettable sunset skies. The layout is both spacious and refined, offering privacy between bedrooms while maintaining an effortless flow for entertaining. Originally home to the Hollywood outpost of the The Broadway Department Store for more than 50 years, this Mills Act-designated architectural landmark was thoughtfully transformed in 2008 into an exclusive collection of luxury live-work residences. The building's stunning common spaces were curated by acclaimed designer Kelly Wearstler, from the statement lobby and corridors to the rooftop retreat and private cabanas. Inside #711, contemporary upgrades complement the building's historic character. The open-concept kitchen features sleek cabinetry, premium appliances, and clean, modern lines, flowing seamlessly into the living and dining areas. Both bedrooms are generously sized, and the two bathrooms are finished with sophisticated materials and high-end detailing. An in-unit Bosch washer and dryer add everyday convenience. Life here extends well beyond your front door. The rooftop offers resort-caliber amenities including a sparkling pool and spa, stylish cabanas, lounging areas with refrigeration and ice service, and a fully equipped fitness center. Residents enjoy 24/7 security, front desk concierge service, and valet parking for two vehicles.  Ownership also comes with significant financial advantage - the Mills Act designation provides substantial property tax savings, often exceeding $10,000 annually, and just moments from Hollywood's most in-demand destinations, including Musso & Frank Grill, W Hollywood, Lemon Grove, Trader Joe's, the Pantages Theatre, and convenient Metro access. Residence #711 is more than a home  it's an opportunity to own within a storied landmark where heritage architecture, thoughtful design, and vibrant city living converge.  All this for an unprecedented value price!

remarks: :: Miramonte Terrace :: Architect Edwin C. Thome :: Proudly beginning life as the first co-op building on the West Coast in 1922, Miramonte Terrace stands as a distinguished example of Renaissance Revival architecture, displaying the grand scale and glamor of the era. Within this storied building, Unit M carries that legacy forward with remarkable fidelity. Fresh off a multi-year restoration by its current owner, the large-scale main-floor unit embraces the original character of its design, with meaningful upgrades for today's living. The moment you step in, you are greeted by restored original hardwood floors, light fixtures, wedding cake plaster moldings, and an original call box that can still be used today. A sun-kissed living room glistens with afternoon natural light, amplified by seven of the beautifully restored original windows with functioning original built-in screens and coved ceilings. A statement piece, original fireplace mantel, highlights the ornate details of the time period.  A formal dining room flows effortlessly between the living room and the recently renovated, colorful kitchen, ideal for entertaining and quiet nights in. New floor-to-ceiling cabinets, stone countertops, and appliances provide a modern living experience that harmoniously blends in with the original architecture.  An added in-unit laundry room completes the kitchen renovations. A full primary en-suite offers both an updated bathroom and a private bedroom with the continued original moldings, floors, and windows.  A separate 2nd bedroom offers the flexibility of both a guest quarters and a home office, along with a 2nd bathroom.  The unit also offers two gated parking spaces (one garage + one driveway). The building community enjoys original working elevators, a rooftop sun room with restored windows, with skyline views, and a gym (currently under renovation).  The self-managed HOA, with monthly dues of $539.50, reflects a commitment to both fiscal stewardship and the ongoing preservation of this architectural landmark. Located in the heart of Koreatown, all the best-known dining and entertainment of the neighborhood are just minutes away.  The Miramonte Terrace offers a place of community and a sense of home, all while located in one of the most vibrant neighborhoods of Los Angeles.

remarks:
The most coveted address in Encino’s Royal Oaks - 15946 Woodvale Road.

Set amongst multi-million dollar estates, this custom-built home offers gorgeous curb appeal featuring new landscaping and hardscaping, and everything inside lives up to that enticing exterior. This is an extraordinary estate with nearly 7,400 square feet of total living space, set on almost an acre, blending the timeless character and architectural details that so many buyers crave with modern luxury amenities they desire. The original builder brought in a craftsman to hand-carve the custom moldings, doors, and staircase.  The home was substantially reimagined by the current owners, updating it to today’s lifestyle — resulting in a residence of rare provenance and soul.
The elegant residence spans over 6,700 square feet, with most living on the main level, featuring four generously proportioned en suite bedrooms, a spacious family room, a formal living room with custom paneling, a large formal dining room, and a guest powder room. The solid maple hardwood floors and custom kitchen with high-end appliances immediately showcase the exceptional quality throughout. This is a home for the ages.
The primary suite boasts an all-marble bathroom with a beautiful picture-frame window overlooking the backyard, custom cabinetry, and a spacious custom-designed walk-in closet. 
Upstairs, an additional en suite bedroom and den open to a balcony deck, along with a hidden safe room that could serve as an office or additional bedroom and includes an en suite bathroom, offering the ultimate in privacy. A fully integrated Crestron smart home system controls security, HVAC, lighting, TVs, and whole-home audio with in-ceiling speakers throughout. The backyard, featuring a covered bluestone patio, outdoor kitchen with a pizza oven and large barbecue, newly replastered sparkling pool, and lush landscaping anchored by a cozy fire pit, feels like a private resort.
The lush hillside leads to a platform with a bocce ball court and serene treetop views. The newly remodeled 688-square-foot guest house — with a living room, en suite bedroom, new flooring, split HVAC, and in-unit laundry — completes this exceptional offering.
Zoned for top-rated Lanai Elementary School and move-in ready with every major system updated, this is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to call this Woodvale estate home.

remarks: Welcome to your own slice of paradise at Desert Princess Country Club! This stunning two-story, 1,461 sq. ft. retreat is the ultimate desert getaway, offering dual primary suites, panoramic west-facing views, and your very own private pool and spa overlooking the fairways and the majestic San Jacinto Mountains.Step inside to discover vaulted ceilings, an open-concept living area, and a natural sense of indoor-outdoor harmony. A striking rock fireplace creates a warm focal point in the living room, while the adjoining dining area opens to a side patio perfect for outdoor grilling and casual gatherings. The kitchen features a breakfast bar overlooking the living space, ideal for morning coffee or entertaining guests.Beyond the living room's sliding doors awaits your private sanctuary, a pool and spa patio set right on Hole 2/11, where manicured greens stretch toward the San Jacinto Mountains. remarks: Welcome to a bright and comfortable 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom home located in one of Koreatown's most dynamic and centrally connected neighborhoods. This thoughtfully laid-out condo offers an easy flow, great natural light, and a private balcony. Inside, the living room feels open and inviting, with soft light and direct access to the balcony. The adjacent dining area and kitchen maintain a seamless layout for everyday living. The kitchen includes a charming passthrough window ideal for serving meals or hosting friends, along with a Frigidaire range, LG refrigerator, and GE dishwasher. The bedroom enjoys the same gentle natural light and includes a generously sized closet. The full bathroom features a modern stand-up shower and sits conveniently off the main living area. Additional highlights include one dedicated parking spot, abundant guest parking, and access to the community pool. The community laundry room is located on the same floor for added convenience. Right outside your door, you're moments from some of LA's most iconic destinations: Ralphs, The Wiltern, the shops and cafes of Larchmont Village, and Koreatown's renowned restaurants and nightlife. It's easygoing city living in a prime, connected location. Don't miss this opportunity to own a well-designed home with natural light, a private balcony, and unbeatable access to the best of Koreatown.

remarks: This Pacific Palisades condominium is located in the Marquez Knolls neighborhood.  The building is currently not inhabitable due to the recent fire event.  It represents a unique opportunity to acquire a unit in a highly desirable area at a substantial discount, well-suited for investors, builders or buyers experienced with HOA-managed restoration and remediation processes.  This residential unit is a one bedroom one bath with a beautiful large patio situated in the front building consisting of 13 units within the 28-unit complex. The front building remains standing and the inside of the unit appears to have no damage. The entire front building was, however, was impacted by the fire and possibly requires extensive evaluation, remediation, and repair. The rear building, which contained 15 units, was destroyed. Currently, the HOA is evaluating options for the future of the complex, which may include various restoration, reconstruction, or redevelopment scenarios (Buyer to independently investigate and verify all HOA matters, including potential plans, insurance, and possible assessments). The list price includes an estimated land value allocation for the unit and a potential long-term opportunity, subject to HOA direction and approvals. Property is being sold as-is. Seller and broker make no representations or warranties regarding the condition of the property, including but not limited to structural integrity, environmental condition, habitability, or feasibility of repair or reconstruction. Buyer is advised to conduct all investigations regarding condition, remediation requirements, structural integrity, environmental impacts, HOA plans, insurance availability, financing, permitting, and costs. Seller will make no repairs, credits, or concessions. This opportunity to acquire this property in Marquez Knolls, is subject to buyer's independent due diligence. (all photos are pre-fire).

remarks: Welcome to Vista Rose, an exclusive gated community in Placentia ideally located near Brea, Yorba Linda, and Anaheim Hills. This brand-new, never-lived-in residence showcases the highly sought-after Lyda floor plan, offering approximately 2,195 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space with 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and a spacious 2-car garage.A dramatic two-story foyer opens to expansive open-concept living spaces filled with natural light, seamlessly connecting the great room, dining area, and luxury outdoor living space for effortless indoor-outdoor entertaining.The designer kitchen is beautifully appointed with a large center island, walk-in pantry, premium six-burner cooktop with designer hood, integrated oven, separate oven and microwave combo, and a built-in 42” refrigerator, all complemented by abundant cabinetry and counter space.The elegant primary suite serves as a private retreat featuring a coffered ceiling, oversized walk-in closet, and spa-inspired bath with dual vanities, soaking tub, luxe walk-in shower, and private water closet. remarks: Set among the quiet, rolling hills of Poway, this beautifully updated single-level residence is ideally positioned on a prominent elevated corner lot and features a brand-new roof. A rich custom wood entry door introduces a bright, open-concept interior where luxury vinyl plank flooring flows seamlessly throughout, creating a cohesive and inviting ambiance. The expansive living room transitions effortlessly into a versatile dining area—perfect for both intimate evenings and lively gatherings—while the spacious kitchen is thoughtfully appointed with stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and abundant cabinetry designed for both function and style. Outdoor living is equally compelling, with a private backyard retreat designed for year-round enjoyment. A sparkling pool with a new pump anchors the space, complemented by shaded pergolas and low-maintenance artificial turf ideal for entertaining or relaxing afternoons. The tranquil primary suite offers a peaceful escape, complete with generous closet space and an ensuite bath featuring travertine flooring and a soaking jacuzzi tub. Two additional bedrooms and a well-appointed guest bath provide comfort and flexibility, while added amenities include air conditioning, solar, dual-pane windows, and a spacious two-car garage. Ideally located just moments from Garden Road Elementary within the acclaimed Poway Unified School District, as well as Garden Road Park, scenic trails, and local shopping and dining, this home offers a refined blend of comfort, convenience, and lifestyle.

remarks: Located behind a private gate on 19.22 acres in San Benancio, this 2,824 sq ft property offers 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms with panoramic canyon views and exceptional privacy. The layout is well proportioned, with generous living spaces designed to take full advantage of the surrounding natural landscape. Large windows frame the canyon views from multiple rooms, bringing the outdoors in while maintaining the feeling of ultimate privacy. Nearly 20 acres of canyon terrain provides significant separation from neighboring properties, making this one of the more private offerings on the market. Gated access, expansive acreage, updated interiors, and unobstructed views combine to make this a rare opportunity in the San Benancio corridor.

remarks: Move in ready, West Lancaster 3 Bed 2 Bath Home! Looking for a fantastic family home? Look no further, with charm, great curb appeal and great floorplan it will be easy to picture your new life here. When you enter the home, you are greeted with crisp natural light from the abundance of windows that adorn the living room. Enhancing the space is a cozy fireplace with a lovely brick surround and high ceilings. From the living room, there is great flow to the kitchen and adjoining space that provides versatility for a dining area and/or a family room, built in glass front storage and an open sightline to the kitchen. The kitchen offers a breakfast bar, ample storage, natural light and direct access to the backyard. Moving back through the living room, you will find the hall to your left that leads to the first bedroom, next the dedicated laundry room, and straight ahead the shared bath and second bedroom. Rounding out the living space is the primary bedroom that boasts two large closets and an ensuite bath. Heading outside, the spacious backyard affords you the opportunity to envision great gatherings and create your very own family oasis. With a great price point and a layout perfect for a growing family, someone looking to downsize or that great fit for someone working from home, this property was meant for you!

remarks: Must See!! Rustic Log cabin + bonus structures in the historic Middleton Tract neighborhood - which sits along Portola Valley Redwoods State Park, Skyline Ridge Open Space & Russian Ridge Open Space Preserves - offer a lucrative investment into a slice of Silicon Valley History. More than just an escape from the city, enjoy incredible wildlife viewing, privacy among towering redwoods & exclusive access to Peter's creek trailhead. The main cabin, built from redwood milled onsite and lovingly restored in 2006, offers 2 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, impressive vaulted ceilings and an open living room with fireplace. Enjoy the 1,100+ sqft tiered deck with a BBQ area taking in redwood views. The kitchen is well equipped with SS appliances, Viking Gas Range, skylights, and plenty of storage. There is also an additional sleeping cottage, separate 2 bedroom sleeping loft with kitchenette, mediation room and school house. Room for RV parking as well. Starlink Internet keeps you connected with reliability thru winter storms. 13 miles to Alice's restaurant,18 miles to Stanford University. Less than 25 miles to Silicon Valley hubs such as Mountain View & Palo Alto. 28 miles to the beach & numerous iconic hiking + biking opportunities out your back door! More photos to come.

Secondary bedrooms, updated baths with floating vanities and glass-walled showers, and a versatile step-down flex space with a glass slider to the backyard create room for a home office, gym, playroom, studio, guest area, or potential fourth bedroom. remarks: Extraordinary Larry Weir Adobe featuring 4 BRs and 4.5 BAs is overflowing with charm and character and is positioned on a magnificent 4.5 acre lot located on Rancho Santa Fe's most coveted street. The impressive 10-foot entry doors open to a beautiful hexagonal living room with rustic beams, a massive fireplace, and huge windows facing the beautiful views. Thick adobe walls, arched windows, Honduran Mahogony doors, and iron accents throughout are a few of the many authentic features. The commanding front courtyard has a pool, BBQ and outdoor fireplace and is positioned to best capture maximum amounts of sunshine.   This is a rare and remarkable opportunity to create an amazing estate property. This peaceful and tranquil parcel is located in the highly desirable westerly portion of the covenant, with fabulous frontage along Las Planideras and a grand-fathered in U-shaped driveway. The westerly portion of the lot slopes down gently and is bordered by the Bridal Trail, while the southern portion of the lot has a lit-up sports court that is not able to be duplicated due to today's building codes in the Covenant.   The property also allows for 2 horses (one can apply for a permit to potentially allow for 2 more), natural gas is in the street and it's on septic.   This is a truly unique property offering endless opportunities in an incredibly desirable location.  Subject to short sale approval by lenders.

remarks: One of Desert Knolls' earliest architectural estates, this 1948 adobe ranch was designed by noted Southern California architect John Byers, whose work helped define early California and Spanish-Revival residential design. Built with 12-inch handmade adobe block and classic Byers detailing, the home carries an authenticity and craftsmanship rarely found today. Signature elements include open-beam ceilings, extensive built-ins, hardwood floors, and a dramatic floor-to-ceiling fireplace constructed from salvaged Tehachapi earthquake brick.The single-level layout spans over 3,000 sq ft with a large great room, formal dining room, breakfast nook, family room with fireplace, and a finished basement with wet bar ideal for hobby, creative, or entertainment use. Updates complement the home's architectural integrity, including refreshed flooring, upgraded kitchen surfaces and appliances, improved paint, and enhanced bath fixtures.Set on a private 1.85-acre lot with mature trees, a detached garage, gated parking, pool and spa, a separate casita with its own bath, and paid-off solar for energy efficiency. A rare chance to own an authentic John Byers adobe estate with land, character, and architectural pedigree.

remarks: Renovated and rebuilt in 2026 by esteemed design/build firm, Nubis Development, this fully reimagined 4 bed, 3.5 bath compound in the heart of Frogtown incorporates natural materials, refined design detail, and functional indoor/outdoor living. The fenced property includes a 3 bed, 2.5 bath main residence and a newly constructed 1 bed, 1 bath ADU, totaling 2,865 square feet of living space, along with two rooftop decks that expand the home's connection to the outdoors. Defined by its soft curves and intentional use of light, the home is punctuated by arched windows and doorways throughout, as well as a series of skylights that create striking architectural moments. Curated landscaping by Natalie Chandler Design complements the home's private, gated approach. Inside the main residence, find engineered oak flooring, limewash walls, and oversized Milgard arched windows and sliding doors that flood the interior with natural light. The living room is anchored by a floor-to-ceiling stone fireplace with concealed bookshelves and beautiful arched windows, while a curved staircase accented by ornate sconces serves as a striking focal point. Just off the foyer, the powder room is drenched in rich cocoa-toned walls with a fluted Calcutta Viola marble sink. The kitchen pairs custom dark-toned cabinetry with light Dolce Vita marble countertops and a large center island finished with a double bull-nosed edge and a built-in paneled dishwasher. Framed by an arched back wall, the kitchen features a full marble backsplash that seamlessly matches the countertops, along with a concealed exhaust vent and pot filler positioned above the THOR 6-burner gas range. Additional THOR appliances include a refrigerator and a built-in microwave discreetly integrated into the pantry cabinetry. Adjacent dining and living spaces open directly to the outdoor areas. Upstairs, a spacious landing illuminated by a circular skylight provides access to the front-facing balcony, the rooftop deck, and a dedicated laundry room. Positioned as its own private wing overlooking the backyard, the primary suite features a walk-in closet and a secluded balcony with trellis detailing. The primary bath is defined by a circular walk-in shower set beneath an overhead skylight with a rain showerhead alongside a freestanding soaking tub framed by a picture window, a large Bianco Gioia marble vanity with dual Phylrich faucets, and limestone flooring throughout. Two additional bedrooms include a middle bedroom with an arched wall niche framing the bed and hanging pendant lights, while the front-facing bedroom opens directly to the balcony through an arched glass door. Serving the secondary bedrooms, the hallway bath incorporates an arched shower entry with a deep soaking tub and overhead skylight, complemented by cobblestone floor tiles and a honed Carrara marble countertop. The sprawling rooftop deck features a built-in BBQ, sink, refrigerator, bar seating, and integrated planter boxes. Below, the backyard is thoughtfully designed with oversized flagstones that form a central seating area between the main residence and ADU. At the rear of the property, the newly built ADU offers flexibility for guests, workspace, or income potential. The one-bedroom residence includes limewash walls, custom cabinetry, LG stainless steel appliances, stacked laundry hookups, and a skylit bathroom. A private rooftop deck and custom-built fountain integrated into the exterior complete the serene guest retreat. Extensively upgraded throughout, the home features all-new systems, including a new foundation, roof, plumbing, ABS sewer line, electrical, HVAC with Nest thermostats, tankless water heaters, and a finished attached two-car garage. Moments from the LA River bike path, Frogtown Brewery, Lingua Franca, Wax Paper, and Just What I Kneaded, the home sits in one of Northeast LA's most creative and fast-evolving neighborhoods, with easy access to Atwater Village, Silver Lake, and Downtown LA.

The primary bath is defined by a circular walk-in shower set beneath an overhead skylight with a rain showerhead alongside a freestanding soaking tub framed by a picture window, a large Bianco Gioia marble vanity with dual Phylrich faucets, and limestone flooring throughout. Two additional bedrooms include a middle bedroom with an arched wall niche framing the bed and hanging pendant lights, while the front-facing bedroom opens directly to the balcony through an arched glass door. Serving the secondary bedrooms, the hallway bath incorporates an arched shower entry with a deep soaking tub and overhead skylight, complemented by cobblestone floor tiles and a honed Carrara marble countertop. The sprawling rooftop deck features a built-in BBQ, sink, refrigerator, bar seating, and integrated planter boxes. Below, the backyard is thoughtfully designed with oversized flagstones that form a central seating area between the main residence and ADU. At the rear of the property, the newly built ADU offers flexibility for guests, workspace, or income potential. The one-bedroom residence includes limewash walls, custom cabinetry, large stainless steel appliances, stacked laundry hookups, and a skylit bathroom. A private rooftop deck and custom-built fountain integrated into the exterior complete the serene guest retreat. Extensively upgraded throughout, the home features all-new systems, including a new foundation, roof, plumbing, ABS sewer line, electrical, HVAC with Nest thermostats, tankless water heaters, and a finished attached two-car garage. Moments from the LA River bike path, Frogtown Brewery, Lingua Franca, Wax Paper, and Just What I Kneaded, the home sits in one of Northeast LA's most creative and fast-evolving neighborhoods, with easy access to Atwater Village, Silver Lake, and Downtown LA.

remarks: Welcome to coastal living in Imperial Beach! This stunning modern two-story home offers the perfect blend of style, comfort, and functionality. Featuring three spacious bedrooms and two and a half baths, this home showcases an open-concept living area filled with natural light, a modern kitchen with granite countertops, and high-end stainless steel appliances including an electric stove, microwave, refrigerator, and dishwasher. The kitchen also includes a spacious walk-in pantry, perfect for extra storage and organization. The versatile downstairs front room can serve as a home office, gym, or meditation space. Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite accommodates a California king bed and offers two closets, a sitting area, dual sinks with generous storage, a soaking tub that retains heat, and a large walk-in shower with skyline views of San Diego. The additional bedrooms provide ample space and share a well-appointed hall bath. Energy efficiency and comfort come together with a whole-house attic fan to help cool the home during the warmer months. Outside, enjoy a private fenced backyard featuring a wooden patio with sitting area and a wrap-around patio for additional storage. The yard also includes mature pomegranate and walnut trees, adding a touch of natural beauty to your outdoor retreat. A two-car garage with driveway and street parking provides plenty of space for vehicles, while the home’s thoughtful layout ensures modern convenience throughout. Ideally located just one mile from the beach, within walking distance to schools, local restaurants, pubs, coffee shops, and The Strand walking and biking path. You’ll also love the proximity to the Bayshore Bikeway, South Bay Bayfront, and easy access to the 5 and 805 freeways—just 10 miles to Coronado. Experience modern coastal living at its finest in this beautiful Imperial Beach home—perfect for families, professionals, or investors seeking comfort, convenience, and long-term value.

remarks: Highly sought after model, this Craftsman 3 home located on a cul-de-sac in Four Seasons Murrieta 55+ community. Boasting 2095 sq.ft. on a 5663 sq.ft. lot with a nicely landscaped rear yard that includes a covered patio.  The tax records show it as 3-bedroom 2 bath home.  One of the bedrooms is set up as an office and does not have a closet.  The front bathroom has granite countertop, single sink and tub/shower enclosure.  The front guest bedroom is open and airy with a large window facing the front yard and partially covered by a custom Canopy.  The large kitchen has ample cabinets, granite countertops, refrigerator, dishwasher, gas stove/oven and microwave.  Also features a large kitchen island that is granite top with cabinets below. The main living area is open and airy and has a gas fireplace.  The formal dining room is large enough to handle all of your entertaining.  The primary bedroom is spacious with dual closets.  Large primary bath with double sinks, separate walk-in shower and large soaking tub.  In addition, there is an indoor laundry room with electric washer and gas dryer hook-ups, luxury vinyl flooring and vertical blinds throughout, Solar System, and a whole house fan for keeping your home cool in the summer and warm in the winter.  Four Seasons is an active 55+ community with a 10-acre facility that includes a large clubhouse which houses a ballroom, commercial kitchen, computer room, library, gym, workout room, sauna, billiard/card room and craft room.  Outside you will find an Olympic size pool, jacuzzi, BBQ/picnic area, tennis courts, pickleball courts, shuffleboard, bocce ball, horseshoes, workout and lovely well landscaped grounds for summer events.  Four Seasons Social Committee sponsors outdoor concerts along with bus trips, in house Comedians, Magicians, New Years Eve Parties and much more.  There are over 40 clubs you can join if you so choose.  The Four Seasons Active 55+ Community is a very friendly and enjoyable place to spend your latter years.

remarks:
If you like privacy and convenience, this contemporary townhome is the perfect spot for you. Built just over 3 years ago and exceptionally well-maintained, this like-new residence offers a modern coastal lifestyle just blocks from the beach, the Greenbelt, Redondo Pier and lots of restaurants. 

The heart of the home is an open-concept living space with wide-plank wood flooring and abundant natural light. The kitchen features top-tier stainless appliances, custom cabinetry, and a sleek island ideal for casual dining and entertaining. Just outside is a large balcony, perfect for relaxed mornings and fresh air. The four spacious bedrooms include a fantastic primary suite with walk-in closet and a bathroom complete with dual vanities, a freestanding soaking tub and an oversized walk-in shower. Secondary bedrooms are generously sized and versatile, ideal for family, guests, a home office, or a gym. The in-home elevator services all levels, adding convenience. 

The home is topped by a fantastic rooftop deck with ocean views; a sink, mini fridge and gas BBQ, making it a great spot for dinner, relaxing and entertaining. An extra-large garage provides ample space for multiple vehicles, storage, and beach gear. A truly versatile home, it's ideal for a family, couple or single person.

remarks: A rare opportunity to own a piece of Los Angeles history, this Spanish Revival residence in Hancock Park was originally designed by noted architect Donald Uhl. Blending timeless 1920s character with modern upgrades, the home has been reimagined to meet today's lifestyle while honoring its architectural roots. Step through the arched entryway and be greeted by original tile floors and a sweeping wrought-iron staircase, setting the tone for the craftsmanship found throughout. Natural light fills the formal dining room, which opens to a private courtyard featuring an outdoor fireplace and fountain, perfect for intimate gatherings. The gourmet kitchen is equipped with top-tier Miele appliances, including a wine fridge, steam combi oven, and built-in coffee system, making it both functional and stylish. A versatile den or office sits just off the entry, offering flexibility for work or relaxation. Upstairs, three spacious ensuite bedrooms provide comfort and privacy. The primary suite includes access to a private balcony, extending the living space outdoors. The grounds are beautifully landscaped with mature plantings, including camellias, coral trees, palms, and roses, all enhanced by thoughtfully designed exterior lighting. With a full home sound system, Wi-Fi integration, security, and CCTV, this residence seamlessly merges historic charm with the conveniences of contemporary living.

remarks: Introducing 1850 Industrial Street, Unit 211, an exquisitely re-imagined urban haven nestled in the vibrant Downtown LA Art's District. This expansive loft has undergone a top-tier renovation that transcends mere aesthetics. With all-new electrical, including a new sub-panel and Lutron smart switches, upgraded copper plumbing, and a high-performance HVAC system, no detail has been overlooked in ensuring a seamless blend of modern luxury and historical charm. This corner unit condo offers 1 bedroom, 2 bathrooms, a sprawling 456sf private patio, and an impressive 1780 square feet of living space. The chef's kitchen is a culinary masterpiece, featuring a full line of Miele appliances (warming drawer, coffee station, Combi deep fryer/boiler, fridge, stove, hood and more), Aran Cucine cabinets, and a stunning Quartzite two-tiered kitchen island. The marriage of Mills Act qualifying features, such as double-hung windows and original maple floors, with the contemporary allure of the kitchen and bathrooms creates an unparalleled ambiance. Every indulgence has been considered to elevate this space to the status of a 'Super Loft.' From a full laundry area with high-capacity Miele appliances to radiant flooring in both bathrooms, dual floating Duravit bidets, and a luxurious BainUltra acrylic bathtub, convenience and luxury converge seamlessly. The Biscuit Lofts, a National Registered Landmark and former Nabisco west coast bakery, offers an array of upscale amenities, including a full-time concierge, elevator access, assigned parking, private storage units, a gym, and a sprawling ground-floor lap pool, establishing it as the premier address in the Art's District. Do not miss the chance to claim this urban sanctuary as your own. Embrace the pinnacle of contemporary living at 1850 Industrial Street, Unit 211.

remarks: A rare combination of single-story living, fresh updates, and true backyard privacy, 744 Vasconcellos Ave stands out from the rest. This 4-bedroom, 2-bath home offers the space, functional layout, and move-in ready feel today’s buyers are looking for, all set against a peaceful orchard backdrop with no rear neighbors.  Freshly updated with brand-new flooring, new interior paint, and modern light fixtures, the home feels clean, bright, and ready for its next owner. The layout is one of its biggest strengths, with separate living, dining, and family rooms that provide flexibility for everyday living, entertaining, working from home, or creating additional family space.  The kitchen features an island, abundant cabinetry, generous pantry storage, and opens to the family room with a gas fireplace. The primary suite offers direct backyard access, creating a private retreat feel and an easy connection to the outdoor space.  The backyard is the true standout. With no rear neighbors, a peaceful orchard backdrop, and various fruit trees, this setting offers a level of privacy and calm that is hard to find. remarks:
Welcome to Lake Village living at its finest. Nestled within one of Temecula's best-kept secrets, this beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom home offers the perfect blend of comfort, privacy, and outdoor living in a private lake community just minutes from Wine Country and within walking distance to Old Town Temecula and the Temecula Public Library.

Freshly painted throughout in June 2026 and featuring brand-new luxury vinyl plank flooring and carpet installed in February 2026, this spacious two-story home showcases soaring ceilings, a functional floor plan, and warm, inviting living spaces. Real hardwood flooring highlights the family room, while two fireplaces add charm and character. The kitchen features rich cherry cabinetry, granite countertops, abundant storage, and a seamless flow into the main living areas.

The remodeled primary bathroom features premium Hansgrohe fixtures and a TOTO bidet toilet, while the downstairs bathroom has been beautifully updated with a lifetime warranty shower.

Step outside and discover what truly makes this property special. Situated on a large, flat lot, the backyard feels like a private retreat surrounded by mature elm trees that provide exceptional privacy. A newer oversized concrete patio with an Alumawood cover and ceiling fans creates the perfect setting for outdoor dining and entertaining. The newly built grill pad, raised-bed garden with irrigation connection, powered storage shed, additional garden shed, and established landscaping create endless possibilities for outdoor living.

The property is also home to an incredible collection of fruit-producing trees including olive, pomegranate, lime, lemon, nectarine, fig, two tangelo trees, and a mature Chardonnay grapevine.

Additional improvements include a newly rebuilt chimney, new concrete driveway extension, and extensive recent upgrades that make this home truly move-in ready.

Lake Village residents enjoy access to Temecula's only private lake community, featuring walking trails, a renovated clubhouse, swimming pool, tennis courts, basketball court, playgrounds, picnic areas, boat launch, and dock. A nearby trail and staircase provide quick access to the lake and community amenities. The lake and surrounding open space are recognized as a Certified Wildlife Habitat and host community events throughout the year.

remarks: This historic Victorian with mixed-use zoning in the heart of downtown Ojai presents a rare opportunity to own one of the valley's most celebrated architectural landmarks. Steps from the Ojai Farmers Market and the town's vibrant center, the property offers exceptional versatility.  Lovingly restored, the building features soaring ceilings, intricate period craftsmanship, and beautifully updated original wood windows that fill the interiors with natural light. The iconic wraparound porch evokes a bygone era & fresh possibilities.  And extensive improvements ensure the property is ready for its next chapter, including a fully reinforced foundation, a newly installed roof, and handcrafted copper gutters.The versatile layout includes multiple spacious rooms across two levels along with four beautifully appointed bathrooms and a private suite on the lower level, creating a flexible environment that can accommodate a variety of uses. Some windows frame sweeping views of the Topa Topa Mountains and Ojai's famed Pink Moment.Once home to a renowned art gallery, the property's mixed-use zoning allows for a wide range of possibilities while it also lives beautifully as a private residence. Located in the heart of Ojai's vibrant downtown, this landmark property offers a rare opportunity to own a distinctive piece of the valley's history.

remarks: Reimagined Mid-Century Perfection Next to Demuth Park!  Welcome to a masterpiece of modern reconstruction. Meticulously taken down to the studs and rebuilt by the owners for personal use, this turnkey Mid-Century home delivers a level of structural integrity and premium craftsmanship rarely seen on the market. Every major component is brand new: framing, insulation, drywall, a full roof, plumbing, a 200-amp electrical panel, and energy-efficient HVAC and ductwork. High-efficiency windows paired with a Tesla solar system guarantee long-term sustainability and minimal utility costs. With zero deferred maintenance, this is a true "no-project" sanctuary.Inside, dramatic high ceilings elevate the open-concept layout, flooding the space with natural light and honoring classic Mid-Century design. The highly versatile floor plan features two primary suites, including one with a private exterior entranceperfect for an inspiring home office, multigenerational living, or a premium guest retreat. Step outside to your private, fully fenced desert oasis, where a pristine lap pool and hot tub are framed by breathtaking, unobstructed mountain views.For savvy buyers and investors, this property represents a phenomenal asset. Located in a Palm Springs neighborhood currently sitting under the city's 20% short-term rental permit cap, it offers a rare, immediate window to secure a new STR permit (buyer to verify). Backed by strong local demand, properties of this caliber project a gross annual income exceeding $100,000.  Positioned just minutes from downtown Palm Springs, world-class golf, and PSP International Airport, you also get a front-row seat to the multi-million-dollar revitalization of Demuth Park. Enjoy unprecedented access to 24 brand-new pickleball courts, dedicated dog parks, and beautifully restored walking pathways right in your backyard.  Complete with a converted garage space and a sprawling lot with ample room to build a custom garage in the future, this property effortlessly combines historic architectural soul with the peace of mind of brand-new construction.

remarks: Set behind double gates in one of the most coveted pockets of Beverly Hills - North of Sunset, just behind the iconic Beverly Hills Hotel - this extraordinary estate offers both pedigree and privacy on a rare, nearly one-acre parcel. Designed by Paul R. Williams for Mrs. John Landis, the Colonial Revival home reflects his signature elegance, blending classic proportions with a warm, livable layout that opens effortlessly to the gardens. Flooded with natural light, the interiors feel open and airy, with French doors and expansive windows framing views of brick walkways, a lozenge-shaped pool, and an elegant cabana complete with bath, kitchen, and built-in BBQ. A grand marble entry hints at the refined detailing throughout. Lush gardens, mature trees, and a picturesque gazebo create a series of intimate moments across the estate, offering a sense of escape that feels worlds away. From the wood-paneled dining room with curved bay windows to the inviting breakfast room, every space reflects timeless craftsmanship. In addition to the main residence, the property includes a charming separate guest suite along with two staff rooms - ideal for visitors, a private office, or support staff. A true estate in every sense - majestic yet inviting, private yet perfectly situated - tucked away just moments from the finest restaurants, shops, and cultural landmarks of Beverly Hills, yet offering the serenity of a world apart.

remarks: Tucked into the highly desirable Stonehedge community, this beautifully updated Ventura home offers the kind of comfort and warmth that instantly feels like home. Located on a quiet cul-de-sac, 960 Emerald Court features thoughtfully remodeled interiors including an updated kitchen, bathrooms, and newer flooring throughout -- blending modern finishes with a welcoming, relaxed atmosphere.The functional single-level layout is filled with natural light and designed for easy everyday living. Spacious living areas, a cozy fireplace, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow create spaces that feel equally suited for quiet mornings at home or gathering with family and friends. The updated kitchen opens naturally to the dining area, making the heart of the home feel connected, open, and inviting.Step outside to a private backyard designed for enjoying Ventura's year-round coastal climate -- whether it's morning coffee, weekend barbecues, or winding down at the end of the day. Located near parks, schools, shopping, dining, and convenient freeway access, the home offers a lifestyle that balances comfort, convenience, and community.Homes in Stonehedge are loved for a reason, and opportunities like this rarely come available -- especially when they've been cared for and updated with such pride.The Stonehedge community is one of East Ventura's most established and sought-after neighborhoods, known for its quiet residential streets, pride of ownership, and convenient central location. Residents love the neighborhood for its well-maintained homes, mature landscaping, and peaceful cul-de-sac streets that create a true sense of community and everyday comfort.Stonehedge offers easy access to parks, highly regarded schools, shopping centers, restaurants, and major commuter routes while still feeling tucked away from the busier parts of town. Its location provides a convenient connection to both Ventura's beaches and neighboring communities, making it ideal for those seeking a balance between coastal lifestyle and practical day-to-day living.The neighborhood is especially popular with buyers looking for established Ventura living with larger homes, functional floor plans, and a more relaxed residential atmosphere. With limited turnover and strong long-term ownership, homes in Stonehedge rarely come available and continue to be highly desirable within the Ventura market.

remarks: Welcome to 81735 Baffin Ave. in The Madison Club, where the iconic glamour of vintage Palm Springs meets the height of modern luxury. Conceived by Madison's premier developer Gala Asher and interior designer Niki Glass, this 6-bedroom estate is a masterful homage to the desert's stylish past. The design narrative unfolds with terrazzo floors, retro fun interiors, and architectural 50s breeze blocks, all meshed with today's most advanced technology. Sited for absolute privacy, the home captures breathtaking, uninterrupted views of the southern mountain ridges and the Tom Fazio-designed Par-5 fairway, with no other homes in sight. The outdoor experience centers around a stunning oval pool, a nod to glamorous days gone by. The home, boasting approximately 9,696 SF under roof (approximately 7,012 SF air-conditioned), includes a private cinema, a dedicated office, two separate guest casitas, and a "grown-up's Coachella" bunk room designed for festival weekends and entertaining, bringing the total bed count to 9. While the soul is retro, the function is all today. Motorized disappearing pocket doors merge indoor and outdoor living, and a full suite of cutting-edge home automation, appliances, and sound system ensures effortless comfort. This is the next generation of Madison Club living. Seller financing available.

remarks: An internationally well known architect has designed this modern "holiday temple", taking full advantage of a rare land plot. Built on a west facing peninsula of around 14.000sqm, the villa is located in the wider area of Porto Heli in Argolida, neighboring some of the most prestige Greek villas & estates. The main house offers 5 double bedrooms, with an additional 2 guest houses. A total of 14 guests can be accommodated at the villa, enjoying high levels of comfort, while being discreetly looked after by a permanent staff of 2. Yacht & boat mooring with associated services is available in the area.In summary, White House is the ideal Mediterranean retreat for your summer vacation. A breathtaking open plan living space is elevated to create the prime public space overlooking the swimming pool and the sea. Glass sliding panels separate the internal from the external areas creating a unified space, enjoying 180 degrees of unobstructed sea views and the magnificent sunset. A series of external shaded sitting areas, a salted water infinity pool, a grassed garden, bbq, a private tennis court and the magnificent beach next to the villa, create a luxury exclusive retreat for guests that pursue relaxation in a private environment. Accommodation: Main House: The ground level consists of an entrance hall, a fully equipped kitchen, guest WC, open plan living area with fireplace and dining area with large windows that open up to the garden and finally one master bedroom with large en-suite shower and bathtub bathroom, that opens up to shaded terrace. The lower level consists of onemasterbedroom with en-suite shower and bathtub bathroom, with garden view. One double bedroom with en-suite shower bathroom and a small living area, also with garden view. Two double bedrooms with en-suite shower bathrooms, that are ideal for teenagers or staff accommodation. There is also an auxiliary kitchen on this level. Guest House 1: An independent guest house with one double bedroom with shower bathroom and living area as well as a small kitchenette, that opens up to garden. Guesthouse 2: An independent guest house with one double bedroom with shower bathroom and separate living area and kitchenette, that opens up to shaded terrace.

remarks:

This custom, furnished RIVERFRONT estate features TWO stunning homes on a 1+ acre parcel complete with a private launch ramp, boat dock, and sandy beach—the ultimate retreat for family, friends, or exceptional rental potential.

remarks: A hidden gem at the end of the road in the heart of Topanga Canyon's most sought-after Fernwood neighborhood, known for its ideal coastal weather, and set on a lush acre of land abutting parkland, this one-of-a-kind three-unit compound offers a rare blend of privacy, natural beauty, and creative, soulful living. Surrounded by canyon views and mature landscaping, the property unfolds as a peaceful oasis where each of the three independent residences has been thoughtfully designed to feel both connected and distinctly its own. Meandering paths, layered outdoor spaces, and quiet corners invite moments of reflection, gathering, and inspiration. Each unit features its own entrance and unique character, with warm, eclectic finishes, abundant natural light, and a relaxed indoor-outdoor flow. The spaces are both functional and inviting, ideal for extended stays, hosting guests, or simply enjoying the rhythm of canyon life. The newly renovated main house features two bedrooms, plus a flex space and an office/den, along with three gorgeously renovated baths, a dining patio overlooking the canyon, and a private gym with Peloton, Tempo, sauna and cold plunge. The primary suite is drenched in natural light, with double doors opening to the lawn and pergola with outdoor seating, and includes a spacious walk-in closet and a state-of-the-art gorgeous bath with soaking tub and double shower. The Bungalow, a separate guest house with its own secluded outdoor space, offers one bedroom, one bath, and a full kitchen. The Pool House Oasis, set on a separate parcel, is a world of its own, a tiny house set within a lush canyon landscape, complete with an infinity pool and surrounded by ancient oaks and meandering paths leading to secluded, boulder-clad hideaways. A large teepee provides an ideal setting for sound baths or group sessions, while a Flow Hive beehive nestled among a cactus garden, along with a fallen oak turned jungle gym, adds to the whimsy of this magical compound. The property also includes a self-contained Healing Room, thoughtfully set up for bodywork, reiki, and energy practices. Just the Pool House Oasis and The Bungalow alone produce over 120K per year, allowing for a wonderful opportunity to live in the main house and make money on the rest. The property's elevated position captures expansive views and unmatched privacy, creating a true sense of retreat while remaining remarkably close to everything. Just minutes away, you'll find scenic trails within the Santa Monica Mountains Conservancy, Topanga State Park, and Tuna Canyon. The vibrant shops and cafes of Topanga Town Center, along with the iconic beaches of Malibu, are all within a short drive. Whether envisioned as a multi-generational sanctuary, a healing retreat, or a flexible live-and-rent opportunity, the compound offers rare versatility, balancing peaceful seclusion with ample parking and accessibility to some of Southern California's most sought-after destinations.A truly special property where nature, creativity, and possibility come together. Stated square footage does not include Pool House, Healing room or gym.
