remarks: Take in the Eichler elegance in this wonderful home. This Greenridge Eichler has been lovingly cared for and cherished by one family since 1977. The moment you walk through the door, it feels warm and inviting.   The sought-after open-air atrium fills the surrounding rooms with light. The living room with high ceilings and a fireplace are surrounded by floor-to-ceiling glass looking out to the private backyard and serene views of the hills. This is what it is to have a home "bring the outside in."   The front and back yards are low-maintenance. The backyard was redone in 2025, with a new patio and artificial grass. Enjoy the beauty of greenery without the expense and water waste, yet there is still plenty of space for flowers and a garden on the side yard upslope or in raised beds.   Inside you'll find 4 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, a formal living room and dining room, an open kitchen with a breakfast nook, a family room that opens to the wonderful open-air atrium, and a converted garage with a very fun history. This home had previously been owned by a large family with seven children. That family converted the garage into a playroom and sleeping space. The original bunk beds and pullout ladder still remain. When the current owners bought the property in 1977, they kept this space as a playroom and music room for their children. This bonus area offers numerous options: a home office, continuing the playroom tradition, an extra family room or home theater, returning it to a garage, etc. Some may even consider a Junior ADU conversion, with its own separate entrance and yard space; that could be ideal.   This gorgeous mid-century modern home is a lovely, peaceful place to unwind, and also the perfect place for entertaining. It has so much to offer. It boasts an open-concept floor plan and many tasteful updates. This is a very special home. Come and experience it for yourself. Open Houses Saturday June 20th, 1:00 - 4:00 pm.

remarks: Exceptional Build-to-Suit Opportunity in the heart of Prestigious Fryman Estates. The property is being offered with approved plans; immediately move forward with the development of your custom dream home.                                                                                                                                                                                          The home can be fully customized, providing the flexibility to tailor every aspect of the residence from architecture to finishes, amenities, and lifestyle features. One of the last remaining opportunities to build a fully customized estate on a premier flat lot in Fryman Estates an irreplaceable offering where prestige, privacy, and limitless potential come together.

remarks: An extraordinary opportunity to acquire one of the most coveted land offerings in the Beverly Hills Flats, ideally positioned on the iconic 600 block of North Beverly Drive. This rare corner lot presents a premier opportunity for those looking to build a custom modern estate in one of the most prestigious and sought-after neighborhoods in the world. Inventory for prime land in the Flats is exceptionally limited, making this one of the most compelling development opportunities currently available in Beverly Hills. Included in the offering are ready-to-issue (RTI) approved plans for an approximately 16,000-square-foot ultra-luxury contemporary residence designed by Roman James Design Build, a premier architectural and construction firm known for delivering world-class custom estates. The proposed seven-bedroom home showcases seamless indoor-outdoor California living with a sophisticated resort-style aesthetic. Expansive formal living and dining rooms are wrapped in walls of glass, allowing natural light to flood the interiors while highlighting striking architectural lines. Pocketing glass doors create effortless flow between interior and exterior spaces, ideal for elevated entertaining and everyday living.The planned amenities include a zero-edge swimming pool and spa, outdoor kitchen and BBQ area, multiple fire features, and curated lounge spaces designed to evoke a private five-star retreat. Interior highlights feature a statement custom bar with temperature-controlled wine cellar, boutique-inspired designer closets, and an exceptional six-car garage with a vehicle turntable. The lower level is designed to include a luxury theater, a private gym, and a sauna, offering both comfort and functionality at the highest level. The A+ location places you just moments from world-class dining on Canon Drive, legendary shopping along Rodeo Drive, and the timeless elegance of The Beverly Hills Hotel. Set within the highly desirable Beverly Hills Flats, known for its wide, tree-lined streets and exceptional walkability, this property offers a rare canvas for building a modern architectural masterpiece in the heart of Beverly Hills.

remarks: This elegant Mediterranean-style villa offers over 4,000 sqft of living space on a generous 8,000+ sqft lot in the prestigious community of Coto de Caza. Thoughtfully designed inside and out, the home blends timeless elegance with modern comfort—perfect for both family living and entertaining. The home features 4 spacious bedrooms and 4.5 bathrooms, with each bedroom designed as a private suite with its own en-suite bathroom. A convenient downstairs guest suite is ideal for visitors or multigenerational living. The main level also includes a dedicated study and half-bath, while upstairs three additional suites each enjoy private balconies and abundant natural light. A striking slanted glass front door welcomes you into a grand foyer with natural limestone flooring. The elegant wrought-iron spiral staircase adds architectural charm, while the living room opens through French doors to a private courtyard with a Roman-style fountain, creating a serene and inviting atmosphere. The open-concept living and dining areas are highlighted by cathedral-inspired chandeliers and connect seamlessly to the gourmet kitchen. The kitchen features custom antiqued cabinetry, granite countertops, high-end appliances, and a wine fridge, making it ideal for both everyday cooking and entertaining. The beautifully landscaped backyard features a Roman-style pool, waterfall, spa, BBQ area, grill, fire pit, and scenic golf course views—perfect for relaxing or hosting unforgettable gatherings. remarks: Updated Single-Level Living in Golden Sun EstatesSet on a corner lot behind the gates of Golden Sun Estates, this 3-bedroom, 2-bath home offers 1,363 square feet of open, single-level living that has been thoughtfully refreshed. New laminate flooring runs through the main living areas and bedrooms, new windows bring in clean natural light, the appliances are new, and the HVAC system is newer, so the major systems are handled and the home is ready from day one.The layout flows without interruption from the front entry through the living room, dining area, and kitchen, with tall ceilings and display ledges that keep the rooms feeling airy. The living room sits under a vaulted ceiling and opens to a large slider and picture window, carrying light through the space all day. The adjacent dining area shares that same connection to the outdoors, with a second slider to the covered patio.The kitchen is functional and full of character, with sage cabinetry, granite tile counters, new stainless steel appliances, and a garden window over the sink. A built-in coffee and beverage nook and a breakfast bar with seating round out a layout that works as well for quiet mornings as it does for hosting.The three bedrooms are positioned for privacy, with one offering mountain and palm views through the front window. The primary bath features a dual-sink vanity and a separate walk-in shower, with a second full bath serving the additional rooms.Outside, an alumawood-covered patio extends the living space into a shaded, private retreat with room for lounge seating, dining, and a grill. Mature landscaping wraps the corner lot and adds a layer of seclusion.Golden Sun Estates is a gated community with a low monthly HOA of $180, a central greenbelt, a community pool and spa, a tennis court, and open lawns framed by the Santa Rosa and San Jacinto mountains. The location puts you minutes from shopping, dining, and golf across Palm Desert and the surrounding valley.With the updates already done and the systems in good shape, this one lives well as a lock-and-leave. For second-home owners and those splitting time with the desert, the mix of low upkeep, a secure gated entry, and a modest HOA is the part that is hard to replicate, and it is what keeps homes like this in demand season after season

remarks: Welcome to 69 Seven Oaks, where comfort, character, and the beauty of nature come together to create a truly inviting mountain escape. Tucked away in a peaceful setting above the Santa Ana River, this charming cabin offers a sense of calm the moment you arrive, surrounded by towering pines, fresh mountain air, and the quiet sounds of nature.  Situated on U.S Forest Service land, Recreational use cabin with a Special Use Permit, and certain restrictions may apply. This is a unique opportunity to enjoy a special mountain setting. Step inside and feel instantly at home in the cozy living room, with a sofa queen couch bed, original hardwood floors and a wood-burning river rock fireplace create the perfect place to unwind after a day outdoors. Tongue-and-groove wood ceilings and walls add warmth and rustic charm, while a ceiling fan provides comfort year-round. Just beyond, the kitchen features stylish countertops, a refrigerator, and its own ceiling fan offering a functional space to prepare meals and gather. The thoughtfully designed bathroom includes a convenient split layout, and upstairs, the spacious loft-style bedroom offers flexibility for sleeping arrangements, one side offers two twin beds. This cabin sleeps 6 comfortably. Recent upgrades, including updated electrical and two interior propane wall heaters, enhance both comfort and efficiency. An access road leads to the back side of the cabin, providing additional parking for added convenience. Backed by the breathtaking San Gorgonio Mountains, the property offers scenic views and a tranquil backdrop that changes beautifully with the seasons. Enjoy nearby access to hiking trails, fishing spots, and endless outdoor recreation. When adventure calls, Big Bear Lake, Bear Mountain, and Snow Summit are all within approximately an hour, offering year-round activities. Whether you're looking for a peaceful place to disconnect or a cozy basecamp for outdoor adventures, 69 Seven Oaks captures the essence of mountain living. Special note: This unique cabin is for Recreational use and is cash only.

remarks: There are properties that simply check boxes, and then there are properties that change the way you imagine your life. 2166 Barksdale Road is the latter. Tucked within the sun-drenched agricultural heart of Fillmore, California, this extraordinary single-story ranch estate sits on a sprawling 9.11-acre corner lot and offers a lifestyle that is equal parts working ranch, luxury residence, and personal sanctuary. With nearly 6 acres of mature, producing orange trees, a fully renovated interior loaded with high-end finishes, world-class equestrian facilities, and an outdoor entertaining space that rivals any resort, this is a rare opportunity that simply does not come along often in Ventura County.From the moment you approach the property, you understand that something special awaits. A brand-new gated driveway entry sets the tone immediately -- this is a place that values privacy, prestige, and intention. The tree-lined approach frames the home beautifully against the backdrop of the citrus grove, creating that unmistakable feeling of arriving somewhere meaningful. Whether you're returning home after a long day or welcoming guests for the first time, the arrival experience at 2166 Barksdale is nothing short of cinematic.Positioned on a prime corner lot, this home commands attention from every angle. Fresh stucco paint in warm, inviting earth tones gives the exterior a clean, contemporary ranch aesthetic that feels both timeless and newly refreshed. A newer roof and brand-new windows throughout ensure that the home not only looks beautiful but is structurally sound and energy-efficient for years to come. The welcoming front porch invites you to slow down -- to sit, breathe, and take in the sweeping grove views that surround the property on all sides.For those with practical needs to match their lifestyle, this property delivers on every level. A spacious three-car garage offers abundant covered parking, while the additional covered RV parking area ensures there is room for every vehicle, toy, trailer, or piece of ranch equipment you bring to the property. Whether you're running a working ranch operation, hosting weekend guests, or simply need the space that a full ranch lifestyle demands, the infrastructure here is ready and waiting.

This 5,136 square foot residence with a private courtyard has been completely remodeled to include some of the following; Control 4 Home Automation System (controlling the lighting, audio & visual, shades, pool & spa functions, HVAC systems, etc), newer pool systems added, newer high end appliances, custom White Oak engineered flooring, Marble countertops, new roof currently under construction, and the upgrade list continues. The Club Village includes Clubhouse; Lakehouse for casual dining; Fitness Center with exercise rooms, extensive cardio equipment, Jr. Olympic size pool, Tennis and Pickleball; and Golf Shop.

remarks:
USDA eligible - qualify for 0% down financing for eligible buyers! 

Welcome to your modern desert retreat in Pinon Hills. This brand-new, energy-efficient 4-bedroom, 3-bath home offers 2,100 sq. ft. of contemporary living on a fully fenced 1.87-acre parcel with flat, usable land. Located on Rosado Road—less than 300 feet from paved Duncan Road—this home combines peaceful rural living with easy access to Highway 138, Snowline School District, local shopping, and Wrightwood mountain recreation.

Inside, the open-concept layout showcases a clean, modern palette with contrasting dark trim, luxury vinyl plank flooring, and plush bedroom carpeting. The chef’s kitchen features gray cabinetry, soft-close drawers, custom quartz counters, and coordinated finishes carried through the bathrooms, hallway, and laundry room.

The primary suite includes a spa-inspired bathroom with a custom tile shower and a walk-in closet with built-in shelving and a dedicated shoe rack. Energy-efficient upgrades include dual-pane windows and sliders, a 5-ton HVAC system, solar panels, full Title 24 compliance, and radiant barrier roof insulation.

An oversized 3-car garage with extra depth provides room for trucks, toys, or a workshop. The expansive lot offers plenty of space for RV parking, horses, or future additions. Additional features include a covered front porch, barn-style interior doors, and modern designer finishes throughout.

This is new-construction acreage living at its best—privacy, views, and convenience all in one of the High Desert’s most desirable areas.

remarks:
Welcome to 31960 Chagall Way in the heart of Yucaipa — a stunning newer-built Craftsman-style home offering nearly 2,500 sq. ft. of beautifully designed living space with 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and an exceptional floor plan that checks all the boxes! Built just over a year ago and priced under $650,000, this is an incredible opportunity to own a nearly new, highly upgraded home in one of Yucaipa’s most desirable communities.

From the moment you arrive, you’ll appreciate the gorgeous Craftsman-style exterior and spacious covered front porch — the perfect place to relax and enjoy the neighborhood views. Step inside to a light, bright, and open-concept layout featuring tall ceilings and a spacious living room that flows seamlessly into the dining area and gorgeous chef-inspired kitchen. The kitchen is absolutely stunning with shaker-style cabinetry, quartz countertops, a large center island with seating, pantry cabinets, built-in desk area with shelving, oversized stainless steel sink, subway tile backsplash, and stainless steel appliances — all designed perfectly for entertaining and everyday living.

One of the home’s biggest advantages is the highly desirable downstairs bedroom and ¾ bathroom, ideal for guests, multi-generational living, or a home office setup. Upstairs features three spacious guest bedrooms along with the expansive primary suite complete with a large walk-in closet and well-appointed primary bathroom. Upstairs also features a spacious laundry room complete with additional storage cabinetry and utility sink for added convenience and functionality.

Additional upgrades and features include a fully paid solar system, tankless water heater, finished drywall garage, automatic sprinkler systems, vinyl fencing, artificial turf, spacious concrete patio, and a low-maintenance backyard ready for entertaining or relaxing.

The beautifully maintained HOA offers wonderful community amenities including a barbecue area, picnic area, playground, professional management, and even maintenance of the front yard landscaping — helping keep the neighborhood looking pristine year-round.

With gorgeous curb appeal, modern upgrades throughout, energy-efficient features, and the feel of a model home without the wait of new construction, this home is truly a must-see!

**Be sure to scroll down under features and checkout the video & 3D tour!**

remarks:
Welcome to life in Menifee Lakes, where everyday living feels a little more like a getaway. Located in the desirable Andalusia community, this beautifully maintained single-story home offers 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a setting that’s hard to beat, backing directly to the golf course with open views and no rear neighbors.
Step inside to find a clean, modern interior with waterproof laminate flooring throughout, no carpet anywhere, creating a seamless, low-maintenance living space. The home is filled with natural light thanks to updated windows and doors (2019) and skylights in the main living area, while thoughtful upgrades like a newer north-facing roof, 14 solar panels with battery, and a 2 car garage with built in cabinetry to add both efficiency and functionality. The front and backyard are designed for easy living and entertaining, featuring low-maintenance turf, a charming front patio, and plenty of space to host, relax, or enjoy the indoor-outdoor lifestyle.
Beyond the home itself is where this property truly shines. Menifee Lakes is known for its lifestyle! Offering over 2 miles of scenic walking paths around the lake, perfect for morning strolls, evening unwinds, or weekend outings with the family. Residents also enjoy access to two community pools, including a resort-style beach club complete with private cabanas and a water slide, plus a second pool for a more relaxed atmosphere.
Whether you’re a golfer, a family, or simply someone who values views and community amenities, this home checks all the boxes. Conveniently located near shopping, parks, top-rated schools, and easy access to the 215 freeway, you get the perfect balance of comfort and convenience.
This isn’t just a home, it’s a lifestyle you’ll love coming back to.

remarks: Some homes offer square footage. This one offers a way of life.Set within the sought after Four Seasons at Terra Lago, this 3 bed, 3 bath + den retreat spans 2,411 sq ft and was designed with intention at every turn. Dual en-suite guest rooms offer privacy and comfort, while the flexible den invites whatever suits your season of life. A personal favorite feature: the laundry room connects directly to the primary bedroom walk-in closet, a small detail that makes everyday living feel effortlessly luxurious.Outside, a private saltwater Spool that is heated, chilled, and fitted with therapeutic jets and a serene water feature, anchors a backyard built for pure relaxation. The north facing orientation is a prized desert advantage: natural shade, cooler temperatures, and energy savings that make summer living a pleasure rather than a chore.The community matches the home in every way. At its center stands The Lodge, an expansive 22,000 sq ft clubhouse with a state of the art fitness center, indoor lap pool, aerobics and yoga studio, arts and crafts studio, full service beauty salon with massage room, library lounge, game room, billiards lounge, and bistro.Step outside and the resort experience continues with a pool and spa, patio, fire pit, tennis and pickleball courts, bocce ball, horseshoes, and basketball. Two championship 18-hole courses at the Golf Club at Terra Lago are right next door and Beyond the gates, the Coachella Valley delivers in every direction. Just minutes away, Fantasy Springs Resort Casino offers live concerts, dining, bowling, and gaming and the surrounding mountains and canyons are laced with hiking and biking trails for those who love the outdoors. Easy freeway access puts you just minutes from the shopping and dining of Palm Desert, the energy of Acrisure Arena, and the iconic charm of downtown Palm Springs. Whether you're browsing the galleries of El Paseo, catching a world-class show, or simply enjoying a quiet dinner close to home, everything you need is within easy reach. This is 55+ living, beautifully redefined.

remarks: Welcome to 12463 Redbud Road in Desert Hot Springs, California. This custom-built residence offers exceptional upgrades, thoughtful design, and stunning mountain views throughout. Privately situated behind wrought iron gates and brick fencing, the property features a three-car garage, smooth Santa Barbara-style white stucco exterior, and a red tile roof that creates impressive curb appeal. The home opens to expansive stamped concrete patio areas and artificial turf leading through to oversized double doors, blending indoor and outdoor living seamlessly. Inside, soaring ceilings and timeless travertine tile flooring create an elegant atmosphere throughout the main living spaces. The spacious living room is highlighted by a stacked stone fireplace, oversized picture windows framing the surrounding mountain views, and an open-concept layout ideal for entertaining. The kitchen features custom cabinetry, granite tile countertops, commercial-style six-burner cooktop with vent hood, built-in oven and microwave, wine refrigerator, commercial-grade dishwasher, and a built-in refrigerator. A separate laundry room includes a utility sink, additional double oven, and stackable washer and dryer hookups. The bedrooms feature wood laminate flooring, coffered ceilings, ceiling fans, and mirrored closet doors. The guest bathroom offers a travertine-surround tub and custom vessel sink. The spacious primary suite includes recessed LED lighting within the coffered ceiling, built-in surround sound, private access to the backyard greenbelt area, and an ensuite bathroom with dual sinks, a custom tiled walk-in shower, deep soaking tub, private water closet, and large walk-in closet. The backyard is designed for both relaxation and entertaining, featuring extensive flatwork with stone accents, artificial turf, mature bougainvillea-lined wrought iron fencing, and exceptional privacy with no direct rear neighbors. The centerpiece of the outdoor space is the resort-style saltwater pool complete with three waterfalls, elevated spa, cold plunge pool, and upgraded two-tone commercial-grade pool finish. Additional highlights include panoramic mountain views and potential flexibility or ADU development for the three-car garage space, subject to buyer verification and local regulations.

remarks: Welcome to the Clifton House a stunning new reimagining of a historic residence in the heart of Beverly Hills. Originally designed by pioneering architect Edith Northman  the first registered female architect in Los Angeles  this iconic home has been thoughtfully transformed by globally acclaimed, award-winning interior designer Ryan Saghian, recognized among the world's top 100 designers. Blending timeless architectural character with modern sophistication, this exceptional two-story residence offers approximately 3,600 square feet of refined living space with 4 bedrooms and 4.5 bathrooms. Every detail has been carefully curated to embody elevated California living, seamlessly combining luxury, comfort, and functionality. The open-concept floor plan is designed for both intimate everyday living and effortless entertaining. Rich hardwood flooring, designer lighting, custom finishes, and top-of-the-line appliances create a warm yet sophisticated atmosphere throughout the home. Distinctive, high-quality hardware and thoughtfully selected materials elevate both the kitchen and bathrooms with a refined modern aesthetic. Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite serves as a private retreat, complete with a spa-inspired bathroom featuring a deep soaking tub, glass-enclosed shower, and an expansive custom walk-in closet. Spacious living and entertaining areas flow beautifully throughout the property, creating an elegant setting equally suited for quiet relaxation or grand gatherings. Perfectly positioned in one of Los Angeles' most desirable neighborhoods, the Clifton House is just minutes from world-class dining, luxury shopping along Rodeo Drive, premier Beverly Hills schools, and some of the city's most iconic restaurants, cafes, and entertainment destinations. The Clifton House is a rare opportunity to own a true piece of Los Angeles architectural history masterfully restored and reimagined for contemporary luxury living.

Positioned on the sought-after west side of 29 Palms, this location offers improved commute accessibility to Joshua Tree, Yucca Valley, and the low desert while still enjoying the peaceful atmosphere and stunning desert surroundings that make the High Desert so desirable. remarks: Tear down: 6,402 square foot lot. An exceptional opportunity for an owner-user in the highly sought-after coastal enclave of Sunset Park, Santa Monica. This sale includes Santa Monica City approved RTI (Ready-To-Issue) architectural plans allowing construction to begin immediately on a thoughtfully designed approximately 3,400 square foot two-story residence with an approximately 600 square foot detached guest house/ADU (approximate total of house + guest house = 4,000 square feet of living space). The seller is a highly experienced local general contractor who has built many beautiful homes in the neighborhood, bringing valuable insight to the design, efficiency, and planning of this project. Approximate cost to build is $600 per square foot and construction financing can also be available to qualified Buyers. The architectural plans envision a sophisticated main residence with an attached two-car garage and a flexible open-concept floor plan tailored for modern indoor outdoor California living. The main level offers an airy layout that includes formal living and dining areas, along with an expansive family room that seamlessly connects to a chef's kitchen with a center island and walk-in pantry. Designed for effortless entertaining, the living spaces flow naturally to a private resort-style backyard retreat featuring a large turf lawn, swimming pool, spa, and generous outdoor entertaining areas. The setting is ideal for al fresco dining, relaxing in the sun, and enjoying cool ocean breezes. A main-level Jr. ADU with its own private entrance offers versatility and can function as a first-floor bedroom suite, guest quarters, media room, or private office. Toward the front of the home, a mudroom and powder room are conveniently located adjacent to the direct-entrance two-car garage. Upstairs, the expansive primary suite serves as a luxurious retreat with a balcony, a spa-inspired bathroom featuring a separate soaking tub and shower, and dual walk-in closets. Two additional bedroom suites, a centrally located laundry room, and a spacious flex area ideal for an upstairs family lounge complete the second level. At the rear of the property, the detached guest house/ADU features a comfortable living area, kitchen, bathroom, and laundry. The space is ideal for guests, extended family, rental income, a pool house, gym, art studio, or a dedicated home office. Sunset Park is one of Santa Monica's most charming and desirable neighborhoods, known for its vibrant sense of community and relaxed coastal lifestyle. The property is just moments from boutique shopping, cafes, and acclaimed restaurants along Ocean Park Boulevard and the popular Main Street district. Residents enjoy easy access to the beach, scenic bike paths, the beloved local farmers markets, neighborhood parks, and some of the Westside's most highly regarded schools. Finished new construction homes in the surrounding area range in price up to $5,500,000, offering an exceptional value add opportunity.

remarks: Newly remodeled 6 Bedroom, 6 bath (4 full 2 half) Rancho San Diego home on expansive lot! Large study could even be a 7th bedroom! Open & bright floorplan includes inviting entry porch, vaulted ceiling with exposed wood beams, two cozy fireplaces, two full kitchens, large island, very high-end appliances, new fixtures, recessed lighting & ceiling fans. Palatial master suite with dual sinks, spa tub, giant triple-head shower & spacious walk-in closet. Immense 1.3 acre lot includes many separate private outdoor areas: mountaintop area with massive views and parking for dozens, large orchard with mature productive citrus trees, kids yard with trampoline and rope swings, multiple patios, balcony, massive pool, pool casita with half bath, lush landscaping, shade trees, large lawn & mountain views with lots of privacy! House feels even bigger than the official 5070 sq feet due to the expansive outdoor areas integrated into living spaces plus the four-car climate controlled garage that is more for storage and projects because there is a large shingled lighted three-wall carport next  to it for actual parking.

remarks: This may be the best coastal buy on the market! A rare combination of location, lifestyle, and value. Welcome to coastal living in the sought-after Deckside Villas community. This single-story 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom attached single-family home offers an easy-living layout just a short distance from the beach, Seabridge Marina, and the best of the Channel Islands Harbor lifestyle. A corner-unit ideally located within the community just steps from the pool. Vaulted ceilings create an open, airy feel, while Tiffany-inspired light fixtures add warmth and character. The updated kitchen features granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, a breakfast bar, and access from the 2-car garage. remarks: Located within The Palms Golf Club, an intimate private golf community of only 99 residences, this extensively remodeled former model home enjoys a premier location overlooking the 10th fairway of the acclaimed Fred Couples and Brian Curley-designed championship course. Enhanced by more than $350,000 in thoughtful upgrades and improvements, the residence combines timeless architecture, sophisticated design, and spectacular golf course views while offering an exceptional opportunity to enjoy one of the desert's most sought-after club lifestyles. A private gated courtyard creates a memorable arrival, featuring a custom tiled outdoor fireplace that welcomes guests with warmth and elegance. Inside, the expansive great room showcases soaring ceilings, a striking fireplace, custom wet bar with built-in wine refrigerator, and panoramic fairway views, creating an inviting setting for both entertaining and everyday living. The remodeled chef's kitchen has been thoughtfully designed with premium stainless steel appliances, custom pull-out cabinetry, abundant storage, and a large center island featuring a butcher block workspace. Adjacent to the kitchen, a flexible living area functions beautifully as a media room, den, or formal dining room, adapting seamlessly to a variety of lifestyles. Privately situated in its own wing, the spacious primary suite serves as a true retreat, offering tranquil golf course views and a spa-inspired bathroom appointed with designer tile flooring, dual vanities, an oversized frameless glass walk-in shower, and refined custom finishes. Exceptional storage includes two walk-in closets, an additional closet, and dedicated linen storage. The secondary ensuite guest bedroom is positioned in a separate wing, providing outstanding privacy and comfort for visitors. Adding further versatility, the detached oversized ensuite casita offers an ideal space for guests, extended family, or a private office. Complete with its own bathroom, this well-appointed retreat provides independence and comfort while maintaining separation from the main residence. Designed to embrace the very best of indoor-outdoor desert living, the resort-style backyard overlooks the 10th fairway and captures lush fairway views and vibrant desert sunsets. At its center is a stunning blue glass tile-bottom pool and spa enhanced by tranquil cascading water features. A built-in professional-grade barbecue station and multiple outdoor entertaining areas create the perfect setting for hosting gatherings, enjoying al fresco dining, or simply relaxing while taking in the spectacular scenery. The Palms Golf Club is renowned for its relaxed luxury lifestyle, championship golf, and welcoming social atmosphere. Residents enjoy close proximity to the clubhouse, where members gather for dining, happy hours, and seasonal social events. Membership opportunities are available but not required. Unlike many private clubs, tee times are not required, allowing members to enjoy spontaneous play on meticulously maintained fairways and Bentgrass greens. The intimate size of the community creates a sense of privacy, camaraderie, and exclusivity rarely found in the desert. Combining an extensively remodeled former model home, panoramic golf course views, a detached casita, resort-style outdoor living, and access to one of the Coachella Valley's most desirable private club communities, this is a rare opportunity to experience the very best of life at The Palms Golf Club. Sold fully furnished and turn key.

remarks:
Prepare to be blown away by this rare desert gem fixer-upper with 5 acres, water well and situated on a paved street! The drive out sets the mood as you are surrounded by a vast open landscape filled with desert flora and majestic mountains in the backdrop. Built in 1930 and nestled on 5 acres of land, you won’t find properties with this much character and views that rival many paintings very often. This property captivates you the first time you see it, and as you visit the home, you’ll take a trip back in time and discover an open canvas to update this ideal getaway the way you want!
As you pull into the grounds, you’ll immediately notice the perimeter fencing, along with the unique 1930s architecture. Stepping inside, you’ll find a spacious wraparound sunroom, perfect for a dining area, office, home gym, or all three. Adding to the charm of the era, before walking into the living space, you are greeted by the original wood siding and retro windows! Standing in the living area, you’ll notice a ceiling fan, tasteful wood paneling, and the ever-present 1930s architecture!
The kitchen features original cabinets, a large updated Galley sink, a stove, a microwave, and a preparation countertop. Additionally, the built-in pantry shelving makes food storage easy! Both bedrooms are generously sized, and be on the lookout for little touches that bring you back to a time when so much was done by hand in a craftsman-like fashion. The bathroom is equipped with a vanity, a walk-in shower, tile flooring, and a commode. In some areas, you can still see the beautiful original handcrafted wood flooring!
Stepping back outside, the front and backyard provide the perfect space to host barbecues, enjoy outdoor dining, or find an ideal spot to take in gorgeous sunrises and romantic sunsets! Additional features include a workshop, garage, storage shed, water well, all-new dual-pane windows, just off a paved street, and the perfect location—just minutes from downtown 29 Palms and a short drive to the epic Joshua Tree National Park! Don’t miss out on this rare opportunity! Book your private tour today before this one is gone!

remarks:
Back on Market, no fault of seller. Tucked into the rolling hills of Fallbrook, within the exclusive enclave of Sycamore Ranch, lies a place where life slows down—where mornings begin with soft light spilling across stone pathways, and evenings linger under open skies.

What makes this offering truly rare goes beyond the setting… an existing 2.25% assumable mortgage—an extraordinary opportunity for the right buyer to secure not only a home, but a financial advantage nearly impossible to replicate today.

Set along the fairways of the Golf Club of California, this single-story estate offers space and serenity just minutes from San Diego. Spanning nearly .69 acres, the home features over 4,600 square feet of thoughtfully designed living, with 5 bedrooms and 6 baths—each space both expansive and inviting. It feels less like a home and more like a private escape.

Beyond a hand-carved wood door, a Mediterranean courtyard unfolds—lined with towering Italian cypress and embraced by the home’s living spaces. Natural light pours in, creating a seamless connection throughout—designed for gathering and quiet moments alike.

Inside, the home flows effortlessly. High ceilings and warm light enhance the interiors, while the beautifully appointed kitchen becomes the heart of it all: featuring granite surfaces, a large breakfast bar, eat-in nook, 6-burner range, double ovens, Sub-Zero refrigerator, and butler’s pantry.

The grounds unfold into Tuscan-inspired garden vignettes—trellised walkways, stone paths, and private seating areas leading to a resort-style backyard. A pool and spa for sunlit afternoons. Two fireplaces for cool evenings. An outdoor kitchen and bar for effortless entertaining—all overlooking the fairway without the burden of an HOA.

A detached casita welcomes guests with privacy and comfort for extended stays.

Leased solar and a three-car garage add practicality, while the quiet setting offers both privacy and convenient access to North County San Diego, Temecula wine country, and beyond.

And perhaps most compelling, this level of design, space, and lifestyle would command significantly more just miles away.

Here, it simply exists… waiting to be lived. Paired with the ability to assume a 2.25% mortgage, this is more than a home; it’s a rare alignment of lifestyle and financial opportunity.

remarks: Setting a new standard for California coastal living, this exceptional oceanfront residence showcases elevated finishes, refined craftsmanship, and a sophisticated, design-forward aesthetic. Bold materials and a curated coastal palette define a home that is both striking and timeless. Designed by Chris Light with interiors by Jeffrey Maynard, the residence offers true oceanfront living with five bedrooms and a level of architectural integrity rarely found along the coast. The main level is designed for living and entertaining at scale. At its center, the kitchen makes a bold statement with steel and Arabescato marble surfaces, complemented by custom walnut cabinetry fabricated in Italy by The Davani Group and fully integrated Gaggenau appliances. The great room is anchored by a fireplace and a refined bar, while expansive doors open to a large front patio with a fire feature for seamless indoor-outdoor flow. A walk-in pantry with elevator access and a spacious garage accommodating up to five vehicles, plus golf cart parking, complete this level. A private elevator connects all four levels. Upstairs, the primary suite features a fireplace, sitting area, and private balcony with sweeping ocean views. The spa-inspired bath includes Calacatta marble, Nero Marquina floors, Dornbracht fixtures, and a steam shower with unobstructed ocean views. A fully built-out closet with in-suite laundry and two additional ensuite bedrooms with a flexible living space complete this level. The lower level offers a multipurpose lounge, temperature-controlled wine cellar, junior primary suite, and a wellness retreat pre-wired for a sauna, along with a powder room and secondary laundry. The rooftop terrace delivers a resort-style experience with a Casa Blui spa, fire feature, pop-up television, covered loggia, and full bath, all set against panoramic ocean views. Featuring eight bathrooms total—six full and two powder rooms—the home is designed for both everyday living and elevated entertaining. Ideally located near China Cove Beach, Pirate’s Cove, Corona del Mar Village, and just minutes from Fashion Island.

remarks:
Welcome to an extraordinary opportunity in the coveted enclave of Sherwood Forest. This beautifully updated 4-bedroom 3-bathroom featuring a bonus room property spans 3107 square feet of bright, open-concept living space. From the moment you enter, you will be greeted by clean architectural lines, soaring vaulted ceilings with exposed beams, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The spacious living room centers around a custom fireplace and built-in media setup, while multiple dining areas and expansive entertaining spaces offer incredible versatility.
The thoughtfully designed kitchen features sleek granite countertops, abundant cabinetry, and matching stainless steel appliances less than two years old, ideal for both casual meals and elevated gatherings. This exceptional home blends privacy, design, and functionality in one of the Valley's most desirable neighborhoods. A rare offering that delivers style, upgrades, and move-in ready comfort.

remarks:
Located in the heart of Temecula's highly desirable Meadowview community, this two-story 5-bedroom, 4-bathroom estate sits on over an acre of land and offers the space, privacy, and lifestyle that Meadowview is known for. At 3,970 square feet, the floor plan is designed for both everyday living and effortless entertaining, with a thoughtful layout that balances formal and casual living spaces across two levels.
The large kitchen is a true centerpiece of the home, featuring granite countertops, a built-in Sub-Zero refrigerator, and ample counter and cabinet space,  well-equipped for the home chef and equally suited for hosting. The main level also includes a dedicated home office and bonus room, offering flexible space for remote work, a playroom, media room, or additional guest accommodations. Four full bathrooms serve the five bedrooms comfortably, with the primary suite delivering the scale and privacy you'd expect from a home of this caliber.
Step outside and you'll find over an acre of flat, usable land framed by open space and hillside views, a rare combination in the heart of Temecula. The yard offers a genuine opportunity to build out a custom pool, outdoor kitchen, or entertainer's patio, with space to spare. RV parking adds additional functionality for those with toys, trailers, or recreational vehicles. The 3-car attached garage provides direct entry and generous storage.

With easy access to the award-winning TVUSD schools and Temecula Wine Country minutes away, this location balances privacy with connectivity.
This is a rare opportunity to own a large-lot, move-in-ready home in Meadowview. Schedule your private showing today.

remarks: Captivating Modern Ranch-Style Retreat with Open-Concept Living! Welcome to this beautifully updated, move-in-ready 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom single-family home blending modern functionality with warm, rustic charm. Nestled on an extra-large parcel of land right in the town of Oakhurst CA, this property offers a rare combination of expansive acreage, serene natural privacy, and ultimate convenience to local shops and dining.Exceptional curb appeal welcomes you instantly with crisp white siding, sharp dark trim, and a roomy attached two-car garage. Inside, an abundance of radiant natural light pours through oversized windows, beautifully highlighting the stunning, polished hardwood floors. The heart of the home is an entertainer’s dream, featuring a bright, open-concept kitchen that flows effortlessly into the dining space and right outdoors to the covered deck perfect for enjoying those cool evenings.  Home chefs will love the premium butcher block island with breakfast bar seating for four, stainless steel appliances, and a large butler's pantry that provides unparalleled extra storage and convenience. remarks: Extraordinary coastal living unfolds along one of Cambria’s most desirable streets, where sweeping white-water views and the rhythm of the Pacific define the experience of this thoughtfully designed residence. Encompassing approximately 2,961± square feet, the home offers 4 bedrooms and 4.5 baths, each space carefully composed to balance comfort, privacy, and refined coastal style. The interiors are anchored by an expansive great room where living, dining, and kitchen areas come together seamlessly, framed by wide windows that draw in natural light and capture the dramatic coastline beyond. At the center of the home, the kitchen is both functional and artful, featuring a striking solid glass island custom-designed and signed by a world-renowned artist, complemented by high-gloss cabinetry and premium appliances, including an Italian gas range and built-in convection oven and microwave. Throughout the home, porcelain tile flooring with hand-crafted stone inlays, dramatic lighting, and a lodge-style gas fireplace create a warm yet sophisticated atmosphere. A defining feature of the residence is the seamless transition to outdoor living, where La Cantina folding glass doors open fully to an ocean-view lanai. Here, a built-in gas fire pit becomes the focal point for evenings spent overlooking the coastline, with sunsets and ocean breezes providing a constantly changing backdrop. The primary suite offers a quiet retreat, complete with a private balcony accessed through mahogany French doors, where elevated views of the ocean create a sense of calm and privacy. The spa-inspired bath is finished with a tiled shower and freestanding soaking tub, reflecting the same attention to detail found throughout the home. Additional features include mahogany interior doors with polished chrome accents, designer bath finishes, expansive wall space for art, an outdoor shower, and a two-car garage. Located just moments from the scenic trails of the Fiscalini Ranch Preserve, the property offers convenient access to one of the Central Coast’s most treasured natural landscapes. A distinctive coastal residence where thoughtful design, exceptional craftsmanship, and Cambria’s dramatic setting come together in a truly refined coastal retreat.

remarks: Nestled on an expansive corner lot in the coveted Whispering Forest neighborhood of Big Bear City, this beautifully maintained single-level retreat offers the perfect blend of serenity, space, and accessibility. Inside, you'll find 3 spacious bedrooms, 2 bright full baths, and a convenient hallway laundry closet. The oversized kitchen provides abundant cabinetry, generous counter space, and direct garage access--ideal for full-time living or a mountain getaway. The inviting living room features vaulted, beamed ceilings and large windows that fill the space with natural light. A charming brick fireplace with raised hearth creates the perfect setting for cozy winter evenings. One of the standout features of this property is its large, tree-studded corner lot, offering fantastic outdoor appeal with a mix of mature and young pines, ample guest parking, and a spacious storage shed for all your mountain gear. Enjoy a covered front entry deck and a generous rear deck--perfect for entertaining or relaxing under the stars. Located just minutes from the ski slopes, Big Bear Lake, the Village, and miles of hiking and biking trails, this home delivers exceptional convenience while still being set far enough from the hustle and bustle to enjoy true mountain tranquility. Whispering Forest is known for its peaceful atmosphere, low-traffic streets, and easy access to the National Forest--making it one of Big Bear's most desirable areas. Whether you're seeking a full-time mountain haven or a weekend escape, this move-in ready home offers comfort, charm, and an unbeatable location. Come enjoy crisp autumn mornings, snowy winter nights, and sun-drenched summer afternoons in your own Big Bear retreat. You won't want to miss it.

remarks:
Lake life starts here.
Tucked inside the gated community of Heritage Ranch on Lake Nacimiento, this fully remodeled 3-bed, 2-bath home delivers the kind of lifestyle most people only vacation for.
The interior feels light, open, and move-in ready — an airy open-concept layout flows into a gourmet kitchen outfitted with stainless steel appliances and quartz countertops. The hall bath has been tastefully updated, and the primary suite offers a spacious en-suite retreat. A manicured and low maintenance backyard make entertaining a breeze along with solar panels to keep your energy bills low and your footprint smaller. A long driveway leads to an oversized garage with room for vehicles, watercraft, and everything in between. 
Step outside and the community delivers. Spend your weekends on Lake Nacimiento — wakeboarding, kayaking, whatever calls to you. Rally friends on the pickleball courts, ride the oak-studded trails, or explore the on-site equestrian center. When you need provisions, Oak Hill Market has you covered without ever leaving the ranch.
This isn't just a home — it's a full lifestyle upgrade.

remarks: Discover your dream home in this welcoming and beautiful West Palmdale pool residence. With four spacious bedrooms and two and a half bathrooms, this recently updated home features an open layout perfect for entertaining both indoors and outdoors. Once inside, you'll appreciate the elegant crown molding that flows throughout the downstairs area. The inviting front living room can easily accommodate a formal dining space, guiding you through a charming, paneled doorway into the heart of the home. Here, you'll be delighted by the radiant updated kitchen, boasting stunning stone countertops, ample cupboard space, stainless steel appliances, and a breakfast bar for casual meals. A walk-in pantry provides plenty of storage for snacks and beverages, while another spacious dining area flows seamlessly into the cozy family room featuring a gas fireplace and newly installed luxury vinyl flooring. Open the back sliding glass door to reveal your very own oasis - a private pool surrounded by open skies, offering ample space for entertaining or simply enjoying a refreshing dip in the pool or relaxing in the hot tub. With updated commercial pool equipment tucked neatly away, you can enjoy your outdoor retreat anytime. Inside, just off the family room, you'll find a convenient guest powder room and a laundry room as you head down the hall to the oversized two-car garage. Venture upstairs to find a comfortable escape with four bedrooms and a beautifully remodeled hall bathroom that showcases elegant spa-like flooring, a stylish tiled shower, and a spacious double sink vanity. The Primary Room is a true retreat with its own ensuite and a walk-in closet complete with built-in organizers. Unwind on your private deck where you can savor your morning coffee or take in the breathtaking starry sky and city lights at night. To keep energy costs manageable, the home has 17 solar panels with battery backup. Nestled at the end of a cul-de-sac away from busy roads, this home offers quick access to Highway 14 down Ave S, making it a prime location. The Palmdale area is flourishing with new shopping and dining options, and you'll also find Palmdale Regional Medical Center less than a mile away. Edwards Airforce Base where has NASA's Neil A. Armstrong's Research Center is not to far among other great places to work at or visit. No HOA and NO Mello Roos! This inviting home is truly a gem waiting for you to make it yours!

remarks:
A rare statement where luxury, wellness, entertainment, and community converge to offer a lifestyle rarely found in Newport Beach.

Quietly commanding in one of Newport Beach’s most coveted neighborhoods, this reimagined contemporary estate has undergone a comprehensive, whole-home remodel, elevating nearly 7,924 square feet through thoughtful design, precision craftsmanship, and elevated material selections.

Natural light moves effortlessly throughout the home, anchored by custom-crafted wide-plank white oak flooring, soaring ceilings, and a dramatic three-story glass stairwell crowned with a bespoke chandelier. Walls, plaster, lighting, kitchens, and baths have all been meticulously redesigned, resulting in interiors that feel refined, cohesive, and timeless rather than trend-driven.

The chef’s kitchen is sculptural yet highly functional, appointed with Viking appliances, expansive stone surfaces, and sleek custom cabinetry. Accordion glass doors open to newly designed outdoor spaces, where Garden Studio–designed landscaping and completed pool engineering allow the next owner to finalize a resort-style setting tailored to their vision.

The 2,500-square-foot lower level is immersive and unexpected, offering a glass-enclosed gym, executive office, multipurpose or playroom, and a fully upgraded private home theater with new equipment, custom velvet seating included, stadium tiers, and a performance stage. A two-story exterior fountain adds a dramatic architectural element and a sense of arrival.

Upstairs, four en-suite bedrooms provide privacy and volume, including one with a hidden “secret room.” The primary suite is a private retreat with fireplace, deck, custom built-ins, and a fully reimagined spa-inspired bath featuring a steam shower, oversized soaking tub, and a customized walk-in closet with illuminated rods.

Additional enhancements include whole-house reverse osmosis water filtration, advanced air purification, a comprehensive security system, and a generator, reinforcing the home’s focus on comfort, wellness, and modern resilience.

Set on a 9,222-square-foot lot in the Port Streets, this home offers something rarely available: true scale, fresh design, and immediate livability. No other current offering in the neighborhood or Newport Beach combines this square footage, condition, and value.

This is not a renovation for resale. It is a considered architectural reset, designed to be lived in, experienced, and remembered.

remarks:
Welcome to this beautifully remodeled 3-bedroom, 2-bath single-story condominium offering 1,130 square feet of stylish and comfortable living space in the desirable Shadow Mountain Trails community of Lakeview Terrace. With no neighbors above and only one shared wall, this home provides a rare combination of privacy, comfort, and convenience.

Vaulted ceilings, wide-plank flooring, recessed lighting, and abundant natural light create a bright and inviting atmosphere throughout. The remodeled kitchen serves as the centerpiece of the home, featuring quartz countertops, shaker-style cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, designer hardware, and a large center island that opens seamlessly to the living and dining areas—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining.

The spacious primary suite includes generous closet space and an updated en-suite bathroom, while both bathrooms have been tastefully renovated with contemporary finishes. A private balcony offers the perfect place to enjoy your morning coffee or unwind at the end of the day.

Additional highlights include central air and heat, in-unit laundry, Level 2 EV charging capability, and a detached two-car garage conveniently located directly beneath the unit, providing excellent parking and storage.

Residents enjoy access to community amenities including a sparkling pool, spa, and beautifully maintained grounds. Ideally situated in Lakeview Terrace, near the Hansen Dam Recreation Area and offering convenient access to the 210 Freeway, this location combines outdoor recreation with an easy commute throughout the San Fernando Valley and beyond.

Combining modern upgrades, a highly desirable single-level layout, and an exceptional Lakeview Terrace location, this turnkey home is one you won't want to miss.

remarks:
Tucked away in the storied beauty of Latigo Canyon, this private retreat unfolds like a scene from another era—where Old World romance meets the soul of classic rock. A home that feels discovered, not built… where every stone, archway, and terrace tells a story.

Inspired by the warmth and texture of a Tuscan villa, the residence is immersed in nature, surrounded by canyon walls, mature greenery, and the quiet rhythm of Malibu’s most serene landscape. Sunlight pours through open spaces and spills onto expansive patios, inviting an effortless indoor-outdoor lifestyle. Terraced grounds cascade gently down the hillside, creating intimate settings for morning espresso, late afternoon wine, or evenings under the stars.

There’s a mood here—subtle, but unmistakable. A sense of escape. Of creativity. Of timelessness. You can almost hear it… the faint echo of Led Zeppelin drifting through the halls, giving the home an edge of character that sets it apart from anything else in Malibu. It’s romantic, but not delicate—grounded, soulful, and deeply authentic.

Designed for those who appreciate privacy, beauty, and a connection to their surroundings, this property offers a rare blend of seclusion and inspiration. Whether as a full-time residence or a canyon getaway, it lives like a permanent vacation—where every day feels just a little more elevated, a little more intentional.

This is not just a home.
It’s a feeling.

Unit A features 3 bedrooms (including two generously sized rooms), 2 full bathrooms, a spacious living room, and both a dining area. The kitchen offers functionality with an opportunity to update and make it your own. Unit B offers a private entrance and yard, along with 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, kitchen with an eating area and a large living areaideal for rental income, guests, or extended family living. Both units offer great layouts and present an excellent opportunity for customization and value enhancement. A shared laundry room conveniently services both units.
Ideally located within walking distance to some of San Clementes most sought-after attractions, including beautiful beaches, world-class surfing, boutique shopping, local dining, entertainment, and the San Clemente Pier. Easy freeway access adds to the homes convenience.
Perfect for an owner-occupant or investorlive in one unit while generating income from the other in this desirable coastal community.

remarks: Welcome to the Waterstone building in Playa Vista, where this bright and comfortable 1 bedroom, 1 bath home offers 840 square feet of easy living where you can enjoy the ocean breeze and western facing views of Crescent Park. Step inside to discover an open floor plan that offers both flexibility and flow. To your right, a versatile dining area awaits, ideal as a formal dining space or easily converted into a home office to suit your lifestyle. The kitchen impresses with freshly painted cabinets, updated hardware, generous counter space, ample storage, and a breakfast bar perfect for casual mornings or entertaining guests. The living room is bathed in natural light thanks to the expansive sliding glass doors that bring the outdoors in. Retreat to the spacious and serene primary bedroom, where peaceful park views greet you each morning and two walk-in closets provide exceptional storage. The well-appointed bathroom features a linen closet and is thoughtfully designed with dual access, privately connected to the primary bedroom while also accessible via a separate entrance for guests. Adding to the appeal, this home includes a rare and generously sized private storage unit located in a secured area of the building, measuring approximately 6'10" x 7'10" wide and 6.5 ft. tall, a truly valuable bonus that is hard to come by. Additionally, the home includes in unit laundry, and two parking spaces equipped with shared EV chargers in a secure subterranean garage. Conveniently located across the street from the CenterPointe Club.  Playa Vista amenities include cable, hi-speed internet, Olympic size pool, fitness center, CenterPointe Club & Resort access, and 29 parks.  Just a block away from Playa Vista Elementary School and the library, and close to Runway at Playa Vista featuring Whole Foods, Cinemark, restaurants, shops, and more. Residents also enjoy access to the Resort and Centerpointe Club, offering a state of the art gym and pool.

remarks:
Welcome to your own waterfront retreat in the highly sought-after Orange Lakes community! This charming 1-bedroom loft-style condo offers a light and airy open floor plan with soaring ceilings and tranquil views of the water just beyond your windows.
Relax to the soothing sounds of streams and enjoy the peaceful surroundings of this certified wildlife habitat, where ducks, birds, and lush greenery create a true nature escape.
Thoughtfully updated, this home features fresh paint, new flooring, and new carpet, along with a beautifully refreshed kitchen complete with a new range, new dishwasher, new microwave, and stainless steel sink. A new vinyl dual pane sliding glass door opens to your water front patio, where you’ll find a wooden deck and convenient storage area—perfect for enjoying the outdoor setting.
Additional highlights include new inside LG Washer and Dryer , a dedicated carport #66 and assigned parking #85 also close to guest parking for added ease.
Whether you're enjoying your morning coffee overlooking the water or unwinding after a long day, this home offers the perfect blend of comfort and serenity. Just steps away, indulge in resort-style amenities including pool, spa, sauna and tennis courts.
A rare opportunity to own a peaceful, nature-filled hideaway in the heart of Orange!
Close to Freeways and the toll roads , Peters Canyon, Irvine Park, Restaurants, shopping  and the charm of nearby Old Town Orange Circle.

remarks: The Back Ranch at Circle K spans 349 acres of classic Happy Canyon topography -- rolling pastures, ridgeline trails, fenced corrals, and elevated privacy with panoramic views of the valley. This section of the ranch has historically served as the agricultural and livestock heart of the property, housing the ranch manager, equestrian and livestock infrastructure. Centered around an iconic 4-bedroom ranch house, it offers 360-degree views of Happy Canyon and large pastures. Supporting structures include a duplex, horse barn, fuel depot, and a large equipment barn, providing the backbone for agricultural, equestrian, or operational use. All three parcels of the Back Ranch qualify independently under the Santa Barbara Ag Enterprise Ordinance (AEO), enabling future flexibility for farmstays, camping, or food-service uses. A true Californian ranch canvas, the Back Ranch combines beauty, history, and functional scale for those seeking land, legacy, and freedom. Also available: The Front Ranch (1750 Rambling Oaks, Santa Ynez CA - 204 acres) at 14,950,000 and the full Circle K Ranch (7351 Happy Canyon Rd, Santa Ynez - 554 acres) at 24,750,000.

remarks: Welcome to your new, TWO BEDROOM, TWO BATH, home at 2266 Bradford Avenue, Apt 121. This isn't just another condo; it is widely considered the "nicest of the nice" within this well-maintained Highland community, as well as one of the largest floor plans. HIGH-END APPLIANCES: Frigidaire large-capacity refrigerator, electric stove, convection oven, and dishwasher—all included in the sale. SOPHISTICATED INTERIOR UPGRADES. (The attention to detail throughout the open-concept floor plan is unmatched): PREMINUM FLOORING: Durable, 12mm luxury vinyl planking (double the thickness of standard 6mm) and elegant porcelain tile throughout. REFINED FINISHES: Fresh paint, raised-panel interior doors. New trim. CLEAN LINES: All popcorn ceilings have been professionally removed in the bedrooms. UPGRADED BATHS: Both bathrooms feature new vanities, sinks, and toilets. The upstairs deck offers breathtaking daytime mountain views and twinkling city lights at night, featuring stylish interlocking wood tiled deck. ENHANCED FRONT DECK: One of the largest in the building, recently upgraded with new deck boards. Schedule your tour of Highland's premier condo today! EXCLUSIONS: Personal items and furniture (unless negotiated separately). remarks: Why wait years for a great school assignment when you can move into one of Concord's most sought-after school-choice neighborhoods today? Welcome to 5530 Merritt Drive, a stunning 3,714-square-foot home nestled on a private .52-acre lot in the coveted Lime Ridge area. Families are drawn to this small quiet neighborhood for its access to some of the area's most desirable schools, including Northgate High School and Clayton Valley Charter High School through the district's school "choice" program. It's a rare opportunity to invest not only in a beautiful home, but in your family's future. Inside, space is the luxury you'll notice immediately. All four bedrooms are generously sized, offering room for growing families, multi-generational living, home offices, or guest accommodations. Even better, in addition to a beautiful master suite, a 2nd bedroom offers an en suite Bathroom and private deck, providing exceptional privacy and flexibility for family members and visitors alike. Outdoor living is a true highlight of this property. The beautiful 1,250+ sq. ft. two-tiered deck offers spectacular views and abundant space for entertaining, outdoor dining, and everyday enjoyment. Colorful mature landscaping creates a serene sanctuary that feels worlds away, while remaining close to everything Concord and the surrounding cities have to offer. Designed for both everyday living and entertaining, the home offers quality finishes, expansive gathering spaces, and beautiful views. Whether hosting holiday celebrations, accommodating teenagers who need room to spread out, or simply enjoying quiet evenings overlooking the surrounding landscape, this home delivers the space and versatility today's families demand. Set on over half an acre, the property provides privacy and outdoor space that are increasingly difficult to find, while remaining close to parks, trails, shopping, and top educational options. This is more than a home—it's a place where your family can thrive for years to come. 5530 Merritt Drive: exceptional schools, exceptional space, and exceptional opportunity.

remarks: Exceptional mid-century residence by architect Patrick Evan Sheehy on a private 16,652 sq.ft' lot. Built in 1983 and completely remodeled. Clean modern lines with store front commercial grade windows. Open both sliders and windows over bar to reach the outdoor serving area. Cantilevered overhangs, continuous glass window walls in every principal room for seamless indoor outdoor living.  4 bedrooms including study, 4 baths. Dramatic living and dining rooms with vaulted 15' wood ceilings with exposed structure.  Large fireplace and  a sit down bar opening to outside. Ten foot doors including double doors in master, guest and study. Large pool and spa, outdoor kitchen, new mechanicals.  Great neighborhood with no HOA, dramatic mountain views, privacy, attractive landscaping.  Sold furnished including piano, shop tools, yard tools, golf cart and lovely furniture in every room. Warm yet elegant inside, beautifully upgraded with a wonderful floor plan, and room to play in  oversize backyard pool and spa with outdoor BBQUE area. Two car garage plus cart garage.  Close to Desert Horizons, Indian Wells Country Club and Indian Wells Golf Resort which offers a discount for Indian Wells residents in the pro shop, some restaurants and hotels.

remarks: Located in the desirable West Cameron community, this thoughtfully upgraded, energy-efficient residence offers 3 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms with low HOA fees. Built in 2023, the home features all newer systems throughout including the roof, HVAC, and plumbing along with a fully paid solar system. Natural light fills the open-concept layout, where a well-designed great room seamlessly connects the living area, dining space, and private balcony for effortless everyday living and entertaining. The modern kitchen is appointed with an eat-in island, a stylish backsplash, and stainless steel appliances. The flexible floor plan includes a second-floor bedroom ideal for a home office or guest suite, while the third level offers two additional bedrooms, including a spacious primary suite with a walk-in closet and an ensuite bathroom featuring dual sinks. A dedicated laundry room adds everyday convenience, and the home has been updated throughout with custom automatic shades and blackout curtains (remote- and app-controlled), a water softener and whole-home filtration system, and epoxy garage flooring with a fully finished and painted garage. Ideally situated in a prime West Covina location near shopping, dining, and daily essentials, with easy access to the I-10 and 605 freeways.

remarks: Casa Alta is a testament to patience, precision, and an unwavering commitment to architectural excellence. In a landscape as protected and storied as Olde Del Mar, a residence of this caliber-conceived by the definitive local duo of architect Brian Church and construction by Joshua Herbst, is a rare achievement that transcends the typical luxury build.   Perched atop a private, lushly wooded parcel, the home offers a vantage point that is both commanding and secluded. The experience is one of a coastal "tree house"-a sophisticated retreat where the Pacific horizon is framed by mature heritage trees, evoking the timeless, grounded elegance of Montecito or Pebble Beach.  Complete with all the latest smart home technologies & an elevator that services all levels, this property offers 5 bedrooms, multiple covered deck spaces, an office, a stunning lap pool, outdoor kitchen, fire pit, pool bathroom, turf lawn yard space, lush landscape, citrus trees & more. Every material curated for this residence has been thoughtfully chosen. John McCulley, a visionary for a coastal modern aesthetic, handled the interior design.  This property features panoramic ocean views & is located within walking distance to the beach & all of downtown Del Mar's best restaurants, shops & attractions. Perfectly positioned in the hills of Olde Del Mar, this exceptional residence rises above the energy of the village—offering effortless access to everything you love, without the noise or congestion. Do not miss the opportunity of a lifetime to own a prime piece of land with a stunning new construction residence in San Diego's best zip code!

remarks: This newly constructed Classic Modern Hollywood Hills residence spans approximately 6,000 square feet and reflects a level of quality, design, and execution rarely found in new construction. Conceived and built by well known, experienced, design-driven team, the home emphasizes thoughtful architecture, refined materials, and seamless livability throughout. The floor plan offers four bedrooms plus a dedicated office, anchored by wide-plank walnut floors and travertine stone that bring warmth and cohesion to the interiors. The kitchen is outfitted with a full suite of Miele appliances. Floor-to-ceiling Fleetwood doors and windows frame sweeping ocean and city views while creating effortless indoor-outdoor flow. Every element of the home was carefully considered, from the proportions of the living spaces to the precision of the finishes. Amenities include an elevator, full smart-home integration, generous storage, wet bar, and wine refrigeration. A three-car garage with additional driveway parking an uncommon luxury in the Hills adds both convenience and functionality. Outdoor spaces are equally well executed, featuring a pool and spa, outdoor kitchen, full bar, fire pit, and a private pickleball court, all designed to maximize privacy, views, and year-round entertaining. This is a highly refined, turnkey offering that blends architectural integrity with modern luxury living in one of Los Angeles' most sought-after settings.

remarks:
Welcome to this custom-built modern farmhouse tucked into the rolling hills of De Luz, where privacy, scale, and thoughtful design come together in a way that feels both elevated and effortless.

Set on 3.48 acres surrounded by natural landscape and sweeping views, this home was intentionally designed with a clean modern aesthetic softened by warm, Restoration Hardware–inspired finishes. Wide-plank flooring, curated lighting, and a neutral palette create a cohesive feel throughout, while expansive windows flood the home with natural light and frame the surrounding hillsides.

From the moment you enter, the scale of the home immediately stands out with soaring ceilings, open-concept living spaces, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow designed for both everyday living and entertaining.

Anchoring the heart of the home is a stunning designer kitchen featuring dramatic waterfall slab countertops, custom cabinetry, professional-grade appliances, and an oversized island that opens effortlessly into the main living spaces and surrounding views.

The layout is both functional and flexible, featuring dual primary suites ideal for multi-generational living, guests, or creating a true retreat experience within the home. Each space was thoughtfully designed with generous proportions and elevated finishes that carry throughout the property.

Outside, the property offers the privacy and setting De Luz is known for, with room to create additional outdoor living spaces, enjoy the peaceful surroundings, or simply take in the beauty of the natural landscape—all while being just minutes to Old Town Temecula, local wineries, and convenient freeway access.

Custom homes with this level of design, volume, and setting are not easily replicated, making this a rare opportunity to experience De Luz living in a way that feels private, intentional, and beautifully designed.

remarks: ONLY four ground-level garden condos exist in this 300-plus unit community. This is one of them — and they rarely change hands.  101 lives differently than anything else in the building. Nearly 900 square feet of finished interior opens directly onto a 400 square foot private garden patio, creating over 1,200 square feet of genuine living space. No stairs, no elevator — just step outside into your own private garden overlooking the courtyard, the fountains, and the lush landscaping that surrounds you. This bright and airy residence showcases a thoughtful floor plan complemented by an array of quality upgrades that truly set it apart.
Step into the upgraded kitchen, a culinary haven featuring elegant Granite countertops Cabinetry offers Handles from Belgium, modern recessed lighting. The high-end appliances make cooking a pleasure, including a Thermador cooktop, KitchenAid microwave, GE oven and fridge, LG dishwasher, and an LG washer and dryer purchased just last year. If that's not enough, the entire home is enhanced with stylish, recessed lighting throughout.
The interior details are all about ease and elegance, with low-maintenance wood and tile flooring that enhance the open feel of the space. Energy efficiency is improved with dual-pane windows, keeping your home comfortable year-round. A cozy fireplace anchors the formal living room, while a distinct family room and a dedicated dining room offer excellent flow for entertaining friends and family.
Master bedroom, with beautiful wood flooring and a remodeled ensuite bathroom. This spectacular Master bathroom comes complete with a dual-sink vanity, high-end Italian hardware, smart mirror, and a luxurious tiled shower topped with a high-end rain shower head. The master also boasts a generous walk-in closet and a private sliding glass door that opens to the backyard, a perfect spot for relaxation.
Don't forget the vibrant blue bathroom with its smart mirror and exquisite glass-enclosed shower, offering functionality and flair. Convenience is yours with a dedicated indoor laundry area with high-capacity washer and dryer to make everyday tasks easier.
Home is also a hub for eco-friendly innovation! This residence features dual 220V electric vehicle chargers, ready to power up two EVs simultaneously.  
Beyond the doorstep, this property offers the quintessential Southern California lifestyle—just minutes away from the beach, local shops, well-maintained parks, and community tennis and pickleball courts, 2 golf courses (Old Ranch and Navy). Whether you're looking for relaxation or recreation, this home delivers on all fronts. Welcome to your dream home, where style meets comfort in the heart of a prime location!
