remarks: Hello, I'm 5136 Berryman Avenue in Culver City, and I have officially entered my "may the best buyer win" era.  My seller has decided to make a bold move and launch an auction-style sale, with my list price to bring everyone running. And yes, I do mean everyone. Buyers, agents, dreamers, spreadsheet people, value hunters, and anyone who enjoys a little real estate adrenaline with their morning coffee.  For context, my seller has a February appraisal showing a value over $2.1 million. The only reason I am being offered this way is because of a job transfer, not because I lost my sparkle, forgot my manners, or suddenly decided to become shy in public.  I am also available for lease, fully furnished, because apparently I believe in keeping my options open, which feels very Los Angeles of me.  I'm a Mediterranean beauty built in 2012, offering 4 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, and 2,968 square feet across a smart, sun-filled two-story layout with my main entry on the first level. I've been kept in excellent condition, and since 2019, my owners have given me the kind of glow-up that would make lesser homes quietly rethink their life choices: redone kitchen, updated baths, wood laminate flooring, fresh paint, turf, garage storage, and more.  And if you lease me fully furnished, you get to skip the entire "where do we put the sofa, why is delivery six weeks out, and who forgot to measure the stairwell?" chapter of moving. I'm ready to live in, ready to host in, and ready to make your transition into Culver City feel a lot more polished.  Let's start with my favorite room to show off: the kitchen. I'm talking stone waterfall counters, custom cabinetry, oversized island, Viking range, Thermador touch-control refrigeration, commercial oven, range hood, and the kind of large open floor plan that says, "Yes, you can host dinner, pour wine, supervise homework, and still have room for dramatic pacing."  My living room brings the charm with a gas fireplace, while upstairs you'll find a laundry room with modern appliances, folding space, and storage  because chaos is for other addresses.  My custom window coverings and high-efficiency double-pane windows help keep things polished and practical, and my terra cotta tile roof brings the Mediterranean story home. Outside, I offer a gated yard with turf, a 2-car attached garage with extra storage, plus 2 additional off-street driveway spaces behind gated access. Translation: parking, privacy, and less passive-aggressive street-sweeping drama.  Now let's address my most obvious character trait: I face the 405 freeway, and yes, you will notice it. If you want a home that pretends the freeway doesn't exist, I may not be your soulmate. But if you want a beautifully upgraded, newer, spacious Culver City home with style, function, convenience, parking, privacy, and serious value potential, then we should absolutely keep talking.  I'm for the buyer who understands opportunity. I'm for the tenant who values comfort and convenience. I'm for the person who can look at the whole picture and say, "Wait a minute there may be something very interesting here."  And speaking of location, I'm tucked into Sunkist Park, known for its tree-lined residential feel, and I'm close to El Marino Park, El Marino Language School, the Culver City Unified School District, the Ballona Creek Bike Path, the 405, and the Marina Freeway  which means getting around town, getting outside, or getting the kids to school all gets a lot easier.  So here's the story: I'm stylish, upgraded, self-aware, and sitting in a strong Culver City location. I have a great February appraisal showing value, a seller relocating for work, and a new auction-style list price designed to create urgency, attention, and competition.  Buy me. Lease me fully furnished. Either way, I'm ready.  May the best buyer win.  Let's do this.

remarks: Located at 1017 N Croft Avenue, The Croft @ WeHo presents fresh, contemporary living central to the best of West Hollywood, offering a variety of floor plans ranging from spacious one-bedroom, one-bathroom residences to expansive three-bedroom, three-bath apartment homes. Crafted by Labyrinth Design Studio, each of these 16 eye-catching, modern residences is single-story, presents a patio or balcony and ranges from 800 to 2,220 square feet. Residences are spread throughout four levels, with a panoramic community rooftop deck highlighting exquisite views of the Los Angeles skyline and the Hollywood Hills. Interior design features include 8- to 12-foot ceiling heights, white oak engineered hardwood floors, abundant natural light and Nest doorbells. Primary bedrooms showcase built-in closets and Fleetwood sliding doors. Spa-like bathrooms feature sleek tile-and-quartz finishes and Kohler fixtures. Contemporary culinary kitchens offer quartz countertops, porcelain backsplashes and Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances. Smart building security is built-in with Butterfly MX entry systems and parking allocation offers two parking spots per residence, with bonus designated guest parking. This brand-new luxury building sits south of Santa Monica Boulevard, three short blocks north of Melrose Place and two blocks east of La Cienega. Enjoy proximity to all West Hollywood has to offer, from around-the-corner supermarkets like Gelson's and Sprouts to local restaurants and bars that include MelrosePlace, Catch Steak, Employees Only and Delilah. Boutique gyms abound nearby, including Equinox, F45 and Barry's. Please be advised that photos could be of alternate units.

remarks: Nestled in Palomares Hills, one of the East Bay's most coveted communities, this sunny end-unit home, characterized by soaring ceilings and an abundance of natural light, offers an elevated lifestyle in a serene, rolling-hill setting. The spacious living and dining areas flow seamlessly together, creating an airy atmosphere perfect for everything from elegant entertaining to cozy movie nights. For your guests the main floor offers a half bath just off the living room. At the heart of the home is a stylishly updated kitchen, featuring sleek granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. The floor plan is thoughtfully designed with two primary ensuite bedrooms, both boasting updated, modern bathrooms. The main suite serves as a private retreat, complete with a walk-in closet and a luxurious, oversized shower. Step outside to a private, low-maintenance oasis where the fenced backyard features synthetic grass and a stone patio, offering a peaceful space for outdoor relaxation. Beyond the front door, you are just steps away from world-class amenities, including a resort-style pool, clubhouse, tennis and pickleball courts, basketball and baseball fields, and scenic hiking trails. With the award-winning Jensen Ranch Elementary just down the road and quick access to BART and major freeways, this home offers the rare combination of a peaceful retreat and an effortless commute. Modern, updated, and perfectly positioned. This one truly has it all.

remarks: Discover modern luxury in this recently constructed North Hollywood home, nestled in the highly desirable Laurel Grove pocket. This 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom residence also includes a 1-bedroom, 1-bath ADU, offering exceptional flexibility and value. Enjoy spacious, light-filled interiors with soaring 10-foot ceilings and custom finishes throughout. Expansive living and entertaining areas seamlessly flow to a stunning patio and yard, complete with a brand-new pool and spa-perfect for effortless indoor-outdoor living. Designed with both comfort and efficiency in mind, the property features paid-off solar panels, low-maintenance synthetic grass, and a top-tier camera, security, and speaker system. Ideally located near shopping, transportation, houses of worship, and just moments from the recently updated Laurel Grove Park. Don't miss this opportunity to experience contemporary living in one of North Hollywood's most sought-after neighborhoods.

remarks: Located on a cul-de-sac in the beautiful Silverleaf neighborhood, this quality Citation-built 4-bed/ 2-1/2 bath home offers exceptional comfort, style & craftsmanship thru-out. The front door opens to a grand entry overlooking the formal living & dining rooms, creating a dramatic & welcoming first impression. Thoughtfully updated, the home features designer finishes that blend timeless quality with modern sophistication. The gourmet kitchen is truly a chef's dream, designed for both everyday living & entertaining. It features stone countertops, premium appliances, a garden window & an impressive 48" luxury Thermador gas range. The breakfast nook & dining bar are adjacent to the family room, complete with a cozy wood-burning fireplace & views of the expansive backyard, redwood deck, & playhouse/bonus structure. 4 bedrooms, including the spacious primary suite, are located on the 2nd level, creating a functional & private living arrangement. All baths & the indoor laundry room have been beautifully remodeled, bringing a cohesive sense of style & consistency throughout the home. Additional highlights: vaulted ceilings, ceiling fans, dual pane windows, AC for year-round comfort & an attached 2 car garage fully lined w/ custom cabinetry for the ultimate in storage & organization!

remarks:
Exceptional Equestrian estate set on just over 14 acres in desirable Kelseyville, this private country retreat is surrounded by established vineyards and captures the essence of Wine Country living. 
The custom single-level home offers approximately 2,173 square feet with 3 bedrooms and 2 baths, thoughtfully designed for both comfort and style. A picturesque wraparound covered porch welcomes you in and provides the perfect place to take in the serene setting. 
Inside, the open-concept layout showcases a spacious kitchen and living area with soaring ceilings, rich alder cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and gorgeous slab countertops that combine beauty with functionality. Brand new flooring and recently painted interior, creating a warm and cohesive feel.
The expansive primary suite is a true retreat, featuring an oversized walk-in closet along with a spa-like bathroom complete with a walk-in tiled shower and an oversized soaking tub. As well as direct access to the wrap around covered deck. 
The hall bathroom is equally impressive, offering a generously sized layout and a striking floor-to-ceiling tiled shower with a sleek glass enclosure.
Outdoors, the property offers a rare blend of privacy, beauty, and usability.  
A large, level area behind the home is ideal for a future pool, outdoor entertaining space, or expansive lawn. 
Equestrian amenities include a 3-stall stable with corral, an additional corral, and a round pen, making it well-suited for horse enthusiasts. 
Two 5,000-gallon non-potable water storage tanks add valuable utility for land maintenance and agricultural use. Mature oak trees and established landscaping further enhance the natural setting.
Conveniently located just off Highway 29, the property offers easy access while maintaining a peaceful, tucked-away feel. An oversized attached two-car garage provides ample space, along with additional room for boat or RV parking. The home is serviced by a private well and septic system, with the well recently rebuilt to include a new pump, pressure tank, and updated electrical components.
Located just minutes from downtown Kelseyville, as well as local schools and shopping, this exceptional property offers the perfect balance of privacy, convenience, and stunning Wine Country surroundings.

remarks: Welcome to a New York-style loft in Downtown LA. The 2-bedroom loft is in a Landmark building. Unique to the Little Tokyo Lofts, the bedrooms are enclosed. The loft features architectural elements such as a semi-open floor plan with an original oversized steel casement window facing West. The window renders a stunning WOW-view of the Downtown L.A. skyline. The loft is a quiet and peaceful retreat from the hustle and bustle of the city. Watch the sunset from the comfort of your living room, kitchen or bedroom. Step into tall gallery walls, hardwood floors, 12 ft. ceilings, exposed beams and original columns. Natural light emanates throughout. One bedroom is enclosed with custom hidden doors disguised as a bookcase. The secret duo-doors add style and function as they open wide blending seamlessly into the semi-open floor plan. The kitchen is fully equipped with stainless steel appliances. The bathroom features a large soaking tub and washer & dryer. Bonus feature: 2 parking spaces on title. In addition, rare for Downtown L.A., there are 25 guest parking spaces on-site. Centrally located and walkable to any neighborhood in DTLA. Building amenities include 24/7 security, an open-air lounge patio, a heated pool and hot tub, barbecue area, fitness room and dog run. Adjacent to Little Tokyo - which is now 1-of-3 remaining historic Japantowns left in the nation. Bordered by the Arts District, an eclectic neighborhood with a diverse range of Michelin star restaurants, concept coffee shops, breweries and world class museums. Exploring the city is easy with a Metro Bike Share Station outside the buildings front doors. Near public transportation and easy access to freeways. The Little Tokyo Lofts is a six-story condominium building. The building stands as a testament to the industrial history of Downtown Los Angeles. Originally constructed in 1922 as the Westinghouse Electric Company, the trademark historic Art Deco building was transformed into residential lofts in 2006, offering a blend of historic charm and modern living.

remarks: Charming family home with a spacious backyard offering endless possibilities for outdoor living, entertaining, gardening, or future expansion. remarks: HUGE PRICE IMPROVEMENT! BRING OFFERS!!! 77.06 total acres - (PLUS additional adjacent parcels are available making LOT LINE ADJUSTMENTS IDEAL)!!! Having more than one parcel is optimal for lot-line adjustments or reconfigurations to increase overall future value, or for selling reworked portions separately. This property is off-grid but has a well and was homesteaded in 1939; FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT signed the grant deed! A small, modest cabin on-site appears to predate the San Diego permitting process, which began in 1950. The home is not currently habitable or bank-lendable as a residence, but it's the start of something! For a hunting cabin or glamping, it's just right! The Chihuahua Creek runs through the length of the property (a tributary to the Temecula Creek and Santa Margarita River system), and the acreage is replete with massive oak groves, sycamore, cottonwood, and willow. Wildlife includes deer, turkey, quail, bobcat, and more. Public domain lands border acreage to the south and west. The land is terraced, with a rough driveway that winds up to the upper elevations, where you can see out over the oak forest and out to Oak Grove and Palomar toward Temecula. Enhancing access to the upper portions opens you up for livestock grazing, as you would be right against public domain lands. This land is your land! Come and get it, Pioneer!

remarks: Amazing one of a kind property! This exclusive, serene self-sustaining tropical paradise awaits you! Perfect for a secluded family compound/retreat and those who appreciate the beauty and value of this rare find. Welcome to this spectacular 7,783sf single level estate plus 1,945sf 5BR/3.5BA guest house high in the hills of Vista on 3.88 private acres w/panoramic ocean and mountain views! Mature palm trees line the 400ft long driveway leading to the lush tropical setting of pure oasis. The resort-style indoor salt-water pool is housed in a 2,300sf building w/soaring ceilings, skylights and large windows w/sweeping views! The pool house has a dual heat and air system, air changes every 7 minutes, a dressing room, full bath and is climate controlled via solar panels. A dramatic rotunda connects the pool house to the main home. The flow of the home is ideal for large gatherings and entertaining. Features include beautiful wood inlaid floors, open beamed ceilings, a large chef's kitchen w/granite, maple counters, Travertine floors and a 1,000sf play room or convert to another master suite or guest quarters. Large multi-level 6,000+sf decks overlook the lighted sand volleyball court. The true beauty of this property is the amazing grounds like no other boasting mature subtropical fruit trees from around the world. Also included is your own 1,500ft well and 60 panel electric solar system. The property has an extensive water irrigation system including three 5,000 gal reserve water tanks with full delivery system. Separate meters for the house, guest house and well. Currently an exotic fruit nursery, the 10,000+ potted fruit trees and inground nursery trees to be purchased separately. The year round warm and temperate Vista climate compliments this fantastic estate!

remarks: Charming Single-Level Home in Historic Talmadge.  Welcome to this beautifully revitalized single-level home in the highly sought-after historic  neighborhood of Talmadge. Situated on a desirable corner lot, this move-in-ready residence offers 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 1,396 square feet of thoughtfully refreshed living space.  Step inside to discover refinished hardwood floors throughout most of the home, complemented by new luxury vinyl plank flooring in the kitchen and laundry areas. The light filled interior has been freshly painted and enhanced with new LED lighting and ceiling fans throughout, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere. A brand-new furnace provides added peace of mind.  Outside, the improvements continue with fresh exterior paint, new gutters, a new irrigation system, and lush new grass that enhances the home’s curb appeal. The spacious front yard and expansive backyard offer endless possibilities, with ample room for a pool, an ADU, or the outdoor entertaining space of your dreams. A detached two-car garage provides additional  storage and flexibility.  Beyond the property itself, the location is truly special. Situated in San Diego’s historic Talmadge neighborhood, this home is part of one of the city’s most architecturally distinctive communities. Established in 1925 and named for the famous Talmadge sisters of silent-film fame, Talmadge is celebrated for its character homes, mature tree-lined streets, and iconic historic gates. The neighborhood’s rich Hollywood heritage, timeless charm, and strong sense  of community continue to make it one of San Diego’s most sought-after residential enclaves.  Combining classic character, thoughtfully improved interiors, generous outdoor space, and an exceptional location, this turnkey home offers a rare opportunity to enjoy the best of historic San Diego living.  Don’t miss your chance to own a beautifully refreshed home with room to grow in one of San Diego’s most treasured neighborhoods.

A private gated entry to property leads up a tree lined driveway to the very large parking pad in front of the home.  Property has ample space to add a vineyard, orchard, small equestrian area, pool etc.  Front of home is landscaped, and accented by the double solid wood doors entering into a very large foyer with high ceilings and cupola for added light.  5 bedrooms are located on the east wing of the home, formal Living and dining room along the back boasting panoramic views and double sided fireplace. Across from them is the one of a kind wine room, with stone walled interior, lighted and refrigerated  wine storage for approximately 1200 bottles,  along with a wet bar.  Open concept Fireplaced family room, eat-in area, gourmet kitchen, over sized pantry, laundry, and 6th Bedroom/casita make up the West Wing of the home.  Kitchen has Wolf/Subzero/Cove appliances, Miele Coffee Machine, oversized island and custom cabinets.  Casita could be used as the 6th Bedroom, office, craft room, or media room, and has its own door to the front walk way. Oversized three car garage, fenced dog run.  Huge Wrap around logia style patio accents the side and back yards leading to the amazing panoramic views.  Home has HALO water softener, whole house back-up GENERAC generator, 50 solar panels. Listing Agent is the seller and is a licensed Real Estate Broker.

remarks: 51 North N Street isn’t just a home—it’s your ticket to the ultimate downtown Livermore lifestyle. Built in 2022, this sleek, energy-efficient end unit is all about modern vibes and sustainable living. With only one shared wall, you’ll have all the privacy you need while still being in the heart of the action. Plus, at 2,150 square feet, there’s room to live large, entertain, and make it your own.  The kitchen? Total goals. A massive island anchors the space—ideal for everything from morning coffee to hosting impromptu wine nights. Loads of cabinets mean you’ll never run out of storage, and the nearly brand-new design is as chic as it is functional. Every corner of this home is packed with thoughtful details that make life easier and so much better.  Now, let’s talk location—because it doesn’t get cooler than this. Go outside, and you’re right in the middle of Livermore’s buzzing downtown scene. Grab a bite at local hotspots, browse the unique shops, or sip your way through world-class wine tasting rooms—all just minutes from your door. Outdoor lover? Parks are just around the corner. Need to commute? Easy peasy.  Oh, and the HOA’s got your back, covering hazard insurance, structure, and roof, so you can spend more time enjoying life and less time worrying about the details.  Stylish, eco-friendly, and perfectly located—this is downtown living done right. Don’t sleep on this one!

remarks: A beautifully reimagined contemporary one story residence offering over 2,800 square feet of thoughtfully designed living. Expanded and renovated to feel like new construction, this four bedroom home combines open concept design with practical upgrades that add lasting value. Each bedroom features its own en suite bath, along with a separate powder room for guests. Just off the entry, a private suite provides flexibility for a home office, guest retreat, or multigenerational living. The open great room is anchored by a chef's kitchen with stainless steel appliances and an oversized center island that flows seamlessly into the dining and living areas. Soaring ceilings and custom built-ins with integrated lighting create architectural presence, while expansive sliding doors open to the backyard for true indoor outdoor living. The exterior has been enhanced with low maintenance turf in both the front and rear yards, newly landscaped grounds, and a fully replaced backyard fence alongside of the house perimeter for privacy. Wide plank Nordic Brazilian hardwood floors, recessed LED lighting, premium fixtures, and automated irrigation complete the offering.Located near highly regarded Kester Elementary and just minutes from the Westside, LAX, and the best dining and shopping in Sherman Oaks, Encino, and Studio City, this is a turnkey opportunity in one of the Valley's most desirable neighborhoods.

remarks: Secluded Mendocino Coastal Retreat Near Highway 1. Conveniently located minutes from Highway 1 and the charming, historic town of Mendocino, this private, elegant residence blends practical luxury with coastal serenity. Built in 2002, but feels like new! A permitted ADU sits at the heart of the property, offering sophisticated income potential or a private guest suite, each with its own power and propane meters to preserve the main residence's unobstructed views. The main home itself is designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living, with a wraparound redwood deck flowing to a flagstone patio crowned by a tasteful fire pit and shaded by towering coastal redwoods for serene privacy.A four-car detached garage provides ample storage, versatile workspace, and generous parking options. With five roll-up doors, a sleeping loft, built-in office area, and additional space for hobbies or entertaining, it's ideal for a home workshop, collector cars, or multi-use living.A gated entrance with extensive gravel parking enhances privacy and convenience, including generous room for RVs and trailers. The Albion redwoods frame a mature orchard and thoughtfully finished interiors, while climate control is reliable with a Fujitsu mini-split system and a propane/electric Runtal heater to balance comfort on cooler nights. Two robust wells supply ample water for the residence and irrigation, supporting a thriving garden and plantings.This Mendocino Coast gem blends practical features with timeless beauty, offering luxury, comfort, and seclusion in a coastal, tranquil setting.

remarks: Set high on one of the Covenant’s most sought-after streets, this private compound occupies a rare vantage point,capturing long southwestern views, evening light, ocean breezes, and a glimpse of the Pacific beyond the mountains. Spanning more than three gated acres, the property unfolds less as a traditional residence and more as a series of environments,spaces to gather, retreat, and create. The main living areas are defined by scale and natural light, complemented by a theatre, a library lounge with bar, and an attached guest residence. The primary suite occupies its own vantage point, opening to a private veranda with tranquil views. Throughout the home, rooms are positioned to engage the landscape rather than compete with it. The kitchen is designed for both daily use and larger gatherings, with commercial-grade appliances, marble surfaces, and seamless connection to surrounding living and outdoor dining spaces.The grounds are a defining element. Developed over time as a botanical landscape, the property weaves together mature trees with plantings of lavender, plumeria, jacaranda, and citrus. Meandering pathways reveal shifting perspectives and moments of discovery, including a koi pond tucked within the gardens. Anchoring the landscape are elements that lend a sense of permanence: an 18th-century stone fountain, century-old Dracaena draco, and sculptural quiver trees set naturally within the terrain. The pool, spa, and outdoor living spaces are positioned within this landscape rather than apart from it, creating a setting that feels discovered rather than designed.CONT  A tennis court, orchards, and productive gardens extend the experience—offering not just amenities, but a way of living that is active, self-sustaining, and creatively enriching. This is not a house for everyone. It is for someone who values beauty, privacy, and a property that inspires.

remarks: Perched in a picturesque setting, this single-level ranch-style home is thoughtfully designed to capture sweeping mountain, ocean, and island views from nearly every angle, creating a breathtaking backdrop for everyday living. Updated in 2025, the home's seamless layout is perfectly suited for both entertaining and relaxed coastal living, with floor-to-ceiling nano doors that seamlessly extend the interior to a spacious patio complete with an outdoor kitchen, fireplace, and pizza oven. The open concept kitchen features a Wolf range, Sub-Zero wine refrigerator, an island with seating, and a pass-through window that extends the kitchen to an outdoor counter blending elevated style with everyday functionality. Offering four bedrooms and two bathrooms, the primary suite is situated onit's own wing, offering a peaceful retreat with sweeping mountain and ocean views. Modern amenities include heated floors in the primary suite bathroom, Tesla solar with battery and universal in-garage charging station, and new HVAC system enhancing both efficiency and convenience. The grounds are equally impressive, with lush landscaping, a sprawling lawn, fruit trees including apple, guava, peach, and nectarine, and vegetable beds. Ample parking is provided by a two-car garage and a circular driveway. Ideally located near scenic hiking trails, the Santa Barbara Botanical Gardens, and Santa Barbara Mission, this home embodies the very best of Santa Barbara living, where comfort, beauty, and lifestyle come together in effortless harmony.

remarks: Getaway from the intense summer heat and enjoy the warm fertile foothills -Over 15 acres and a 2-bedroom, 1.5 bath custom house on a mountain oasis. Spring-fed non-chlorinated concrete pond/wading pool, outdoor bathtub, heirloom apples, figs, peach trees, and a thicket of cherries spreading along the creek. Seller runs a successful licensed doggy daycare/cage free pet boarding business on the property and has a 5 acre area fenced for the dogs. They have also developed many trails for the dog walks and mountain bike rides. This property has so much potential to be a self-sufficient homestead. Seller has always dreamed of capturing some of the spring water and a large pond could be added with some clearing and dam work on the 10 acres above the road. An organic garden with raised beds is nicely fenced. There are many peaceful sitting areas to be serenaded by the frogs and flowing water. Downstairs living room, kitchen and bathroom were remodeled in 2019 using lumber milled from a large ponderosa pine and cedar trees that had fallen on the property. Whether you're looking for a Bohemian artist retreat, or self-sufficient farmstead this place has it all! Good soils, private well, lots of privacy, yet only 15 miles from the bustling college town of Chico: offering hospitals, schools, year-round farmer's markets, and thriving music/art scene. Giant oversized outdoor swing set looks over the seasonal creek in the front yard. Wood stove provides a heat source on beautiful snowy winter nights.  Because of shade trees, 2,960-foot elevation and a whole house fan, seller has not installed air conditioning. Corrals for sheep, goats, chickens, or horses. There is a barn and shed for storage, animals, or livestock. Besides the stream and spring on the property, there is a large amount of precipitation that keeps the forest lush. Circular driveway and many parking places with plenty of room to park RVs, boats, trailers, etc. Hollow Oak drive passes through the property making easy access to most areas of the property allowing for other potential homesites. Alaskan Lumber mill may be purchased separately. USDA Hardiness Zone 9b

remarks: 5 private acres, two blocks from Joshua Tree. 2,200+ sq ft of usable space. A dreamy 1956 mid-century desert home just two blocks west of the Joshua Tree border, set on 5 private acres of open high desert. Inside: 3 bedrooms bathed in afternoon sun, 1 bath, and a spacious open-concept living and dining area with polished concrete floors and spectacular aggregate. A vintage wood stove and brand-new ductless heating and cooling keep it comfortable year-round. French doors and walk-in closets throughout. The real story is the attached 770+ sq ft garage. The original owner built an airplane in it. Workshop, yoga studio, wellness space, or possible ADU conversion. Together with the home, that's over 2,200 sq ft of usable space. Two detached 120 sq ft sheds with built-in shelving add dedicated storage. Outside, two giant decades-old saguaro cacti and a majestic 100+ year-old Joshua tree anchor a landscape of yucca, ocotillo, barrel cactus, mulberry, Palo Verde, and fan palms, with mountain views beyond. Electric sunsets every evening, meteor showers, and dark starry nights with minimal light pollution. Your own peaceful sanctuary to ground yourself away from the city. Public water on 5 acres. No well, no hauled water, no HOA. Minutes from Downtown Joshua Tree, Giant Rock, the Integratron, and La Copine restaurant. Full-time home. Weekend retreat. Creative compound. Come for a weekend and you'll never want to leave.

remarks: Welcome to 1615 Coban Rd, an architectural dream home. This iconic mid-century modern "Eichler" style residence features floor-to-ceiling glass walls, an open floor plan, and a central atrium designed to bring the outside in. This single-level home offers 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, blending architectural integrity with modern comfort. The property has been updated with a new kitchen, flooring, fixtures, and lighting. The living areas flow together in a "front-to-back" design, moving the heart of the home to the rear for maximum privacy. While the street-facing facade is purposefully opaque to ensure seclusion, the back of the home opens entirely to the outdoors. Situated on a lot with plenty of usable land, the exterior features an infinity pool, lush landscaping, and a brick outdoor fireplace. The wide open views are amazing and give you clear lines of sight towards sparkling city lights, Catalina Island & the Pacific Ocean, and the many rolling hillsides of Orange County. Set back from a private road with ample parking, this home offers a peaceful retreat and a strong connection to nature.

remarks:
118± acres of Northern California ranch living with refined interior finishes and exceptional infrastructure. This 4-bed, 3.5-bath residence features marble countertops throughout, an open-concept kitchen with center island, bar seating, and generous storage. The family room adjoins the kitchen and includes a wood-burning fireplace and sliding glass doors opening to mountain views. A separate living room provides additional space for daily living. Each bedroom is individually climate-controlled via mini-split systems. The primary suite offers dual sinks and a well-appointed bath. A bonus room above the 4-car garage is suitable for office, guest, or flex use.
Property is fully cross-fenced and currently supports approx. 7 cows and 1 bull (born on-site, available to convey). Seasonal pond, natural year-round spring, and miles of drivable trails throughout the acreage. Two high-producing wells (approx. 42 GPM — buyer to verify) with solar-powered irrigation. Owned solar array with battery backup powers the entire property. Additional structures include an older mobile unit used for garden/storage and a dedicated alfalfa barn area. Custom outdoor shower on site. Abundant firewood. RV/boat parking available. Washer and dryer included.
Suitable for primary residence, working ranch, multi-generational use, or short-term rental opportunity. Buyer to verify all data including acreage, GPM, and permitted uses with applicable county agencies.
$115,000 premium off-grid solar system:• 12.42 kW solar array (36 SolarWorld panels)• 61.2 kWh lithium battery bank (18 Simpliphi modules)• Dual Outback 8 kW inverter-chargers• Four Outback FlexMax 80 controllers• 16 kW Generac propane backup generator• Ground-mounted IronRidge system
This system stores over 61 kWh and produces 12.42 kW of solar  more than enough to power the entire home comfortably with full off-grid capability.

remarks: Tucked behind privacy hedges and a landscaped wall, this private, lot opens dramatically to sweeping views of the golf course, shimmering lakes, waterfalls, fountains, and the Santa Rosa Mountains beyond. It's a scene you'll never tire of--especially from the comfort of your 8-seat outdoor lounge and dining area.The centerpiece of the lot is a large L-shaped Alumawood pergola, thoughtfully designed for both entertaining and relaxation. It features three ceiling fans, four ceiling heaters, drop lights, sconces, and a built-in entertainment center with a protective roll-down cover for your TV. Whether it's morning coffee or sunset cocktails, this space delivers year-round comfort and ambiance.The expansive kitchen includes a kitchen island with a built-in bar (seating for four), full-size fridge, pantry, and BBQ--ideal for everything from quick bites to gourmet gatherings. A landscaped pet-friendly area ensures four-legged guests feel right at home, too.This is more than a lot--it's an extension of your motorcoach lifestyle, designed for those who value space, scenery, and high-end outdoor living.Outdoor Resort Indio is a Class A RV only resort.

remarks: Hidden in the wooded folds between Oakland and Moraga, this former Stationmaster’s home is one of Canyon’s most eclectic retreats, a redwood cabin perched above a ravine where light, air, and creativity converge.  Reached by a narrow, winding footpath through the trees, the setting is intentionally secluded and deeply connected to its surroundings.  Inside, rustic board-and-batten rooms open to forest-view decks, with a vintage Wedgewood stove and a river-rock fireplace anchoring the main living spaces.  Three bedrooms are linked by ship-style ladders, reinforcing the home’s unconventional layout and sense of adventure.  Water flows from a private spring, with electrical and propane service supporting daily living.  A separate meditation loft above the washhouse offers a quiet space for writing, painting, or reflection.  This is a property for those seeking something outside the ordinary - an authentic blend of history, artistry, and nature.  Just minutes from Moraga, Oakland, and San Francisco, yet a world apart.

remarks:
BEST PRICE IN TOWN! LOCATION! LOCATION! LOCATION!

Welcome to 11681 Compass Point Unit 7, a beautifully maintained home in the highly desirable Las Casitas community of Mira Mesa. Ideally situated bordering Scripps Ranch and just minutes from Rancho Peñasquitos, Sorrento Valley, UTC, La Jolla, and Miramar, this exceptional location places shopping, dining, recreation, and major employment centers right at your doorstep.

Perfectly positioned near San Diego’s thriving technology, biotech, life science, defense, and innovation corridor, this home offers convenient access to Qualcomm and numerous leading employers throughout Sorrento Valley and UTC, including Google, Amazon, Apple, ServiceNow, Dexcom, and many other world-class technology and biotech companies. Easy access to MCAS Miramar, I-15, I-805, SR-52, and SR-56 makes commuting throughout San Diego simple and convenient.

This newer-built community offers a more modern feel than many surrounding Mira Mesa neighborhoods and features desirable amenities including a community tennis court, park, playground, greenbelt areas, and beautifully maintained grounds.

The well-maintained home showcases numerous upgrades, including tile flooring throughout, fresh interior paint, mirrored closet doors, updated kitchen countertops and backsplash, upgraded lighting and ceiling fans, new faucets, water-efficient toilets, new window blinds, an upgraded front door lock, and other thoughtful improvements throughout. The open-concept living and dining area provides a bright and inviting space for both everyday living and entertaining.

Abundant natural light fills the home, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Step outside to enjoy the beautiful garden, perfect for relaxing, gardening, or entertaining guests. Conveniently located near Mira Mesa Market Center, H Mart, Trader Joe’s, Sprouts, Vons, Target, Home Depot, Edwards Mira Mesa Stadium 18, Lake Miramar, Hourglass Community Park, popular restaurants, coffee shops, fitness centers, and countless everyday conveniences.

Whether you’re a first-time buyer, downsizing, or looking for an excellent investment opportunity, this home checks all the boxes: location, upgrades, amenities, lifestyle, and value. All offers are welcome. Don’t miss this opportunity to own a beautiful home in one of San Diego’s most convenient and sought-after communities. Come see it today before it’s gone!

remarks: Back on the Market — No Fault of the Property! The buyers got cold feet, and their loss is absolutely your gain. Not only is this stunning off-grid retreat available again, but it comes back to market with two added bonuses — the septic is now certified and the well has been inspected. Wake up to 180° unobstructed views stretching from the Coronado Bridge and Point Loma Peninsula to Mt. Woodson and the Pacific — all from your own 2.94-acre retreat in the heart of Julian's celebrated Dark Sky community. This 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom home offers 1,631 sq ft of warm, thoughtfully appointed living space featuring real hardwood floors, zoned mini split heating and air conditioning, a wood-burning stove, and a kitchen with granite countertops and generous storage. Step onto the rear deck and let the views — and the stars — speak for themselves. The upper level is home to a private primary suite — a true retreat with a beautifully updated bathroom featuring a walk-in shower. The second bedroom and full bathroom are located on the lower level, offering excellent separation and privacy for guests, family, or a home office setup. Completely off-grid and built for full-time living. The property includes a private well and a professionally installed solar energy system: 18 high-efficiency Q Cells panels (6.12 kW total capacity) capable of generating 25–35 kWh daily, backed by three Discover lithium battery units totaling 22.2 kWh of storage. True energy independence, day and night. This property delivers the rare combination of modern comfort, self-sufficiency, and breathtaking beauty!  Julian is a charming historic town nestled in the Cuyamaca Mountains, about an hour east ofSan Diego. Known for its small-town charm, gold rush history, and famous apple orchards,Julian is a popular getaway for those looking to enjoy fresh mountain air, scenic landscapes, and a slower pace of life. Real estate in Julian ranges from historic cabins to modern mountain retreats, making it an ideal location for those looking for a peaceful, nature-filled lifestyle with easy access to San Diego and Orange County.

remarks:
First time on the market in 28 years, this is a rare opportunity for an owner occupant to live in one unit while the others pay your mortgage. The property features two legal units — a 2 bed/1 bath front unit and a 3 bed/1 bath back unit — plus a non conforming 2 bed/1 bath garage conversion in the rear that has been fully built out with a complete kitchen, in unit laundry, and its own private covered patio. Whether you move into the spacious 3 bedroom back unit and collect rent from the front and rear, or configure the setup to fit your household's needs, the income from the other units will go a long way toward offsetting your carrying costs.
Long term tenants are already in place, so day one cash flow is built in. Five surface parking spaces, three along the side driveway and two marked spaces in front, keep things practical for everyone on site. The marketed square footage reflects the two legal units only and does not include the non conforming rear unit — buyer and agents to confirm all details.
The location does the heavy lifting on tenant demand. LAX, the Inglewood stadiums, South Bay hospitals, major retail corridors, and a dense base of service, trade, and light industrial employers are all within easy reach, with Downtown LA a straightforward freeway commute away. This is the kind of pocket that attracts stable, working tenants who need quality housing close to where they work — which is exactly what makes this a property worth holding for the long term.

remarks: In the heart of Santa Ynez sits a piece of paradise; an extraordinary 7.23-acre ranch estate that is truly an entertainer's dream haven. Framed by breathtaking mountain and valley views, the centerpiece of this valley oasis is a magnificent 1.2-acre lake. The beautifully landscaped grounds feature gravel paved walkways and rock-lined water features with wooden bridges, leading to a scenic lake-view deck and a private dock offering direct access to pedal boats, canoes, and kayaks. For equestrian enthusiasts, a 4-stall barn includes a tack room and a riding arena. The grounds boast a thriving 450-tree orchard with a diverse variety of fruits and nuts, as well as four distinct varieties of table grapevines, and a flourishing garden bursting with berries, tomatoes, broccoli, mint, and more. Two charming gazebos offer idyllic spots to take in the scenery that is supported by a private water well. The estate features a 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom main house of +/-2,076 square feet surrounded by wrap-around porches and decks that include a private, in-deck spa. A versatile 4-car garage setup, split into two 2-car garages with a shared laundry room and half-bath between them, is topped by a +/-815 square foot guest house, perfect for extended family or visitors. Engineered for self-sufficiency and peace of mind, the estate is supported by a high-yielding private well, two independent septic systems, and a robust solar energy system. Ruff Ranch, a canine boarding and training facility operates on a separated portion of the property.  Whether envisioned as a family compound, a working ranch, or a savvy investment, this Santa Ynez masterpiece offers a lifestyle of absolute freedom and abundance.

remarks: Re-launched artistic beauty. Or your reimagined space of luxury.  Set along iconic Wilshire Boulevard, this beautifully designed 3-bedroom, 3.25-bath condo blends architectural flair with everyday comfort in a way that just feels right. The living room is the heart of the home, filled with natural light from oversized windows and anchored by a striking textured accent wall that adds both warmth and character. Just a few steps up, the dining area flows effortlessly into the kitchen, making the space ideal for hosting friends or enjoying quiet nights in. remarks:
BACK ON THE MARKET! Discover a truly awe-inspiring mountain retreat meticulously crafted by its original owners. This exceptional property, perched near the peak of Desert Front Road in Wrightwood, offers breathtaking 360-degree views and an unparalleled mountain living experience.
As you approach via Oak Valley Springs Rd, an impressive double swinging wrought iron fence welcomes you to this 2.4-acre haven. Step inside to find a luxurious log cabin-style interior spanning 1,458 sq ft, with an additional upstairs loft for extra sleeping quarters.
The gourmet kitchen is a chef's dream, featuring a commercial-style cooktop, eye-catching range hood, and complete stainless steel appliances. Luxurious whole-piece granite counters and backsplash add a touch of elegance. The primary suite includes an ensuite bathroom with a shower for ultimate convenience and privacy.
The dramatic living room is highlighted by a floor-to-ceiling stone fireplace adorned with a massive moose head, creating a true mountain ambiance. A versatile downstairs den, perfect as an additional bedroom, opens to the front porch. Upstairs, discover two lofts overlooking the dining area and fireplace, offering a cozy seating area and a potential third bedroom.
Step outside to find an outdoor oasis featuring multiple seating areas, a spa, barbecue, and custom outdoor wood-burning stove. Explore the property's rolling trails lined with gravel, mature trees, and indigenous foliage. Enjoy numerous trails and sitting areas throughout the property, including view points and charming outdoor décor. A standout feature is the railway and mine shaft emerging from the hillside, complete with skeleton-themed characters guarding the entrance.
Multiple containers on-site cater to all your storage needs, ensuring ample space for your belongings and outdoor equipment.
This home truly embodies the pride of its owners, with every detail thoughtfully designed to create an inspiring and comfortable living space. Whether you're seeking a permanent residence or a mountain getaway, this property offers an unmatched blend of luxury, nature, and adventure. Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to own a piece of Wrightwood paradise!

remarks: Light, bright, and beautifully updated! This move-in ready 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home is tucked within The Crest at Calavera Hills and offers comfort, privacy, and an unbeatable Carlsbad lifestyle. Thoughtfully upgraded throughout, the home features brand new carpet and fresh interior paint, remodeled upstairs bathrooms, and a stunning remodeled kitchen completed in 2024 with a large island, Samsung dishwasher, and microwave. Additional improvements include updated front-facing and rear-facing windows, as well as a tankless water heater.  The functional floorplan places all three bedrooms upstairs along with the conveniently located laundry area. Downstairs, the spacious living room is filled with natural light and centered around a cozy fireplace, while sliding doors open to a private, low-maintenance patio space with pavers and a large outdoor storage room. With no direct rear neighbors, the home enjoys a rare sense of privacy and tranquility.  Set within the highly desirable Calavera Hills community, this home offers a unique blend of neighborhood charm and natural beauty. Residents enjoy nearby parks, scenic trails, and the peaceful surroundings of mature trees and local wildlife including hawks, owls, and a variety of birds. Summer concerts at the nearby park can even be enjoyed right from the back porch.  Located approximately four miles from the beach and with convenient access to Hwy 78 and I-5, the home is ideally situated near shopping, dining, Calavera Nature Preserve, Carlsbad Village, and highly regarded Carlsbad Unified schools. Whether you're enjoying peaceful mornings on the patio, sunset walks through the preserve, or easy weekends at the beach, this home offers the perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and the laid-back coastal lifestyle that makes Carlsbad so special.

remarks:
Welcome to an exceptional coastal residence in the prestigious guard-gated community of The Estates at Seacliff Country Club, where timeless elegance, resort-inspired outdoor living, and an enviable Huntington Beach lifestyle come together beautifully. Positioned on a desirable corner lot, this extensively upgraded home offers over 3,200 square feet of refined living space with a flexible floor plan featuring up to five bedrooms, including versatile bonus and office spaces that can easily adapt to today’s needs.
From the moment you arrive, the home impresses with its phenomenal curb appeal, custom details, and inviting sense of sophistication. Inside, rich travertine flooring, plantation shutters, custom window coverings, recessed lighting, French doors, ceiling fans, and designer finishes create a warm yet elevated atmosphere throughout. The main level is thoughtfully designed for both everyday comfort and memorable entertaining, highlighted by a granite wet bar with side-by-side wine storage and a beautifully appointed gourmet kitchen. Granite countertops, a central island, bar seating, tumbled marble accents, a Sub-Zero refrigerator, Viking range, Thermador double oven, and Dacor coffee system make this kitchen as functional as it is impressive.
The custom iron staircase adds architectural character, leading to private upper-level retreats and balconies that enhance the home’s indoor-outdoor connection. The expansive primary suite is a true sanctuary, complete with travertine finishes, a romantic fireplace, and a separate sitting area ideal for quiet mornings or evening relaxation.
The backyard is the showpiece — an entertainer’s dream designed with the feel of a private resort. The award-winning saltwater pool and spa feature custom stonework, Pebble Tec finish, three dramatic waterfalls, a Baja step, and a tiered stone spa that spills gracefully into the pool. A custom BBQ island with stainless refrigerator, beer cooler, stereo system, and tropical palapa cover creates the perfect setting for coastal gatherings, weekend lounging, and year-round Southern California entertaining.
All of this is located just moments from the beach, Seacliff Country Club, parks, dining, shopping, and the highly regarded Seacliff Elementary School area. Beautifully upgraded inside and out, this residence captures the best of luxury coastal living in one of Huntington Beach’s most sought-after gated communities.

remarks:
Welcome to 29603 Highpoint Road - Where the Coast Meets Elevated Living!
Few addresses on the Palos Verdes Peninsula command attention quite like this one. Nestled within the sought-after enclave of Miraleste Hills, this beautifully appointed 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom residence delivers the kind of panoramic ocean and harbor views that make every morning feel like a getaway — visible from nearly every room in the home.
Set on a tranquil cul-de-sac framed by mature trees and thoughtfully curated landscaping, the property offers an uncommon combination of seclusion and accessibility. Situated well over 5 miles from the landslide zone and with the fire department just minutes away, this home provides both peace of mind and peace of scenery.
Step inside and discover a flowing floor plan designed for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. The main level opens into a generous living area that transitions naturally into a formal dining space — equally suited for intimate dinners or lively gatherings. The kitchen anchors the heart of the home with rich cabinetry, granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and clean sightlines that keep the cook connected to the action. Adjacent, the family room invites you to settle in around a classic fireplace with a built-in wet bar nearby — the kind of space that guests tend to linger in.
Upstairs, four well-proportioned bedrooms offer flexibility for family, guests, or a dedicated home office. The primary suite is a true retreat — featuring a custom walk-in closet, a spa-inspired ensuite with soaking tub and walk-in shower, and a private balcony where ocean breezes and coastal vistas greet you each morning. No power lines. Just horizon.
Additional highlights include central air conditioning, a full laundry room, an attached two-car garage with storage, and generous additional parking. Outdoor living is equally impressive, with patios accessible from both the kitchen and family room — perfect for al fresco dining — plus a manicured front lawn that doubles as one of the best sunset-viewing spots in the neighborhood.
With nearly $200,000 in recent upgrades throughout and proximity to top-rated schools, premier dining, and coastal destinations, this is a rare opportunity to plant roots in one of RPV's most prestigious and enduring communities.

remarks:
Located within the prestigious guard gated enclave of Bear Brand Ranch, 12 Morning Dove is a magnificent ocean view estate that epitomizes Southern California coastal, luxury living. 
Set on approximately 1.41 acres, this extraordinary custom residence offers over 13,500 square feet of refined living space with 10 bedrooms and 11.5 bathrooms, designed to provide both grand-scale entertaining and ultimate privacy. 
A dramatic entry welcomes guests into a soaring foyer highlighted by exquisite custom woodwork and architectural detailing throughout. Expansive living spaces are filled with natural light and flow effortlessly from formal living and dining areas to relaxed family gathering spaces anchored by elegant fireplaces.
The newly remodeled chef’s kitchen is thoughtfully designed with premium appliances (Gaggenau range) and custom cabinetry, and an oversized island, creating a perfect setting for both intimate meals and large-scale entertaining. Nearby formal and informal dining spaces provide seamless functionality for hosting. A custom built formal dining table seats up to 20 for the ultimate family dinners. 
The primary suite serves as a large expansive private sanctuary, featuring a luxurious spa-inspired marble bathroom with large walk in closet, one of two in the suite. Also a second office and a private balcony overlooking the estate’s beautifully landscaped grounds and ocean view.
Many unique features within this elegant home include 2 large ensuite bedrooms that sit off a large study area complete with three built in desks and a large custom square conference table. Downstairs is the grand game room complete with a 9 seat movie theater and an authentic Japanese Tea room with custom tatami floors and Shoji sliding doors.
Designed for resort-style living, the grounds feature:
A private regulation tennis court/Pickle ball court, lit for evening play and newly resurfaced.
Resort-style pool and spa.
Multiple outdoor entertaining areas.
One bedroom/One bath casita ideal for guests.
Additional amenities include 2 garages including a 4 car garage for the car enthusiast, 290 bottle wine cellar, home gym/mirrored dance studio with full bath & ladies nail bar. Extensive patios overlooking the tennis court/grounds include a large outdoor barbecue area with outdoor fireplace.
Located just minutes from famous resorts and beaches, as well as premier dining and shopping, elevate the estate to a truly "world class" residence.

remarks: Welcome home to your own private slice of country living in the charming town of Elk Creek. This unique property offers the perfect blend of peaceful seclusion and functional ranch-style amenities, ideal for those seeking space, views, and a true rural lifestyle. Nestled off the main road for added privacy, the property features fenced pasture, multiple barns, and workshops—ready for horses, livestock, or hobby farming. A covered RV parking area adds convenience, while the inviting cabana's unique space creates the perfect setting for entertaining family and friends under the open sky. The charming, move-in ready ranch cottage offers 2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, plus a bonus room being used for a 3rd bedroom, inside laundry room, updated kitchen, and a primary suite. Equipped with central heating and air, nice wood stove, back up generator, this home combines comfort with country charm. There is potential guest quarters in the near outdoor workshop. Multiple barns, potting shed, cabana-entertainment room with wolf stove, indoor BBQ, old wood burning cookstove, antique refrigerator which is a perfect place for entertaining! Enjoy breathtaking sunrises and sunsets with sweeping views in every direction. A seasonal creek, Elk Creek, runs along side the property, adding to the natural beauty and tranquility. Outdoor enthusiasts will love the close proximity to Stony Gorge Reservoir for fishing, boating, camping, as well as nearby BLM land for ATV riding, hiking, hunting, and exploring. And when you’re ready for a night off from cooking, you’re just a short walk to the well-known Elkhorn Restaurant. Whether you're looking for a full-time residence, weekend retreat, or equestrian property, this one-of-a-kind opportunity offers space, privacy, and endless possibilities. Elk Creek is 20 minutes from Interstate 5. Buyer to verify all information to their satisfaction.

remarks: Welcome to 4721 W. Oakfield Ave, Santa Ana — a rare opportunity featuring three homes on one lot, perfect for multi-generational living or for an owner-occupant to live in one unit and rent out the other two, all at an excellent value under $700 per SF. remarks:
A rare opportunity to own a brand-new, fully detached residence within a small, thoughtfully built community in desirable Porter Ranch.
Set within a newly constructed 5-unit development on Reseda Blvd, this three bedroom, three bath home is one of three fully detached residences in the community Offering a level of privacy and separation that's uncommon in multi-unit properties, it lives like a single-family home at a more accessible price point.
The floor plan is open and well-proportioned, with a contemporary kitchen, comfortable living areas, and three generously sized bedrooms each with its own en-suite bathroom and ample closet space. One bedroom is located on the first floor, ideal for work from home or guests. The layout suits both everyday living and entertaining without feeling oversized or impractical.
Ownership is structured as a tenant in common which is a meaningful distinction from a standard condo or HOA. Each owner holds a direct ownership interest in the property, making it a strong fit for extended families, co-purchasers, or buyers seeking a true sense of ownership within a small, cohesive community.
As new construction, the home comes with all new systems, modern energy efficiency, and fewer of the maintenance concerns that come with older properties.
Conveniently located near shopping and dining at the Vineyards,highly rated schools, the Porter Ranch Town Center, with Whole Foods, an array of dining options, and everyday retail all within easy reach. Chatsworth Reservoir and the Santa Susana Mountains provide a scenic backdrop and access to outdoor recreation, while the 118 freeway connects residents quickly to the broader Valley and beyond.

Some images have been digitally enhanced, created, or edited and do no necessarily reflect the current condition of the property. More photos to come

remarks:
Located just north of the popular San Carpoforo Creek beach and 1/2 mile south of Ragged Point, 18844 Cabrillo Highway is a rare, 121 acre coastal retreat. This stunning, rural property overlooks the Pacific Ocean and is surrounded by the Los Padres National Forest, a stretch of California Coastline that is largely undeveloped. Two streams run through the property, and there is an abundance of natural vegetation, including California Coastal Sage, Chaparral & Oak Woodlands.

There are 3 structures on the property. The primary home, built in 1973, is a single-level 3,159sf 3 bedroom, 3 bath plus indoor laundry, adobe brick house. The primary living areas have high, wood-beamed ceilings, brick walls, and tile flooring. There is a beautiful wood-burning fireplace in the living room plus built-in shelving and seating areas. Multiple windows offer views of the ocean, mountains and overall property. There are multiple patio settings and an oversized 2-car garage with additional storage. A dimensional composition shingle roof is newer and the source of heat and AC in the home includes mini-splits and radiant heat. The cozy guest cottage is approximately 745sf and features 2 bedrooms and 1 bath, a living area with a wood stove and picture window, kitchen and indoor laundry. A workshop/garage and fenced garden are close by. There are panoramic ocean and mountain views from both properties.

Solar panels with Tesla batteries are installed on each home for independent, sustainable energy. There are 2 wells on the property. One well has an electric pump, and the other well runs off the windmill located on the property. Also, there is a spring above the water tank that feeds water to the tanks. A septic system services both residences.

There are a network of hiking trails across a portion of the gently sloping land. A seasonal stretch of Badger Creek flows through the property, while the remainder of the property features rugged, mountainous terrain covered in natural brush and trees. This exceptional property offers privacy and endless outdoor possibilities, with potential for agricultural, equestrian and recreational uses. Information not verified.

Welcome to 25707 Compass Way, a beautifully designed end unit home nestled in the heart of San Juan Capistrano. Offering 1,417 square feet of well-appointed living space, this home features 2 spacious bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, and a converted bedroom which is now a den providing comfort and convenience in an inviting atmosphere. Situated on a quiet cul-de-sac with beautiful views all around including some ocean views.

Upon entry, you’ll be greeted by a warm and welcoming layout enhanced by elegant travertine floors and cozy carpeted areas. The living room boasts a charming fireplace with volume ceilings, perfect for relaxing evenings or entertaining guests. The kitchen is thoughtfully designed with a functional breakfast bar, ideal for casual dining or meal prep with beautiful views towards the ocean and the San Juan Hills.  

Step outside to discover the private courtyard and patio—a tranquil retreat where you can enjoy your morning coffee, host gatherings, or simply unwind in the fresh air or watch the 4th of July fireworks from your patio. A short distance away is downtown San Juan Capistrano where you can enjoy boutique shopping, gourmet dining and cultural landmarks, including the historic Los Rios District, Mission San Juan Capistrano, River Street Marketplace and the Ecology Center farms.  

Modern amenities include central AC as well as ceiling fans to keep you comfortable year-round. Tankless water heater and water softener.

This exceptional property combines style, comfort, and functionality, all in one. Whether you're looking for a serene retreat or a space to entertain, 25707 Compass Way is the perfect place to call home. Don’t miss the chance to make this gem yours! Schedule a showing today and see everything this beautifully crafted home has to offer.

Enhanced curb appeal begins with updated paver walkways and driveway, lush professional landscaping, and a custom iron double-door entry creating a striking first impression while providing added privacy and security. Step inside to soaring vaulted ceilings, hardwood, tile and carpet flooring, recessed and track lighting, built-in surround sound speakers, and abundant natural light. The thoughtfully designed floor plan includes a desirable downstairs bedroom and bathroom ideal for guests, extended family or home office. The spacious living and dining areas offer the perfect balance of comfort and entertaining, highlighted by a granite mantle gas fireplace and separate wet bar. The expanded kitchen serves as the heart of the home featuring granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, built-in double ovens, 5-burner cooktop, microwave, dishwasher, additional service sink, built-in food warmer, generous cabinetry, and ample workspace. Upstairs, the expansive primary suite provides a private retreat with abundant space and direct access to a large balcony. Mirrored wardrobe doors, walk-in closets, and custom built-in shelving and cabinetry offer exceptional storage throughout the home. Additional outdoor highlights include a basketball court, mature landscaping, automatic sprinklers, multiple gathering areas, and professionally installed landscape lighting that illuminates both the front and rear grounds. remarks:
Tucked along a picturesque tree lined street in the heart of West Garden Grove, this exceptional Garden Park Plan 8, built by S&S Construction offers a rare opportunity to own one of the largest and most coveted floorplans in the neighborhood. Perfectly positioned directly across from Edgar Park, this 5 bedroom, 2 bathroom residence blends timeless character with elevated design, creating a true showpiece that checks all the boxes.

Lovingly maintained by the original family since 1963, the home showcases craftsmanship rarely found today, including classic lathe and plaster construction. From the moment you step inside, Saltillo tile floors set a warm, inviting tone, flowing throughout the main living spaces and leading to the downstairs bedrooms. The reimagined guest bathroom is a designer moment, featuring a Kohler Village tub, white subway tile surround, Carrera marble vanity, and seagrass wall coverings.

The interior has been elevated with smooth ceilings, recessed lighting, and crown molding, while dual-pane Simonton windows fill the home with natural light. At the heart of the home, the kitchen is both functional and refined, appointed with shaker cabinetry, pull-out shelving, spice racks, and stainless steel Jenn-Air appliances, including a 6-burner range.

Designed with a curated aesthetic, this Acadian inspired residence features Ralph Lauren finishes, evoking the feeling of stepping into a Ballard Designs catalog.

Upstairs, the primary suite is a true retreat, offering serene park views, a fireplace, and a walk-in closet. The spa-like bathroom is finished with Calcutta marble across the vanity and shower, complemented by a charming window seat.

French doors open to a private backyard oasis designed for indoor-outdoor living, complete with a pool, gas outdoor fireplace, and inviting side yard.

Ideally located just minutes from the beach with easy access to the 405, 22, and 605 freeways, this home is also close to shopping, dining, and entertainment. Living in West Garden Grove is about community and lifestyle, centered around Edgar Park, known for its annual Baseball Opening Day Parade and local events.

Serviced by top-rated schools including Barker Elementary School, Bell Intermediate School, and Pacifica High School, this turnkey home offers the perfect blend of location, lifestyle, and luxury.

This charming single-level residence is ideally situated at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac on a desirable single-loaded street, offering added privacy and PANORAMIC WESTERLY SUNSET VIEWS. Featuring 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a direct-access single-car garage, this tastefully upgraded home blends comfort, functionality, and scenic beauty. Interior improvements include dual-pane windows and sliders, waterproof luxury vinyl flooring, completed plumbing re-pipe, scraped and textured ceilings, raised-panel interior doors, ceiling fans, and an updated HVAC system installed with permit. The inviting kitchen offers upgraded cabinetry, granite countertops, and stainless steel appliances. Both bathrooms have been remodeled with updated vanities, stone countertops, designer backsplash accents, and step-in tile showers. The spacious primary suite includes an en-suite bath, mirrored wardrobe doors, and plush carpet flooring, with matching carpet in the secondary bedroom.
Additional highlights include a dedicated dining area and a generous living room with vaulted ceiling and raised-hearth gas/wood-burning fireplace. Step outside to a covered full-length rear patio overlooking low-maintenance grounds and breathtaking panoramic sunset views. The home also features a durable concrete tile roof and full Section 1 termite clearance for added peace of mind. Includes coveted Lake Mission Viejo membership, low 1.09% tax rate, No Mello-Roos, and access to all of the outstanding Casta del Sol HOA amenities!

remarks: Welcome to this exceptionally spacious 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo offering 1,402 sq ft of living space in one of Burbank’s most desirable neighborhoods. Located in a well-maintained 8-unit community on a charming tree-lined street, this home offers a rare level of privacy with no neighbors above or below. Rarely found in today’s condo market, the expansive layout features oversized living spaces throughout, including a large living room with a cozy fireplace. One of the home’s standout features is the spacious first-floor den/flex space with direct access to an oversized private balcony, ideal for a home office, media room, guest space, or additional lounge area. The spacious kitchen offers ample cabinetry, generous counter space, and excellent storage, while the adjacent dining and living areas create a comfortable flow for everyday living and entertaining. The oversized primary suite serves as a comfortable private retreat, and features a walk-in closet, additional large closet, private en-suite bathroom, and views overlooking Downtown Burbank. The secondary bedroom is also impressively sized. Additional highlights include in-unit laundry, central a/c and heating, and 2 car parking spaces. Built in 1980 and maintained in original condition, this home offers an exciting opportunity to personalize and add value in a highly sought-after location near Downtown Burbank, Burbank Town Center, IKEA, major studios, Griffith Park, the LA Zoo, restaurants, shopping, and easy access to the 5 Freeway. With its rare combination of size, privacy, location, and potential, this home presents an exceptional opportunity in one of Los Angeles most desirable communities.

remarks:
**Seller is willing to consider buyer concessions that may be applied toward closing costs and/or an interest rate buydown, subject to offer terms. Rare opportunity on nearly 5 acres in the highly sought-after Spanish Hills area of Corona. This unique property includes two separate APNs and is zoned RA5, offering incredible flexibility for residential living, business use, or a multi-generational setup. Set back from the street and surrounded by open land, the property delivers a high level of privacy with a quiet, secluded feel.

The property features a main residence, detached ADU, two workshops, and a converted garage. Currently operating as a kennel and dog training facility, it offers plenty of space and versatility for a variety of business.

The main home includes 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, an oversized den, and a wrap-around balcony that takes full advantage of the surrounding views. The detached 1-bedroom, 1-bath ADU has its own living space, kitchen, private driveway, and dedicated parking, ideal for extended family, guests, or rental income.

A roundabout driveway provides access to multiple parking areas, including a converted 10-car garage now used as functional workspace. Two additional detached structures have been converted into workspaces, suitable for offices, storage, creative use, or other operations.

The land offers ample room for expansion, vehicles, equipment, animals, or recreational use. RV parking with utility hookups is already in place. Additional features include propane hookups, a recently upgraded private water well, and a brand-new A/C and heating system.

With two parcels, nearly 5 acres of usable land, multiple structures, and a private setting, this property presents a rare combination of space, flexibility, and long-term potential in one of Corona’s most desirable areas.

remarks:
Rarely available remodeled end-unit townhome located on a premier, private cul-de-sac in the desirable Crestline community of Laguna Hills. This beautifully partially upgraded 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath residence offers a bright, light-filled open floor plan characterized by high ceilings, elegant crown molding, and high-end finishes throughout. The seamless flow between the spacious living and dining areas leads to a well-appointed kitchen featuring custom cabinetry, granite countertops, and stainless steel sink.

A standout feature of this home is one of the most expansive private patios in the community, providing an unrivaled outdoor setting for entertaining or quiet relaxation. Upstairs, discover two generously sized bedrooms, including a primary suite, each offering its own private bathroom.

Functional upgrades abound, including newer A/C, an updated water heater, dual-pane windows with custom shutters, and a cozy electric/gas fireplace. Residents of Crestline enjoy resort-style amenities including three pools, spas, and a clubhouse, all within a pet-friendly enclave adjacent to scenic trails and parks.

Conveniently located near top-rated schools, Aliso Viejo Town Center, Costco, and Trader Joe’s, with rapid access to major highways (5 and 73) and the world-class coastlines of Laguna Beach and Dana Point. A truly exceptional value in a prime location—don’t miss this opportunity!

remarks: Located in Carmel Valley, this 4-bedroom, 3-bath home offers 2,627 sq ft of living space and a lot size of 2.8 acres with hardwood, tile, and other flooring throughout. The kitchen features granite countertops, an electric oven range, refrigerator, microwave, dishwasher, garbage disposal, ice maker, and exhaust fan, providing ample functionality. The separate family room and formal dining room provide versatile living and entertaining areas. Enjoy cozy wood-burning fireplaces with insert in the family room and wood burning in the primary bedroom. Additional amenities include high, vaulted, and open beam ceilings, as well as a wet bar. Laundry is conveniently located in the utility room with 110V and 220V electric hookups for washer and dryer. The home is equipped with ceiling fans for cooling, baseboard electric heating with individual room controls, double pane windows, and low flow toilets. The home has many unique characteristics and the yard is well landscaped with lots of plants along with oak trees throughout!

remarks: Located at 63543 Jadeite Street, this updated 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom home offers a rare level of privacy on nearly half an acre. Positioned with no neighbors on either side and an open landscape to the rear, the property captures the quiet, expansive feeling that makes Joshua Tree so desirable. The area is specifically known for its dark night skies, providing an exceptional setting for stargazing from the comfort of your own backyard. The home is being sold fully furnished and is truly move-in ready. Recent high-value updates offer long-term peace of mind, including a new roof, an upgraded electrical panel, and energy-efficient double-pane windows. For year-round comfort, the house features a modern Mr. Cool 3-zone mini-split system for customized heating and cooling, along with an electric water heater and an in-unit washer and dryer. The outdoor living space is a standout feature, fully privacy-fenced and oriented to take in unobstructed mountain views. The backyard is designed for relaxation, featuring an outdoor patio with a 220v hot tub, a fire pit, and four hammocks. Situated just 15 minutes from the Joshua Tree National Park entrance, the location is ideal for those seeking a peaceful primary residence or a desert getaway. This property currently operates as a successful vacation rental with a proven track record. Because it is sold fully furnished, it offers a seamless turnkey opportunity for the next owner.
