remarks: Huge Price Improvement! Do not miss this gorgeous ocean view and golf course view Carriage House with a private roof deck in Fox Point Farms! Built in 2024, this condo has a premium end unit lot, with golf course and ocean views from the kitchen, dining room and roof deck. Inside, you'll find one bedroom plus a versatile bonus room (potential second bedroom) equipped with a custom California Closets Murphy bed and desk—perfect for guests or a home office. The thoughtfully designed layout also includes 1 full bath, stackable full sized laundry closet and soaring ceilings that create an airy, open feel. Every inch of this home exudes style and quality, with tons of upgrades: luxury vinyl floors, designer lighting and fixtures, and the bath features upgraded tile and quartz countertops, frameless shower doors and upgraded cabinets. The home is filled with natural light, thanks to oversized windows that take full advantage of the end-unit location. The coastal modern kitchen is a dream for any chef, featuring upgraded quartz countertops, high-end appliances, upgraded lighting and a spacious peninsula, ideal for casual dining or entertaining. The living room has soaring ceilings with beautiful modern wood beams, open to the dining and kitchen areas, making the home feel even more spacious and inviting. And when it’s time to unwind, the private rooftop deck awaits—with an ample seating area and panoramic 360-degree views of the ocean and rolling greens of the golf course. The primary suite offers a serene retreat with lofty ceilings, a custom barn door leading to the (see sup)  en suite bath, and upgraded California Closets for effortless organization. Even the attached garage is a standout, boasting epoxy floors, built-in storage, and an EV charger outlet. Plus, the home features owned solar and air conditioning for energy-efficient comfort year-round. With its blend of ocean and golf course views, contemporary finishes, and farmhouse-inspired charm, this condo is equally suited for quiet relaxation or lively entertaining. Whether you're searching for a full-time coastal haven or the ultimate lock-and-leave property, this gem has it all. Don’t miss your chance to experience the best of Leucadia living!  A rare find, Fox Point Farms offers a vibrant coastal living atmosphere. With Los Angeles just 95 miles north and San Diego 25 miles south, you're perfectly situated for both day trips and local adventures. This brand new construction community offers all the allure that Southern California has to offer. Fox Point Farms is thoughtfully designed as an inclusive environment that nurtures community through agriculture and localized experiences, encouraging residents to come together to eat, drink, nourish, and celebrate. At the heart of this artisan-crafted community lies the Fox Point Farm-to-Table concept, creating a unique atmosphere where every shared meal and connection enhances the lifestyle of its residents and with an exceptional lineup of amenities: Haven Farm + Table: Enjoy farm-to-table dining at the on-site, zero-waste restaurant. Harvest Market: Stock up on fresh, locally sourced produce right in your community. Fox Point Brewing Co. : Sip craft beer brewed with care, steps from your home. Heal Botanics: Relax and recharge with holistic, farm-sourced apothecary products. Hatch Gatherings: Join yoga sessions or other wellness classes in a serene glass greenhouse. Community Gardens: Grow your own produce or flowers and connect with neighbors. Two-Mile Scenic Trails: Stroll or jog through picturesque pathways surrounding the property. Community amenities include bocce court, pool, virtual golf, fitness center and social spaces. Gather with friends or neighbors for fun and connection. A lifestyle like no other, Fox Point Farms is more than just a place to live it's a place to thrive. Whether you're savoring fresh-brewed coffee from Fox Point Roasters, exploring local trails, or unwinding at one of the thoughtfully designed ...

remarks: Welcome to this ground-up, newly constructed 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath residence positioned in the heart of Silver Lake. Nestled at the back of the community, the home offers a rare sense of privacy and quiet while still being moments from the energy of the neighborhood.  Designed with an emphasis on natural light and organic finishes, the main level unfolds into a warm and inviting living space that feels both refined and comfortable. The kitchen balances clean contemporary design with everyday functionality, pairing light wood cabinetry with crisp white stone surfaces and a full suite of stainless steel gas appliances. A thoughtfully designed powder room completes the level, finished with high-contrast black-and-white tile and a custom cane-detailed vanity that adds texture and warmth.  Upstairs, two well-proportioned bedrooms offer privacy and separation, along with the convenience of a stacked LG laundry closet. Both bedrooms serve as ensuites, maximizing privacy and optionality. Outside, a rare wraparound yard creates a valuable extension of the home. While modest in size, it offers the perfect space for pets, additional storage, or simply enjoying a bit of outdoor living in the middle of the city.  Built with long-term comfort and efficiency in mind, the home includes all-new systems, central HVAC, and owned solar panels. Located moments from neighborhood favorites like Vinovore, Cafecito Organico, Be U, and Doto, this home offers a lifestyle that feels connected, vibrant, and distinctly Eastside.

A refined mid-century modern in one of Beverly Hills' most coveted enclaves.

remarks: Location, Location, Location — plus ACTIVE LAKE MEMBERSHIP! This turnkey Airbnb retreat has earned over 75 five-star reviews and is ready for its next owner to enjoy as a vacation getaway, investment property, or full-time mountain escape. Step inside to discover high ceilings, attractive laminate flooring, updated finishes, ceiling fan, newly painted throughout, and a cozy fireplace that creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. remarks: A rare opportunity in Parkmont awaits! A Mediterranean Oasis estate on a generously deep lot completely rebuilt from the ground up. This 2.900 SF appx estate maximized for multi-generational living, situated on a deep 10,000 SF lot features wonderful ground-level comforts. A turn-key Mediterranean main home with 1st floor guest bedroom, bathroom with walk-in shower, 1st floor versatile office with closet with oversized primary suite and additional 2 bedroom upstairs. Step across the flowering backyard patio to a detached studio ADU with bathroom, kitchen & laundry amenities. Rebuilt from the ground up in 1998-2000, this turn-key contractor's property was crafted with pride of ownership, customized for multi-generational comforts, holiday gatherings, backyard entertaining, guest cottage and potential additional ADU capabilities with additional rear storage buildings and level yard. Appreciate the attention to detail in every corner with custom finishing touches throughout. Vaulted ceilings flooded with light, elegant spiral staircase foyer, chef's kitchen with pull up seating, gas range & powerful ventilation hood and warming drawer & more! Thoughtful storage spaces, oversized bedrooms, polished marble flooring and elegant marble surrounds throughout the first floor and bathrooms and quality berber carpet at bedrooms. A Primary Suite to escape to features a spacious retreat with hollywood closet, luxurious marble bathroom, walk-in shower & soaking tub. Recent added value include a brand new west fence 6/26, new furnace & AC 2025, EV Charger, Sunrun Solar system, fresh interior paint 5/26, finished main garage with flooring and laundry area. An entertainer's backyard with slate tile hardscape, cozy cabana with matching roof & outdoor kitchen with gas grill, sink &side power burner. A few steps to the studio casita ADU provides independence for all ages  & needs finished with granite counters, full kitchen, washer & dryer, wood laminate flooring, and bathroom with shower and new glass door. Conveniently located near Hwy 84, markets & shopping, a short drive to Parkmont Elementary or a short walk to Centerville MS & Washington HS. Completely rebuilt from 1998-2000 with permit totaling 2,919 living SF on approved plans. ADU not included in SF. To be sold "As-Is" Sale with reports & disclosures for review. Buyer to verify SF & Permit. Built with love and gratitude, this welcoming home will continue to be a blessing to many!

remarks: Welcome to your own Durham country retreat on 3.06 incredible acres featuring two homes, a sparkling pool, horse facilities, owned solar, and endless possibilities for multi-generational living, hobby farming, rental income, or simply enjoying the peaceful lifestyle this property offers. The beautifully updated main home offers 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and 2,838 sq. ft. of warm and inviting living space. From the charming front porch to the thoughtfully updated interior, this home is full of character and modern upgrades. Inside, you’ll find two spacious living areas, including a cozy living room with a free-standing wood stove and a stunning brick surround fireplace that creates the perfect gathering space. The family room features an electric fireplace, while the large dining room opens to the sunroom overlooking the backyard and beautiful property beyond. The updated kitchen is both stylish and functional with quartz countertops, tile backsplash, farmhouse sink, newer appliances, and updated luxury vinyl flooring throughout much of the home. Additional highlights include a flex room ideal for a home office, gym, yoga studio or potential 5th bedroom, remodeled downstairs half bath, updated laundry/mudroom/pantry, walk-in closets, Nest smart thermostats, dual-zoned HVAC, a newer 2-year-old roof, and owned water softener system. The property itself is truly something special. Enjoy summer days by the pool and spa, entertain from the gazebo or pool house/game room complete with HVAC and whole-house fan, or take advantage of the incredible outdoor amenities including a metal barn, 3 horse stalls, 3 pastures, chicken coop, pond, greenhouse, raised garden beds, fruit trees, large shop/storage building, tool shed, and fully irrigated grounds with drip and sprinkler systems. This is an ideal 4-H property with room for animals, gardening, recreation, and more. Adding even more value is the separate 2 bedroom, 1 bathroom, 890 sqft home with its own entrance, address, and PG&E meter, offering excellent rental income potential or space for extended family. Additional features include a 52-panel (15KW) owned ground-mount solar system with zero true-up, natural gas, two wells, two septic systems, and potential for a future third home. A rare opportunity to own a truly versatile and beautifully maintained country property with so much to offer.

remarks:
Located in the highly sought-after community of Faire Harbour, this beautifully updated home features 3 bedrooms and 2.5 baths. The interior has been thoughtfully remodeled with vinyl flooring throughout, upgraded bathrooms, recessed lighting, and more. The kitchen offers a breakfast nook, honey maple cabinetry, tumbled travertine backsplash, granite countertops, dual sink, and a view of the surrounding greenbelt. A pocket door connects the kitchen to the dining room and opens to the inviting family room, which features a fireplace and abundant natural light. Sliding doors lead to the fenced patio, which opens directly to a large, park-like grass patch and lush greenbelt—ideal for outdoor dining, entertaining, pets, or play.
Upstairs, the primary suite boasts a peek ocean view, en-suite bath with skylight, separate vanity area, and a walk-in closet. Two additional bedrooms share a full bath; one offers a walk-in closet and the other features a window seat overlooking the greenbelt. The laundry closet is also located upstairs and accommodates full-size units. Thoughtful craftsmanship can be seen throughout the home, including upgraded baseboards, window trim, a modern stair rail recently installed. Energy-efficient double-paned Milgard windows enhance comfort and efficiency year-round.
Additional highlights include a whole-house re-pipe, central heating, a detached 2-car garage with built-in storage. Community amenities include a fenced pool, spa, and volleyball court. Faire Harbour is ideally situated near top schools, local beaches, grocery stores, restaurants, the outlet mall, and freeway access. The HOA covers water, adding extra value and convenience for homeowners.

remarks: COUNTRY LIVING WITH INCREDABLE VIEWS ONLY 8 MINUUES TO THE FREEWAY, SHOPPING AND RESTAURANTs AND 15 MINUTES TO THE WINERIES. Beautiful 4 Bedroom 3-1/2 Bath 4,386 sq. ft. in the prestigious De Luz community of Temecula offers a light & bright home with an open feel. Breathtaking views city lights, views of Big Bear, Idyllwild & Palomar Mountain. Step through the beautiful double front doors, you'll notice the entire home is filled with natural light. Featuring elegant travertine flooring, a formal living and dining area with ceilings over 10 feet high. The home offers tall ceilings throughout including 8 foot doors throughout, wide hallways, 5 inch base boards, crown molding, beautiful coffered and tray ceilings. A spacious primary suite boasts 12-foot ceilings, French doors to the backyard, a luxurious bath with a walk-in shower, soaking tub, sitting area, large walk in closets and custom wood cabinetry. The gourmet kitchen is truly a chef’s delight, featuring granite countertops, custom wood cabinetry, stainless steel built-in KitchenAid refrigerator, dishwasher, double wall ovens & microwave including a professional grade Thermador stovetop  on natural gas, a very rare find in De luz, wine fridge, a large island, and a walk-in pantry. The family room is open to the kitchen and is equally bright, featuring a cozy fireplace and a flexible adjoining room that can serve as a media or game room. The kitchen, eating area and family room are lined with windows to enjoy the views. The 3 secondary bedrooms are very spacious with two of the bedrooms offering walk in closets and a jack in jill bathroom. The third bedroom boasts a private ensuite bathroom and bedroom with private entrance and patio area would be a perfect multi-generational living. Outside is the perfect with an relaxing entertaining area with a TV, & fireplace. Enjoy a large, built-in barbecue entertaining area with a flat top gill, built-in BBQ, sink and sitting area. An outdoor fire pit, providing the perfect setting to take in those magnificent mountain & city views. With travertine flooring through out the home and new luxury vinyl plank flooring in the bedrooms, enjoy no carpet in the home. The oversized three-car garage is extra deep and could be converted into a ADU. This home is a perfect blend of elegance and functionality. There is room to build another garage, ADU and pool. Home is private and perfect location to enjoy walks or biking with no car traffic.

Step inside to a warm and inviting living room featuring a cozy fireplace, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. remarks: Welcome to Corral Canyon Ranch, a historic 277-acre estate dating back to 1880, where timeless character meets refined modern living. This extraordinary property offers a rare blend of rustic charm and contemporary comfort, anchored by a thoughtfully designed compound of five beautifully renovated residences, ideal for hosting, entertaining, or creating a private retreat for family and guests. At the heart of the property, the primary ranch house is a perfect example of rustic elegance meeting modern comfort, featuring premium Viking appliances, hickory hardwood flooring, exposed beam ceilings, quartz countertops, a breakfast bar, and a stunning stone fireplace, a walk-in closet and an expansive wraparound porch with sweeping views, an ideal setting to unwind at the end of the day. Just steps away, a separate recreation and entertainment room with a bar and sliding doors opening to an outdoor patio provides a seamless space for gathering and relaxation. The additional residences offer versatility and privacy, including a spacious two-bedroom Bunkhouse, complete with a dedicated bunk bed sleeping area adjacent to the living room, comfortably accommodating up to six guests, a two-bedroom Loft-style Apartment, a two-bedroom Caretaker's Cottage, and a historic one-bedroom Homestead House, all well-suited for extended stays, staff, or visitors. Designed for both comfort and functionality, the ranch features an eight-stall open barn, a 200' x 125' riding arena, a covered round pen, multiple paddocks and pastures with shelters, a hay barn, feed storage building, and an equipment barn, along with approximately 80 acres of open hay fields, a fully equipped workshop, gas and diesel tanks, a well and pump house and three 5,000-gallon water tanks. Beyond its improvements, the land offers a serene and immersive natural setting, with miles of scenic trails winding throughout the property, leading to remnants of its historic cattle ranching roots and a picturesque arroyo carved by a seasonal creek, while its adjacency to beautiful National Parkland provides direct access to hiking, cycling, off-roading, camping, photography, birdwatching, and stargazing. With its scale, privacy, and unique layout, Corral Canyon Ranch lends itself to a variety of exceptional uses, including a multi-generational estate, an intimate venue for private gatherings or curated events, or a creative retreat for artists, writers, and filmmakers, while also offering a discreet escape for the high-profile individual seeking seclusion and natural beauty. Whether envisioned as a private escape, legacy property, or one-of-a-kind retreat destination, Corral Canyon Ranch presents a rare opportunity to experience peaceful country living in the Ojai backcountry. It is located just under 100 miles from Burbank and approximately 40 miles from Ojai's renowned restaurants and charming shops. The property combines seclusion with accessibility reached by a scenic drive from Los Angeles or via a nearby private airport.

remarks: This extensively expanded residence offers a rare opportunity to own a truly unique property in the Rowland Heights area. Originally built as a 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home with 1,953 sq ft of living space, the property was substantially expanded with permits, with construction completed in late 2017 and 2018. The home now features a total of 9 bedrooms and 8.5 bathrooms, including 6 suites, providing exceptional flexibility for large or multi-generational households, extended family living, or other specialized residential needs. A significant portion of the households nearly 80% of the house was newly constructed during the expansion, offering a more modern layout and systems compared to the original structure. The property stands out for its generous overall size, which is uncommon in the surrounding neighborhood, and benefits from enhanced privacy with no neighboring home on one side. The front yard has been thoughtfully improved to accommodate ample parking, addressing a common concern for larger households while maintaining privacy. Additional features include a 3-car garage and four separate air conditioning units, allowing for efficient climate control throughout the home. At the current offering price, the property presents a compelling value on a price-per-square-foot basis, significantly lower than many nearby alternatives and even comparable to condominium pricing, making it an attractive option for buyers seeking space, functionality, and long-term value that would be difficult to replicate with new construction today. The home is situated in a peaceful and quiet residential setting, offering a calm and harmonious living environment. Despite its tranquil surroundings, the property enjoys convenient access to daily necessities, including schools, restaurants, and local markets. Commuters will appreciate the easy access to both the 57 and 60 freeways, making travel to surrounding areas efficient and convenient. The property is also equipped with a solar system, providing energy efficiency and potential long-term utility savings. Some bedrooms and balcony areas offer pleasant views, adding to the overall sense of openness and comfort. If these features align with what you are looking for, this is a rare opportunity to see a property of this size and configuration. Schedule a private showing to experience the home in person.

Architectural glass block plays beautifully with the natural light, while beamed ceilings and skylights enhance the bright, airy feel. Porcelain flooring runs throughout much of the home. The dining area features a built-in buffet that adds a touch of original character. The primary suite opens to the south-facing pool for all-day sun and views of the Santa Rosa Mountains, with handsome built-ins that include a desk. The guest bedroom features a full bath. A separate den or office opens to the pool through French doors. Skylights in the bathrooms enhance the light-filled feel throughout. The backyard is wrapped in mature vines for exceptional privacy and includes a hot tub on the back patio for year-round relaxation, along with a charming mix of citrus trees including Meyer lemon, Mexican lime, ruby red grapefruit, and two orange trees. Major upgrades include a new roof in 2024 and two owned solar systems, one for the home and one for the pool, supporting efficient, low-maintenance living. Fee land, you own it. Offered furnished with an oversized 1 car garage with room for golf cart storage. El Paseo is just down the street!

An ideal opportunity to own one of the largest floorplans in a neighborhood with rising values. Brand new rigid core luxury vinyl plank flooring in the entire second level of this modern luxury home. remarks: Nestled on a sprawling 4.76 acres in the prestigious gated community of Hidden Valley Estates this property offers the ultimate best in privacy and luxury. Located in the most private location in the neighborhood down a long driveway and surrounded by open space. Interior highlights of this meticulously maintained and upgraded home include a beautiful grand entry, built-ins throughout, hardwood floors in most of the house, custom lighting, and bespoke window treatments throughout. There is a large family room with a fireplace that opens to a gourmet remodeled kitchen with granite countertops, a huge center island, a Viking 6-burner gas range and double oven, Subzero refrigerator, Thermador dishwasher, a butler's pantry with a Viking wine refrigerator and a large walk-in pantry. Also, located on the first level is a downstairs en-suite bedroom, spacious laundry room, library/office with a fireplace and built-in bookshelves with a ladder, formal living room w/ a fireplace and a view of the courtyard with a glistening fountain & an impressive formal dining room. Upstairs is the luxurious primary en-suite complete with a fireplace, sitting area, walk-in closets and a balcony to enjoy the serene mountain views. There are 3 more spacious en-suite bedrooms, 2 of which were recently expanded, complete the upstairs. Outside is the perfect entertaining area with a spacious covered patio w/ a fireplace, built-in heaters, built-in barbeque and Green Egg, a sink & ice maker, a newer sparkling pool w/ a fun waterslide, waterfall, and spa. In addition, there is a recently added guest house and a 3000-bottle subterranean wine cellar. There is still more yard to enjoy with lots of open grassy area and hillside perhaps for a sports court, vineyard, orchard, the possibilities are endless. All this plus a 4-car garage, owned solar panels, and a whole house generator. This home is conveniently located close to amazing restaurants, shopping, award-winning schools, and Sherwood, yet it feels like a peaceful & tranquil retreat. Truly, a one-of-a-kind property.

remarks:
Perfectly set along famous Foothill Blvd — a second from Van Nuys Blvd and just a moment before Osborne St., 12325 Sweetbriar Lane offers updated living inside the secure, gated California Glen community with a 24 hr staffed security checkpoint.

This spacious 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom home with over 1,526 sq ft of living space sits at the beginning of its row, providing added privacy and minimal drive-by activity. Inside, the property has been refreshed throughout with new interior paint, modern recessed lighting, and updated bathrooms, creating a bright, clean, move-in-ready atmosphere. The paid-off solar system adds meaningful long-term efficiency and helps keep utility costs low.

The backyard is low-maintenance and still offers the outdoor privacy most homeowners appreciate.

California Glen HOA is $480/month and includes the community pool, barbecue area, water, sewer, trash service, landscaping, and gated security. For a home of this size, having major utilities such as water, sewer, and trash already included in the HOA provides a level of predictability and value that is difficult to find elsewhere.

The location is another highlight: near Hansen Dam Recreation Area, Hansen Dam Golf Course, and minutes from Sunland and Tujunga, with convenient access to Burbank and Glendale. The home borders the foothill area near Lakeview Terrace, offering a blend of openness and accessibility that is rare at this price point.

With its generous living space, thoughtful updates, efficient solar system, secure community setting, and excellent Valley location, 12325 Sweetbriar Lane stands out as a well-prepared and highly appealing home for its next owner.

remarks:
The 9,934 sq. ft. of living area inside this incredible 6-bedroom and 6.5-bathroom Castle creates a rare, one-of-a-kind residence. Numerous ocean-facing balconies and decks provide vistas of the Pacific Ocean, offshore Islands, beaches, mountains, city lights, canyons, farms, and much more.  Spiral staircases ease movement between floors.  

The Main Floor features a huge living room, party area, dining room, extra-large kitchen with island, laundry area, bathrooms, fireplaces, and exterior decks. The Second Level, below the Main Level, provides for huge master bedrooms, master bathrooms, extensive storage areas, more exterior decks, and access to the Swimming pool.  The Lowest Level offers several bedrooms, bathrooms, and even more potential storage areas.   This lowest level will be treated as either a separate ADU or Junior ADU, depending on final approval from Ventura County.  Additionally, there is a specific location for the future Elevator designed to travel between the exceptionally large Top Level Entertainment Deck down to the lowest level.  There are [2] separate garages with parking space for 8 total vehicles plus extensive driveway parking that is also available.  Finally, there is a very large open area located on the sloped hillside below the house for landscaping, general access, walkways, yard, playground, terraces, or a possible garden area.    

The estate sits behind security gates atop the Altamont Ridge HOA  RE-1AC Rural Exclusive zoned land area.  This huge ‘Castle on the Ridge’ was under construction until the original Owner encountered numerous personal issues and he was forced to stop.  Fortunately, the original foundation and vertical components appear to have been correctly completed and constructed to code requirements, including the numerous caissons inserted into the hillside for additional structural stability. The interior was not completed before the original owner halted all work; the property largely sat empty and unfinished for many years until the current owner purchased the house.

This is an incredible opportunity for someone ready to finish an incomplete construction project and turn the site into both a landmark and distinguished destination.

tour today!

remarks: Welcome to Schooner's Ranch--84 oceanfront acres on California's dramatic Highway 1 near Point Arena in Mendocino County. Just a scenic drive from the Bay Area, this private compound features a 4,200 sq ft home with one-of-a-kind views of the Pacific, meadows, and forests. The main house offers a chef's kitchen with granite counters, Sub-Zero and Miele appliances. Dining area opens to an ocean-view patio, perfect for indoor-outdoor entertaining. Upstairs, two primary suites each with their own private balcony. Main house also includes an office, additional living areas and a bedroom suite currently used as a fitness room. Five additional structures surround the main house with a flagstone courtyard and pond, including a guest cottage and two 1,500 sq ft light-filled studios. Property has equestrian facilities including a corral, vet stall, and 70 fenced acres. Sustainability features include solar panels, generator for all structures, and 27,000 gallons of water storage. This special property can be used for many things such as a mini retreat center, equestrian opportunities, horse boarding/breeding, training facility, artist residency, hospitality opportunities, conservation/ranch + so much more! Nearby town of Point Arena offers shops, galleries, and the iconic lighthouse. Other towns close by include Gualala, Manchester and Anchor Bay. You can have the best of both worlds-a private retreat with the ocean at your fingertips while being a stone throw away from town. This property is truly one-of-a-kind and really something to see.

remarks:
A Contemporary coastal ranch with modern farmhouse elements. The dark vertical siding paired with warm wood garage doors and trim provides a strong contrast and upscale curb appeal; Linear sconces add modernity and make the exterior glow at dusk, emphasizing architectural lines. A new horizontal cedar fence frames the lot, blending with the wood tones of the home. Minimalist landscaping (gravel, succulents, and low-water plants) suits a coastal climate and low-maintenance lifestyle.

This coastal luxury retreat in the Hollywood Riviera has been newly reimagined to blend modern design with timeless finishes, offering three bedrooms and three bathrooms across an open floor plan filled with natural light. Sweeping ocean and sunset views define the living experience, with expansive picture windows and sliding glass doors connecting every major space to the outdoors.

The rear living room is the architectural highlight, featuring vaulted ceilings with exposed wood beams and custom integrated LED lighting that accentuates the dramatic wood-plank detail overhead. A seamless flow leads into the dining area and designer kitchen, where quartz counters, premium stainless steel appliances, custom cabinetry, and an oversized island create a stylish and functional space for both entertaining and everyday living.

The private master suite opens directly to the deck and includes a generous walk-in closet and a spa-style bath with dual vanities, modern tilework, and a walk-in shower. Two additional bedrooms and two full baths provide flexibility for guests, family, or office use.

Outdoor living is equally impressive, with multiple view decks oriented toward the Pacific, blending indoor comfort with breezy coastal elegance. The contemporary exterior showcases stone and wood accents, complemented by drought-tolerant landscaping and a two-car garage with custom doors.

Located just moments from Riviera Village, sandy beaches, dining, and award-winning schools, this residence embodies the best of Southern California coastal living. Due to the numerous inquiries during the development of this home, it is not expected to stay on the market long.  Hurry, this one won't last.

remarks:
Situated on an expansive lot, this Mirador Plan 6 Italian Villa by Woodbridge Pacific is where stylish architecture blends seamlessly with luxury and comfort. Located in the desirable Whispering Hills community of Rancho San Juan, this special retreat is truly an experience—not just a home.
A bright and open feel with abundant natural light welcomes you upon entry. Enjoy the incredible pool set against views of rolling hills and even the Saddleback Mountains—an ideal place to spend your time. The backyard also features the always-popular Capistrano Room, offering the feel of outdoor living with the comfort of indoor amenities. The functional floor plan and timeless design make this home ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. With approximately 5,120 square feet, the first level includes a bedroom with an en suite bathroom, a game room, a wet bar, and more. The second story features a spacious loft and four additional bedrooms. Inside, the home is equipped with high-end appliances, while the backyard boasts a full kitchen with custom cabinetry. Elegant chandeliers illuminate the foyer and main level, which showcases tumbled travertine flooring, while the upstairs features wide-plank luxury vinyl flooring. Additional highlights include a Trimlight system, built-in sound system, top-of-the-line pool equipment, and more. Conveniently located near award-winning schools, a variety of restaurants, iconic downtown San Juan Capistrano, shopping, picturesque beaches, and easy access to the 5 freeway and 241 toll road, this is a rare opportunity to own an exceptional estate.

remarks:
Welcome to 3966 Laguna Blanca Drive, a rare opportunity to own a classic Hope Ranch estate that blends timeless Santa Barbara charm with exceptional potential. Privately set on just over an acre of lush, mature landscaping, this Spanish-style residence offers nearly 4,000 square feet of light-filled living space with serene garden and hillside views.

Built in 1970, the home combines authentic craftsmanship with the relaxed sophistication that defines Hope Ranch living. Vaulted wood-beamed ceilings, arched openings, and natural light create an inviting sense of warmth and space. The living room features a striking fireplace and opens to the outdoor terrace, while the formal dining room overlooks the pool and gardens. The kitchen and breakfast nook serve as the home’s comfortable hub and offer an ideal opportunity for modernization or full redesign.

The residence includes five bedrooms and four and a half baths, thoughtfully designed for privacy and easy flow. The primary suite enjoys vaulted ceilings, a generous en-suite bath, and views of the surrounding landscape. Several guest bedrooms open directly to the outdoors, creating flexibility for multi-generational living, guest quarters, or work-from-home setups. Throughout the interior, original details and quality construction offer a strong foundation for personalization and updates.

Outside, the property feels like a private retreat. A sparkling pool and spa are surrounded by patios, shaded sitting areas, and established gardens. The gently sloping lot allows room for potential expansion, such as a guesthouse, ADU, or enhanced outdoor living spaces. A three-car attached garage and broad motor court add convenience and ample parking.

In good condition and ready for a new vision, this home provides the perfect canvas—whether refreshed in its current style or transformed into a contemporary showpiece.

Hope Ranch offers a rare combination of privacy, prestige, and natural beauty. Residents enjoy 22 miles of equestrian and walking trails, a private beach with lifeguards and kayak storage, tennis courts, and 24-hour neighborhood security—all just minutes from La Cumbre Country Club, downtown Santa Barbara, and the coast.

3966 Laguna Blanca Drive is more than a home—it’s an opportunity to create a lasting estate in one of California’s most exclusive coastal communities, where the timeless beauty of Spanish architecture meets the enduring elegance of Hope Ranch living.

remarks:
Nestled in the heart of Big Bear, your dream of owning TWO cabins on a spacious, and nearly flat lot awaits. These historic cabins feature a rustic stone exterior, reminiscent of simpler times and rugged wilderness living. Upon entering the larger cabin known as Stone Hauz, you’re immediately greeted by natural stone floors and a paneled wooden ceiling, which opens into the main living area with its stone-built wood burning fireplace, ready for cozy nights and roasting marshmallows. The spacious kitchen features an island for gathering in the heart of the home. Dual-paned windows bring natural light into the cabins, maintaining temperatures in the snowy winters and warm summers. Enjoy two bedrooms on opposite ends of the cabin, offering privacy for large groups. Stone Hauz also features its own laundry room with full-size washer and dryer off the hallway. Other fantastic features of this cabin include new water heater, newer wall heaters, roof and siding, newer pad and hot tub with trellis and privacy curtains,  new fence along back of property, freshly painted front gate, and updated electrical.

Now let’s stroll across the oversized yard, to the Loveshack. This cozy, one-bedroom cabin has a timeless exterior made with real wood planks and shingle siding, and benefits from a new roof. Inside, you’ll find a full-size kitchen, large bedroom with storage cabinets, and room for seating. All windows are dual-paned, except for the original paned window in the bathroom, and early 1900's gem! Slip out to the deck to enjoy the surrounding pine trees and views of Alpine Slide at Magic Mountain. Other fantastic features of this cabin include a newer wall heater, new shower pan, new roof, updated electrical, newer jacuzzi pad and hot tub, and in close proximity to the spacious storage shed.

Rental income and vacation destinations finally meet with this opportunity! Both cabins are separately metered, and offer opportunity for owner to occupy, rental income, vacation, or any combination of the above. Cabin may be sold furnished and ready to enjoy!

Virtual walkthrough coming soon!

remarks:
First time on the market since 1989, this spacious two-story corner lot home has been lovingly maintained by the same family for over 36 years and is ready for its next chapter. Offering plenty of living space, the home features two separate living areas, a dining space, and a large open kitchen perfect for gatherings and everyday living. All bedrooms are conveniently located upstairs and offer generous space, including a primary suite with a connected bathroom and walk-in closet.

The sellers have expanded the home with an enclosed patio addition (not permitted) and upgraded the backyard with extensive cement work, creating a low-maintenance outdoor space ideal for entertaining. Mature fruit-bearing trees including apple, lemon, avocado, mandarin, grapefruit, and nopales add charm and functionality to the property. The backyard also offers space for up to 3 cars or potential RV parking if the patio cover is removed, along with ample shade structures perfect for hosting family and friends.

The front yard offers a garden-like feel with plenty of room for additional landscaping or vegetation, while the front security fence provides extra privacy and peace of mind. Solar panels will be included in the sale. This special home has been filled with memories for decades and is now looking for a new family to love it for many more years to come.

Sylmar offers a prime location with convenient access to major freeways, shopping, dining, and outdoor recreation. The area is also benefiting from exciting growth and development, including the highly anticipated new Sylmar Studios project bringing new energy, jobs, and investment to the community. With beautiful mountain views and a peaceful neighborhood feel, this location offers the perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and future potential

Spanning just under 3,000 sq ft this meticulously designed residence  showcases superior construction with 2x6 framing, concrete tile roof, stucco siding with closed eaves along with thoughtfully curated upgrades throughout. From the moment you enter the home it reveals a level of quality rarely found, featuring solid core oak doors adorned with designer hardware, elegant custom finishes and an atmosphere that is inviting. Beautiful travertine flooring flows throughout the main living spaces, adding warmth and elegance. All bedrooms feature plush neutral carpeting creating comfortable private retreats. Designed for elevated living and entertaining, the heart of the home is the great room highlighted by a dramatic brick fireplace, built in ceiling surround sound, custom entertainment center, complete with beverage fridge. Spaces flow seamlessly into the formal dining room. The gourmet kitchen combines beauty with function showcasing stainless steel appliances, granite counter tops, breakfast bar, reverse osmosis water system and beautiful views of the valley while you're doing dishes. Retreat to the luxurious main suite featuring its own fireplace, french doors out to the patio along with a well appointed primary bath made for 2. There's room for every one with 3 additional bedrooms and 2 more baths to accommodate the whole family.The attached oversized garage boasts cabinets for storage and room for 3 cars. Modern comfort and peace of mind with a dual HVAC system, whole house water system, new hot water heater, remote control blinds, ceiling fans in all bedrooms and great room. A new Generac whole house generator to insure uninterrupted comfort and security. Beyond the residence the property boasts just over 3 acres and features a 1,500 sq ft finished work shop with RV access, offering unmatched versatility for collectors, hobbyist
or those simply seeking exceptional storage and workspace. $160,000 invested in upgrades including the workshop, generator and retaining wall to name a few! You don't want to miss this one!

remarks:
KB Home’s Rhythm is the only new construction in Long Beach. Rhythm is centrally located near the 91/710/405 Freeways in North Long Beach. Grocery shopping nearby Ralph’s, Aldi’s, Trader Joe's and Costco) We are only 9 miles to the beach and conveniently located to many Los Angeles and Long Beach employment centers. 

This is a work live unit, with 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms and 2 half bathrooms.
We have NO MELLO ROOS and extremely low property tax rate.

All of the 84 three story town homes featured in this gated community include a Solar System at no cost. Our high efficiency energy star certified homes save you money and our WaterSense homes are the Environmental Protection Agency highest standard for water efficiency and performance. 

Amenities include gated, community, pool, and club house. Live Work homes also available.

remarks:
Off-Grid 5-Acre Mini Ranch – Homesteader's Dream!

Welcome to your very own slice of country paradise! This fully fenced 5-acre mini ranch offers true off-grid living with a 7,140-watt solar system complete with battery backup and a 25kW commercial generator to keep you powered year-round.

Perfect for horses, livestock, or your full farm setup, this property features a seasonal creek, expansive garden area, and two fully contained greenhouses for year-round growing. A spacious 1,500 sq. ft. storage building offers the potential to convert into a second home or guest quarters.

The land also includes a well, ample water storage, and two septic systems. The existing 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom 1975 mobile home offers cozy living with a wood-burning stove, wall unit for cooling, and plenty of rustic charm.

Need space for projects or equipment? There’s a huge shop, multiple storage buildings, and even a fully hooked-up RV ready for guests or extra living space.

Whether you’re looking to homestead, farm, or live sustainably off the grid, this property has it all. Private financing available. Don’t miss out on this rare opportunity—come see it for yourself!

remarks: Unbelievable property! One-of-a-kind custom single-story home set on a rare, level ¾-acre usable lot. This exceptional home offers a spacious living room with a picturesque window, a separate dining room, and an open kitchen/family room combo—perfect for everyday living and entertaining. Featuring 4 generously sized bedrooms and indoor laundry, the oversized primary suite includes a sliding door to a covered patio, a large bathroom with a soaking tub, separate shower, and a walk-in closet. The beautifully remodeled kitchen is filled with natural light, and the family room showcases a stunning stone fireplace with a gas starter.  Step outside to an incredible backyard designed for enjoyment—featuring a huge patio area, in-ground pool, expansive lawn, basketball court, fire pit area, large side yard, and two Tuff Sheds. Enjoy your own fruit trees including lemon, apricot, apple, and nectarine. With ample space to add an ADU or build a large shop, the possibilities are endless.  This home has been meticulously maintained with major upgrades including a new roof, new siding and paint (2025), HVAC system with insulation and ducting (2023), remodeled kitchen and bathrooms (2019), and newer fencing (approx. 5 years). The oversized 3-car garage is an added bonus, complete with a HDTV 120-inch projector screen—perfect for movie nights or watching your favorite sporting events.  All this just minutes from charming downtown Clayton—this is truly a rare find!  Open House Schedule:  - Saturday (6/13) - 1 - 4 pm - Sunday (6/14) - 2 - 4 pm

remarks: Conveniently located close to just about everything here in the Sierra Foothills! This home is on .72 of an acre and includes full RV hook ups! The RV isn't included but the hook ups are. The rooms are spacious and there are two decks overlooking the back area of the property. The lot is level and has lots of parking and potential. This area is located only 2 1/2 hours from most Bay Area locations and is a short driving time to Pinecrest Lake, the Sonora Pass, Black Oak and Chicken Ranch Casinos, Yosemite National Park and all the historical areas in Tuolumne County. Come up and take a look!

remarks: Situated at the end of Picholine Way with endless nature trails at your fingertips, this is the perfect place to call home! As you enter, you are greeted by a large vaulted ceiling with lots of natural light pouring in through the large picture window, a cozy gas fireplace, and new luxury vinyl flooring that runs throughout the living space and bedrooms. The split floor plan is ideal with the guest bedrooms and bathroom located on one side of the home and the primary suite on the other. In the primary bedroom there is a large walk-in closet, an en suite bathroom with a tub, dual sink vanity, and walk-in shower. In the kitchen there are solid surface counters, warm wood cabinetry, and a dreamy garden window that looks out on the backyard and Little Chico Creek. The yard is unbeatable with direct access to the creek allowing you to immerse yourself with nature. You can enjoy the tranquil sounds of the creek from your back patio while sipping your morning coffee or walk out your front door and be on a trail in a few steps. Other notable features include a tile roof, indoor laundry, an abundance of storage, and mature landscaping including a lemon tree and olive tree. Being located at the end of the street all while being close to schools, Mariam Park, and shopping, makes this the perfect blend for Chico living.

remarks: Located in a highly desirable neighborhood adjacent to Pasadena's Madison Heights, this beautifully updated TOP FLOOR CORNER UNIT condo offers style, comfort & fantastic community amenities. Updated hardwood flooring & a freshly painted interior welcomes you into the spacious living room, accented by a dazzling gas fireplace. Adjacent to the fireplace is a dual pane sliding glass door that opens to a private balcony overlooking the pool & courtyard area--a perfect spot to relax & unwind. The open floor plan flows seamlessly into the dining & kitchen area, where the kitchen has been tastefully updated to include GRANITE countertops, custom cabinetry with soft close drawers, stainless appliances & an eat-at-bar counter. The hallway offers additional storage with a linen closet & a double-door hall closet for even more storage. To the left, the spacious bedroom boasts the same hardwood floors, dual pane window with courtyard views, ceiling fan with light & an oversized three-door closet. Across the hall, the full bathroom offers the same stylish granite countertops and rich wood cabinetry from the kitchen, while adding a large matching built-in linen closet with a soaking tub/shower combo. A Nest thermostat ensures modern climate control for added comfort. Residents of this well-maintained building enjoy access to a beautiful courtyard with multiple seating areas, picnic tables & communal barbecues. Additional community amenities include a clubhouse, gym, sauna & community laundry. This exceptional condo is perfectly situated in prime central Pasadena, within walking distance to CalTech, Kaiser Permanente School of Medicine, and Paseo Colorado, and minutes from Pasadena City College & the Rose Bowl.

remarks: This Geodesic Dome home is all magic. Every corner is thoughtfully designed, creating beautiful sanctuary-compound living. The primary bedroom and bathroom are on the main floor with a guest suite on the lower floor (which is currently being used as a storage space). The upper loft area features an open bedroom space, bathroom, and living room area. The kitchen features wood beams that are said to be from the pier at Pacific Ocean Park and has recently been redone with finely designed custom cabinetry. The yard has landscaped paths leading to shaded nooks, fruit trees, a sauna, hot tub, outdoor shower, and cold plunge pool. There are three structures, including a one-bedroom, one-bathroom guest house, a large open studio, and a workshop, which is currently being used as a music studio. This property is the Topanga dream!

remarks: Welcome home to this beautifully upgraded two bedroom plus private den/office corner residence in the gated community of The Heights, thoughtfully designed for seeking comfort, convenience, and access to top tier schools. Located in one of San Diego’s most desirable school districts, this home offers the rare advantage of having the elementary, middle, and high schools just steps away. Morning drop offs become easy and after school activities are effortlessly accessible. Inside, the home is filled with natural light throughout the day, creating a warm and uplifting atmosphere. As a corner unit, you will enjoy added privacy along with peaceful tree views from every window. The flexible third room offers the perfect space for a home office, study area, playroom, or guest room. The kitchen is both stylish and functional, featuring Brazilian granite countertops with elegant pendant lighting, stainless steel appliances including a newer refrigerator, and a Spanish stone backsplash that extends to the fireplace. Recessed LED dimmer lighting throughout, interior designer paint, and flooring with no carpet deliver a clean and modern feel that is easy to maintain. Central HVAC ensures year round comfort. The Heights offers resort style amenities where you will enjoy a pool, spa, clubhouse, and fitness center. The HOA covers water and trash. Parking is convenient with a private garage plus an additional assigned space nearby. Enjoy close proximity to shopping, groceries, and restaurants in One Paseo and Del Mar Highlands and Carmel Valley Recreation Center and library nearby.  Just minutes to I-805, I-5, and 56 freeway and the beautiful beaches of Del Mar/Torrey Pines. A rare opportunity to own a bright and private corner residence in Carmel Valley, where top rated schools, inviting surroundings, and everyday convenience come together to create the ideal lifestyle.

remarks:
Discover this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom home located in the highly sought-after Villa Metro community of Santa Clarita, CA. Offering approximately 1,719 sq. ft. of thoughtfully designed living space, this move-in ready two-story residence (built in 2015) blends comfort, functionality, and resort-style living in one of the area’s most desirable master-planned neighborhoods.
Step inside to an inviting open-concept floor plan filled with natural light, featuring a spacious living area and a well-appointed kitchen designed for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. Fresh interior paint, updated lighting fixtures, and a clean, refreshed aesthetic create a bright and welcoming atmosphere throughout.
All four bedrooms are conveniently located upstairs, including a generously sized primary suite with ensuite bathroom and ample closet space, offering a private retreat for relaxation. A dedicated upstairs laundry area adds everyday convenience, while the smart layout enhances privacy and livability for families, guests, or remote work needs.
Outdoor living is just as impressive, with a spacious hardscaped patio ideal for al fresco dining, weekend gatherings, or quiet evenings outdoors. The attached 2-car garage with charging area provides secure parking and additional storage space.
Residents of Villa Metro enjoy a true resort-style lifestyle, with access to a sparkling community pool, clubhouse, community garden, landscaped paseos, parks, and inviting gathering areas. The community is ideally located near shopping centers, dining options, top-rated schools, and major freeways, making it perfect for commuters seeking both convenience and comfort.
This is an exceptional opportunity to own a Santa Clarita home in Villa Metro, offering a perfect balance of style, location, and lifestyle amenities. Whether you're a first-time buyer, growing household, or investor, this property delivers strong long-term value in a thriving Southern California community.

remarks:
Perched behind a private gated entrance in the prestigious Oakmont Country Club neighborhood, this extraordinary luxury estate showcases breathtaking panoramic views of the golf course, mountains, city lights, and unforgettable sunsets. Recently remodeled and meticulously upgraded, 1-of-a-kind residence offers the perfect blend of luxury, privacy, and comfort. 

A grand gated entry and long private driveway lead to impressive living spaces highlighted by soaring ceilings, stunning hand-painted ceiling murals, crystal chandeliers, custom crown moldings, recessed lighting, and walls of glass that capture the spectacular views. The elegant formal dining room is perfect for entertaining, while the spacious family room with grand fireplace opens seamlessly to expansive view balconies and outdoor living areas.

The brand-new gourmet kitchen features a large center island, custom cabinetry, beautiful countertops, and all-new stainless steel appliances, creating the ideal setting for both everyday living and entertaining. An oversized den with its own private bathroom and projection-screen theater system offers exceptional flexibility and can easily be converted into a 4th bedroom with private balcony access. A separate game room of approximately 505 square feet (not included in the home's living area) is plumbed for a future bathroom and offers endless possibilities as a guest suite, gym, office, or entertainment room.

The luxurious primary suite serves as a private retreat, featuring an oversized walk-in closet and a spa-inspired bathroom with a soaking jet tub, separate shower, and private sauna. Additional spacious bedrooms and beautifully appointed bathrooms provide comfort and privacy for family and guests.

Step outside to your private backyard featuring a recently remodeled PebbleTec pool with a new pool system, expansive entertaining patios, and stunning views overlooking Oakmont Country Club and the surrounding mountains. Whether hosting guests or enjoying a quiet evening, the setting is truly spectacular. Additional highlights include refinished flooring throughout, a newly done driveway, designer finishes, abundant storage, custom millwork, and a direct-access 3-car garage with tiled flooring. A rare opportunity to own one of Glendale's premier view estates in the highly sought-after Oakmont Country Club. Luxury, privacy, and breathtaking views come together at 3426 Ayars Canyon Way

remarks: Sweeping views, impressive scale, and exceptional opportunity define this Ridgewood Estates residence, privately situated on approximately 2.87 acres in one of Sonora’s most desirable neighborhoods. Significant capital improvements have already been completed, including a brand-new roof, dual HVAC systems, new appliances, updated lighting, and new commodes throughout, creating a strong foundation for future customization and design enhancement. remarks:
This well-loved home sits in a solid Long Beach neighborhood with good schools and easy access to everything the city has to offer. Originally a three-bedroom, a thoughtful remodel created a generous primary suite, giving you two bedrooms with real breathing room. Custom details throughout keep the character intact without feeling overdone.
The basement adds solid bonus space — whether you need storage, a workshop, or just room to spread out. Out back, the yard is set up for actual living: a fountain, fire pit, and above-ground jacuzzi make it the kind of space you'll actually use.
If you have cars, an RV, or just need serious storage, the 6-car garage with RV parking and dedicated sewer and water hookups checks every box. Above the garage, a bonus room works well as an office, gym, or guest space.

remarks: Perched above a sweeping canopy of trees, 'Chateau La Rose' offers the rare feeling of complete seclusion--where sky, forest, and horizon stretch endlessly in every direction. Escape to this serene retreat with a private tree-top panorama where you can imagine being the only person on the planet. Mornings arrive with glowing sky and birdsong and evenings end in a bubbling hot tub beneath vivid sunsets or around a bonfire under a galaxy of stars. The reimagined first level garage conversion is now a spacious bedroom with double French doors and deck access. Nearby, is a convenient bathroom with tiled shower, laundry and quartz-topped sink vanity. Just upstairs, the main living level unfolds into a bright, open floor plan with an efficient kitchen, two additional bedrooms, and a full bath. Roomy and light filled with floor-to-ceiling windows, the open floor plan of the 2nd floor is a wonderful spot for entertaining and relaxing. Natural light floods every corner creating an appealing indoor/outdoor aesthetic. The upper balcony is telescope-worthy with ample space for lounging and enjoying outdoor dining while experiencing the ever changing sky. Explore the property's winding network of former logging trails to discover a storybook artist's studio complete with an outdoor shower and loft resting nook. Tucked deeper into a mysterious corner of the woods, a hidden yurt awaits the adventurous of spirit. With 10 private acres to explore, this land invites hiking, reflection, and connection with nature at every turn. Pilots will appreciate the property's proximity to Little River Airport just 2.5 miles away, while the ocean, Little River Store, and fine dining are only five miles from the home with Historic Mendocino Village just minutes beyond. Chateau La Rose is a property that offers both true solitude and easy access to everything that makes the Mendocino Coast special. It is home for those who value space, views, and a sense of being wonderfully removed from it all. Motivated Seller is ready for an offer.

remarks:
A Private Mountain Retreat Just Minutes from the Lake and Slopes.
Rare opportunity to own one of the newer, fully upgraded homes in this desirable Big Bear Lake location. Beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bath mountain home offering 1,668 sq ft of comfortable living space on a fully enclosed 7,920 sq ft lot. Built in 2006, this property is one of the newer homes in Big Bear Lake and is presented in excellent condition inside and out. Extensively upgraded since purchase, the home features central air conditioning and heating (rare in the area), updated kitchen and bathrooms, new carpeting throughout the home, upgraded bedrooms, new wood window levelers on all windows, modern Nest smoke detection system installed throughout the house, and a new water heater. The exterior log siding has been professionally sealed and protected for long-term durability. Designed for both relaxation and entertainment, the property includes a custom gazebo with private jacuzzi, expanded front parking, upgraded rear porch walls, and a fully converted garage entertainment and game space ideal for guests and vacation enjoyment.
The home is offered fully furnished, including all living room, bedroom, kitchen furnishings, washer and dryer in the laundry room, décor, and extensive entertainment amenities in the heated carpeted garage, making the property completely turnkey and ready for immediate enjoyment or rental use. This property has been successfully operated as a vacation rental and has earned outstanding guest reviews, maintaining 5-star ratings on Airbnb and a 10/10 score on Booking. A dedicated property website named Timberwoodcabin was created for the home and showcases the property, guest experiences, and accumulated reviews. The website and its content can be included as part of the sale, providing valuable marketing and rental history for the new owner. Whether used as a personal mountain getaway, a family vacation home, or a proven rental investment, this fully furnished retreat offers location, comfort, and lifestyle in one of Southern California’s most desirable mountain destinations.

remarks: This Private Coastal Villa is the perfect blend of a beach lifestyle and modern sophistication - this unique, rare gem is west facing, has ocean views and is perched on a corner double lot in the heart of the Hermosa Hills. This Tuscan-inspired refined design with a curated, modern interior palette boasts architectural details and warm finishes that create an atmosphere that is elevated and welcoming. Lush greenery and framed by swaying palm trees, this coastal villa offers the rare combination of resort-inspired living, serenity, thoughtful functionality, privacy, sophistication and timeless appeal. Enter the arched, custom, wrought-iron door into a naturally sunlit foyer with soaring ceilings and elegant detailing. This home invites effortless living with multiple indoor-outdoor spaces that capture ocean breezes and natural light. The entry level south wing offers a secluded, primary sanctuary with a stone fireplace, private outdoor veranda and grassy yard, hotel spa inspired bathroom with separate counters, oversized shower and walk-in closet. The north wing has three additional bedrooms, an en suite with outdoor access to spa and patio, two additional bedrooms are well appointed with ample closet space and a dual sink bathroom. This wing enjoys its own kitchen offering convenience and privacy for family members and guests, great for older children, elderly parents and could easily be an ADU and includes 4 car parking, laundry room, tool work area and additional storage. Retreat upstairs to the heart of the home in the warm family room with walls of windows and views that stretch beyond rooftops and spectacular sunsets, built-ins, a dual-sided fireplace that also accommodates the outdoor TV deck. Bask in the sunroom with a wall of western windows inviting ocean breezes and natural sunlight while enjoying the piano area and dining room. Relish cooking and entertaining in your gourmet kitchen that includes a 48” SubZero Pro refrigerator, 48” six burner gas cooktop, colossal island that opens seamlessly to a dining area and the barbeque and bar deck or up the stairs to the rooftop sky deck with panoramic ocean views. Also, on the second floor is a functional private and spacious office, featuring custom cabinetry and bookshelves. Additional highlights - beautiful LV plank floors throughout, designer lighting, security system and AC. Multiple flexible living areas, patios and decks provide intimate spaces to unwind or host festivities for any lifestyle.

remarks: Set on 2.51 elevated view acres in the exclusive Covenant of Rancho Santa Fe, this custom-built 2009 estate has been recently refreshed and showcases 4,523 sq. ft. of beautifully scaled single-level living. Designed for both grand entertaining and everyday enjoyment, the home features soaring ceilings, an open flowing floor plan, and seamless indoor/outdoor living. The great room, with its stone-clad fireplace, lift-and-slide doors, and beverage bar, opens to the chef’s kitchen complete with a sun-filled breakfast area, copper sink, and bar seating. Additional highlights include a formal dining room, artisan-crafted office/library, secondary office, and a powder room. The luxurious primary suite offers a cozy fireplace, spa-inspired bath, and a generous custom-appointed dressing room. Three additional bedroom suites provide comfort for family or guests. Outdoor living is unrivaled, with a magnificent covered living/dining room and fireplace overlooking the resort-style pool and spa, outdoor shower, and expansive lounge areas—perfect for taking in the sweeping, peaceful views. remarks: AT ONE TIME OR ANOTHER..... all of us have wondered, "why did the builder do that?" or "why didn't the builder do that?" With the upgrades and improvements that have been made, there is no need for second guessing any of that. Talk about "turnkey"! The tasteful front courtyard is just a hint. From removing the original wall between the kitchen and dining room creating that popular "Great Room Effect" by unifying the LR, DR, kitchen and nook, to raising the ceilings 2 feet in the kitchen, nook and primary bath, to adding a useful and functional kitchen island, to installing a barn style door to more easily access the increased walk in pantry, to the thoughtful addition of solar tubes to bring natural light into the two traditionally darkest upstairs rooms, there has been obvious attention to detail that anyone would be proud to claim as their own. Common features throughout the home include textured ceilings, expensive blinds, recessed can lighting, raised panel doors, Decor plugs/switches, door casings, oversized baseboards, crown molding, vinyl windows/sliding doors, engineered wood flooring, shaker style cabinetry with soft close features and drawers with dovetail joint construction. Be sure to notice the built-out closets. The kitchen is a thing of beauty and wonder. The barn style sink, the inlay tile design and the quartz counters might distract you from appreciating the extra storage provided by the larger cabinets. In order to fully appreciate the primary bath, you would need to see what it used to look like. The floor-to-ceiling tile walls and impressive glass shower appointments just may take your breath away. Perhaps the biggest and BEST FEATURE of the home is the PANORAMIC VIEW. From inside the home, you can see north to North Beach and south to East Beach and the Oak Preserve. From the balcony off the LR, you can see north from the natural serenity of Saddleback Mountain all the way south to Alicia. We have even not mentioned the private, sandy Mallorca beach with its bar-b-q's, picnic tables, cabana, restrooms and cordoned off swimming area. Nor have we described the 72 boat docks, 2 pools, 2 spas, the peace and quiet or the sense of security provided by a 24/7 manned gate. You are a member of LMVA (concerts, boating, swimming). Then there is that shopping option at MV Mall. Less than 30 minutes from several world destination beaches and between LA and SD, the opportunities are endless. You are investing in more than a home. It is a lifestyle.

remarks:
Escape the hustle and bustle and settle into this charming Dayton home just 5 miles from Chico in the highly sought-after Durham school district. This 3-bedroom, 2-bath home sits on a fully fenced lot bursting with fruit trees and plants — grapes, nectarines, apricots, peaches, persimmons, pomegranates, lilacs, Meyer lemon, mandarin, lime, flowers, and raised garden beds right next to an 8x8 garden shed. Gardeners, this one's for you.
Inside, a Lopi wood stove anchors the living space and a farmhouse sink, and custom built kitchen cabinets adds character to the kitchen. The home has been steadily and thoughtfully updated: new vinyl flooring (July 2021), new Milgard windows and sliding glass door (December 2021), and freshly painted interior (2021). The well is fully dialed in with a new submersible well pump, upgraded electrical wire, and all new pump electrical components (March 2024), paired with a brand-new 1,500-gallon septic tank (March 2024). Curb appeal got a major boost with new exterior house and trim paint (April 2026) and a new garage door and opener (April 2026). The stucco exterior and composition roof round out a home that has been genuinely cared for by long-time owners.
Homes in Dayton don't come up often — don't wait on this one.

remarks:
Located in the coveted Hillside Village enclave of El Sereno, this beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom VIEW home offers the perfect blend of timeless mid-century character, modern upgrades, and an unbeatable Northeast Los Angeles lifestyle. Set above the street with captivating hillside and sparkling city light views, this is the kind of home that rarely comes available.
From the moment you arrive, the home makes a lasting impression with its striking contemporary wood-paneled façade, manicured landscaping, and exceptional curb appeal. A spacious driveway and covered carport accommodate up to three vehicles and include a convenient EV charger — a valuable modern upgrade for today’s buyer. Inside, warm original hardwood floors, recessed lighting, and an airy open layout create an inviting atmosphere filled with natural light and character. The oversized primary suite serves as a true retreat, featuring a large closet, remodeled ensuite bathroom with dual vanities, elegant marble flooring, a luxurious Grohe rain shower system, and serene hillside views. The backyard is where this property truly shines. An expansive view deck creates the ideal setting for entertaining, morning coffee, or evening sunsets overlooking the hills and city lights. Mature avocado and pomegranate trees, lush greenery, and a sense of privacy transform the outdoor space into your own urban sanctuary. The home also features thoughtful upgrades including a newer LG refrigerator and LG dishwasher, blending style and convenience in the kitchen.
Perfectly positioned just minutes from Downtown Los Angeles, Pasadena, and Alhambra, this home also offers easy access to Highland Park, Eagle Rock, Silver Lake, and the rapidly growing USC Medical Center corridor. Outdoor enthusiasts will love being just a short walk to Ascot Hills Park, known for its breathtaking sunset views and sweeping Downtown LA skyline vistas. El Sereno continues to emerge as one of LA’s most exciting and sought-after neighborhoods — offering charm, community, strong growth potential, and proximity to everything the city has to offer. This is a rare opportunity to own a view property in one of Northeast LA’s hidden gems.

remarks: Exceptional investment opportunity in the heart of Grover Beach. This extensively renovated triplex offers true pride of ownership with major system upgrades, modernized interiors, and strong income potential. All three units feature remodeled kitchens with newer cabinetry installed approximately seven years ago, updated with added can lighting, ceiling fans, tile flooring throughout, removed popcorn ceilings and retexturing on all drywall surfaces. Windows were replaced with insulated glass for improved energy efficiency and comfort. The property has undergone comprehensive infrastructure improvements, including a full electrical rewire with new copper wiring throughout (replacing all aluminum wiring), new outlets and switches, and permitted electrical upgrades signed off by the City of Grover Beach. Plumbing has been completely replaced with PEX piping, including new supply lines, angle stops, pressure regulators, and individual shut-off valves for each unit. Water heaters have been replaced for each unit with temperature and pressure regulators. The roof was fully replaced with a permitted 50-year roof after removal of all prior roofing materials. Exterior enhancements include refreshed landscaping with tree removal and new planting, as well as exterior painting. The exterior has 220V electrical accessible in the rear for convenient laundry capability. With major capital improvements already completed and permits finalized with the City, this property offers a rare opportunity for investors seeking a low-maintenance asset with strong rental upside in a desirable coastal location.

remarks:
Welcome to this beautifully renovated Modern Spanish residence situated on a prominent corner lot in one of Granada Hills' most desirable neighborhoods. Extensively remodeled in 2022, this four-bedroom, two-bathroom home offers a rare combination of sophisticated design, open-concept living, and exceptional indoor-outdoor entertaining.

A thoughtfully redesigned front courtyard creates a private and inviting arrival experience, highlighted by professional landscaping and striking iron-and-tinted glass double entry doors. Inside, the expansive great room serves as the centerpiece of the home, seamlessly connecting the living, dining, and entertaining spaces. A remarkable 14-foot center island anchors the chef's kitchen and provides the perfect gathering place for family and guests alike.

Designed with both style and functionality in mind, the kitchen showcases custom black inset cabinetry, quartz countertops, floating shelves, designer hardware, and a premium Verona dual-fuel range. A custom bar area and abundant natural light further enhance the home's welcoming atmosphere, while views of the backyard and pool create a seamless connection to outdoor living.

The private primary suite offers a peaceful retreat with pool views, a walk-in closet, and a spa-inspired bathroom featuring a freestanding soaking tub, oversized shower, and dual-sink vanity. Three additional bedrooms provide flexibility for family, guests, home offices, or fitness space. The secondary bathroom is equally impressive with a curbless walk-in shower and distinctive designer tile finishes.

Quality upgrades extend throughout the home, including smooth-finish walls and ceilings, updated interior paint, Aquaguard flooring, Legrand Adorne switches and outlets, upgraded PEX plumbing, and a conveniently located laundry room near the bedroom wing.

Technology and convenience are integrated throughout with a smart-home system featuring remote access to security cameras, alarm monitoring, video doorbell, irrigation controls, and climate settings.

Outside, the resort-inspired backyard offers a sparkling pool and ample space for entertaining, while a separate front patio provides the perfect setting for relaxing evenings around a fire pit.

Ideally located near highly regarded charter schools, O'Melveny Park picnic grounds & hiking trails, fine dining, and easy access to both the 5 and 405 freeways, this turnkey residence delivers style, comfort, and modern living at its finest.

remarks: Resting atop Rose Hill, just below Montecito Heights and overlooking the rolling hills of El Sereno and the San Gabriel Mountains beyond, The Beryl House is a study in light, landscape, and modern restraint. Built in 2009 yet deeply inspired by California modernism, the residence unfolds as a series of carefully framed moments, where expansive corner windows capture panoramic vistas and transform the surrounding landscape into a living work of art. Inside, oak flooring and blackened metal accents establish a warm yet graphic material palette. Architectural picture windows dissolve the boundary between indoors and out, drawing natural light deep into the interiors while keeping the landscape constantly in view. Thoughtfully constructed with copper plumbing, double-pane windows, and an attached two-car garage, the three-bedroom, two-bath residence balances architectural character with everyday functionality. At the heart of the home, the living room serves as its defining space. Elevated above the surrounding neighborhood, it opens to uninterrupted views of the sweeping canyons and mountain ridgeline. With no neighboring homes looking directly into the residence, the experience is one of remarkable privacy, where the landscape itself becomes the focal point. Outside, a generous decomposed-granite terrace extends into the hillside garden, creating a seamless connection between architecture and landscape. Sculptural fern trees, mature bamboo, and drought-tolerant plantings frame the space, lending a sense of permanence and maturity to the grounds. Nestled within the garden, a built-in projection screen transforms the terrace into an open-air cinema beneath the palms. As daylight fades and the hills recede into silhouette, the space takes on a distinctly cinematic quality, equally suited for gatherings with friends or quiet evenings under the stars. Tucked along a private drive in a hillside setting, The Beryl House remains closely connected to the cultural and urban energy of Northeast Los Angeles. Highland Park, Pasadena, DTLA, Keck Medicine of USC, and LAC+USC Medical Village are all just moments away, while Debs Park and Ascot Hills Park provide a natural counterpoint for outdoor enthusiasts with miles of trails and open space. Nearby, dining destinations such as Moo's Craft Barbecue and Hermon's reflect the area's vibrant and evolving culinary scene. Convenient access to the 5, 10, 60, 710, and 101 freeways easily connects the home to the best of Los Angeles. Equal parts hillside retreat and architectural viewpoint, The Beryl House embodies a distinctly Los Angeles ideal: a home immersed in nature, connected to the city, and designed to make the landscape part of everyday life. Here, architecture and landscape create a living experience that feels unmistakably Californian.
