remarks: Welcome to Waterbury St. in Woodland Hills. Come experience the peaceful easy feeling this nearly 3,600 sq. ft. home affords you and yours. Incredible south of Mulholland locale on this serene street makes it so easy to fall head over heels. Super wide driveway accommodates several vehicles and you can gate it to create a secure massive play area for the kiddos. Inside, a light and bright living room and open formal dining invite you in to explore more. Spacious kitchen displays a bay window perfectly positioned above the sink to capture a tranquil snapshot of the distant mountains and wide-open blue skies. At the lower-level, enjoy a huge family room with crackling fireplace, large wet-bar and amazing adjoining theater/media room. In addition, two bedrooms, bonus room and two baths add to the appeal. Upstairs a double-door entry primary suite offering a serene view of the rear grounds features a private bath and incredible expanded walk-in closet. Two additional bedrooms and full bath complete this spacious floorplan. Outside, glorious grounds await. Covered dining/entertaining lead to a large pebble-tech pool and separate soothing spa. Lower grassy yard is adorned with bountiful fruit trees. All the surrounding lush foliage helps to create this ideal environment. Incredible enhancements includes a newer roof, updated gutters and drainage system, newer tankless water heater, fresh attic insulation, large side yard shed with electricity, water softener and UV water purification system. This fantastic location is mere moments to all the shops and yummy eateries found at the nearby El Camino shopping center, the Commons and Gelson’s shopping center. You’re just a short drive to the beach in one direction and freeway close in another. Sought-after charter schools too….don’t miss!

remarks: Step into this meticulously renovated home in Valley Village showcasing luxury, sophistication, and timeless character. This home underwent a full transformation down to the studs incorporating a reimagined modern floor plan and all new foundation, mechanicals, electrical, plumbing, windows, and roof. Spanning 3BD/3.5BA plus a fully permitted ADU and additional bonus flex space, every finish has been thoughtfully curated including custom cabinetry and millwork, beautiful handcrafted tile, and dolomite stone throughout.Upon entry, warm engineered white oak floors, high ceilings, stunning skylights, and striking accent walls create an inviting first impression. The fully equipped chef's kitchen is outfitted with a huge center island, Thermador appliances, a built-in Miele coffee system, dolomite countertops, and a sleek backsplash crafted from handcrafted Cle zelige tile. The living room has custom built-ins and expansive Western sliding doors open to the backyard, creating the perfect indoor-outdoor lifestyle. A stylish powder room just off the kitchen is ideal for guests. Down the hall, the primary suite features soaring ceilings, a walk-in closet, and a luxurious ensuite bath complete with a spacious Cle zellige tiled shower with bench, dual custom vanity, durable slate tile flooring, and private water closet. Each secondary bedroom offers sliding closet space and its own ensuite bath featuring custom vanities and Zia cement tile. Outside, the backyard is designed for year-round entertaining with a heated and filtered pool, a large private lawn, covered patio, and multiple lounge areas. The fully detached ADU includes a full kitchen with stainless steel appliances, waterproof LVP flooring, and a well-appointed bathroom with a step-in shower, ideal for guests, extended family, or rental income.  Additionally behind the ADU you'll find a bonus room that's perfect for a home office, gym, or storage room. The home also includes a laundry room with side-by-side washer and dryer, surround sound both indoors and outdoors, a four-camera hardwired security system, new paver stone driveway, and value-enhancing and money-saving solar energy system. Conveniently located near the award-winning Colfax Charter Elementary school, Valley Village Park, and some of the valley's best dining and shopping, this reimagined home offers elevated living with exceptional convenience.

remarks: Built in 1905, this charming property is one of the early examples of a California Craftsman Bungalow. Born from the Arts and Crafts philosophy, this style has become a defining characteristic of early 20th-century residential architecture. Thoughtful modifications over the years have greatly enhanced its livability such as introducing a primary suite, a spacious kitchen, and a dedicated indoor laundry room.  Throughout these changes the original details like the clinker brick fireplace, vaulted and beamed ceilings, and key historic wood-frame windows were not lost and still add warmth and character to the house.  The dining room has a set of french doors that lead out to a private patio.  This patio faces south so it receives plenty of sunlight filtered through the citrus trees that run along the southern property line.  There is also a covered patio that provides shade to the home and makes for another great entertaining space.  Other advantages more practical in nature are the lot size and accessibility.  With the many fruit trees and green lawn, it feels like a miniature private park.  This small subdivision was called Crescent Avenue and is part of Fairmount Heights.  Positioned just minutes from the active cultural core of Downtown Riverside, the scenic lakes of Fairmount Park, and the beautiful trails of Mount Rubidoux, this turnkey bungalow has easy access to an active, modern lifestyle.

remarks:
Welcome to your creek-side escape at Clearlake! Located at 16067 Dam Road, this unique waterfront property offers the perfect blend of relaxation, recreation, and income potential. Whether you’re looking for a full-time residence, vacation getaway, or investment opportunity, this home checks all the boxes.
Featuring a newer roof, solar panels with battery backup, and the flexibility to function as two separate living spaces, this property offers endless possibilities. Live in one space and rent the other as a vacation rental or Airbnb, creating additional income potential while enjoying the waterfront lifestyle yourself.
Step outside and enjoy your private boat dock with direct access to the water, world-class fishing right from your backyard, kayaking, and endless boating adventures on the lake. After a day on the water, unwind in the hot tub while taking in breathtaking star-filled nights and peaceful waterfront surroundings. This property has been a cherished vacation home and is now ready for its next chapter as the owners simply no longer have the time to enjoy it.
Inside, the home comes fully furnished, including washer and dryer, making it move-in or rental ready from day one. While the property could use a little TLC, the opportunity here is undeniable for someone ready to add their own vision and personal touches. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, major retailers, and hospital services, you’ll enjoy both privacy and everyday convenience.
Property is being sold as-is, presenting an incredible opportunity to own a waterfront retreat with stunning views, outdoor adventure, and strong investment potential in beautiful Clearlake.

remarks: Experience the extraordinary charm of this iconic vintage Lake Arrowhead cabin, located in the desirable Palisades neighborhood just one block from the lake. Steeped in local lore--rumored to have been owned by James Cagney and overlooking Charlie Chaplin's former cottage--this home captures the spirit of 1930s Hollywood mountain retreats. Surrounded by lilacs, dogwoods, cedars, pines, and maples, the private entry deck sets the tone for the charm within. The dramatic living room features soaring beamed ceilings, a stunning split granite fireplace, and abundant natural light, all enhanced by preserved vintage details. The adjoining kitchen blends nostalgic appeal with functionality, showcasing a classic O'Keefe & Merritt range, 1930's touches charm, and a cozy dining nook with filtered lake views, plus access to an additional entertainment deck. The floor plan offers a main-level bedroom and bath, a private lower-level suite with its own entrance, sitting area, and laundry, and upper-level sleeping spaces with peeks of the lake--ideal for hosting family and guests. Updated with modern comforts--including dual-pane windows, upgraded heating, mini-split and more--this home, adorned almost entirely in wood and stone, preserves its timeless character while offering today's convenience. With seasonal lake views from multiple levels, easy walk to the lake, and proven vacation rental potential, this is a your opportunity to own a true piece of Lake Arrowhead history.

remarks: Welcome to "Verdugo Villa" — a charming 2-bedroom, 3-bathroom condo situated in one of Burbank's most walkable and vibrant neighborhoods. Step inside to discover an open, cozy floor plan bathed in natural light and featuring soaring vaulted ceilings. Take in the kitchen with its ceramic tile, double-wall ovens, an overhead microwave, and a stove cooktop — all within view of the spacious living room. A convenient guest half-bath adds a practical touch for entertaining. Storage is plentiful throughout, with a walk-in closet in the primary bedroom, extra closet space behind the stairs and in the hallway, and an in-unit laundry closet for added ease.  The spacious primary bath features a large vanity with generous counter space, while ceramic tile in all the right places keeps things clean and classic. And then there's the location — truly unbeatable. Walk to Downtown Burbank's restaurants, shops, movie theater, post office, bank, and mall. Commuting is a breeze with the Burbank Metrolink station and Bob Hope Airport nearby, plus easy access to major LA destinations and the iconic production studios that make this city legendary. Oh — and one lucky resident of the secondary bedroom gets a secret, hidden view of Hogwarts Castle at Universal Studios Hollywood (only a few minutes away). This is Burbank living at its finest. Don't miss your chance to call it home!

remarks: Experience the best of Lake Arrowhead living right outside your door. Level access- stylish upgrades and a prime north shore location near the lake, trails and Tavern Bay. Yes, this is street level and straignt into your drive-way and 2-car garage!! Once inside, the main level has a warm and welcoming living area centered around a cozy wood-burning firelace.  Upgraded kitchen and dining area connects for that open-concept feel. 2 sliders open to rear decks bringing in light and tree views beyond. Wood-look vinyl flooring throughout is sooo easy to maintain and it looks great too...guest bath and laundry room on same level. Downstairs, 2 additional guest bedrooms share the large 2nd full bathroom. The primary suite is also on the lower level, and features a spacious walk-in closet, private deck and an inviting spa-style bath with soaking tub alcove, dual sinks, oversized rain shower and tasteful pebble-stone accents. Very nice area of homes, lots of trees and nearly flat streets. The lot is large and fronts Willow Creek below. Easy stroll to the lakes edge and Tavern Bay where you can enjoy summer concerts, take the family to the beach or catch the lake trail for some great hiking. UCLA Conference is just below and down the street, this beautiful iconic spot now offers public dining. This home is equally suited for full-time living or a nice vacay spot at the lake. Lake rights of course!!!
